selfTest.cpp
1#include "CameraCalibration.h"
2#include "RadiationModel.h"
3#include "BufferIndexing.h"
4#include "test_helpers.h"
5#include "VulkanComputeBackend.h"
6
7#define DOCTEST_CONFIG_IMPLEMENT
8#include <doctest.h>
9#include "doctest_utils.h"
10
11using namespace helios;
12
13namespace helios {
21 class RadiationModelTestHelper {
22 public:
28 static bool isGPUAvailable() {
29#if defined(HELIOS_HAVE_OPTIX) && !defined(FORCE_VULKAN_BACKEND)
30 return true;
31#else
32 return TestVulkanDeviceManager::isVulkanAvailable();
33#endif
34 }
35
36 static RadiationModel createWithSharedDevice(Context *context) {
37#if defined(HELIOS_HAVE_OPTIX) && !defined(FORCE_VULKAN_BACKEND)
38 // OptiX available and not forced to Vulkan - use default constructor
39 return RadiationModel(context);
40#else
41 // Vulkan backend - use shared device (workaround for NVIDIA driver bug)
42 VulkanDevice *device = TestVulkanDeviceManager::getSharedDevice();
43 if (!device) {
44 helios_runtime_error("No Vulkan device available for testing");
45 }
46 auto backend = std::make_unique<VulkanComputeBackend>(device);
47 backend->initialize();
48
49 // Use static factory method to inject pre-configured backend
50 return RadiationModel::createWithBackend(context, std::move(backend));
51#endif
52 }
53 };
54} // namespace helios
55
58#define SKIP_IF_NO_GPU() \
59 do { \
60 if (!RadiationModelTestHelper::isGPUAvailable()) { \
61 DOCTEST_MESSAGE("SKIPPED: No GPU/Vulkan device available"); \
62 return; \
63 } \
64 } while (0)
65
66int RadiationModel::selfTest(int argc, char **argv) {
67 return helios::runDoctestWithValidation(argc, argv);
68}
69
70DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("BufferIndexing Correctness") {
71 // Test 2D indexer
72 {
73 BufferIndexer2D indexer(10, 5); // 10x5 array
74
75 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 0) == 0);
76 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 1) == 1);
77 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 4) == 4);
78 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(1, 0) == 5);
79 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(1, 1) == 6);
80 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(9, 4) == 49); // Last element
81
82 // Verify against manual calculation
83 for (size_t i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
84 for (size_t j = 0; j < 5; j++) {
85 size_t manual = i * 5 + j;
86 size_t indexed = indexer(i, j);
87 DOCTEST_CHECK(manual == indexed);
88 }
89 }
90 }
91
92 // Test 3D indexer
93 {
94 BufferIndexer3D indexer(2, 3, 4); // 2x3x4 array
95
96 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 0, 0) == 0);
97 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 0, 1) == 1);
98 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 0, 3) == 3);
99 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 1, 0) == 4);
100 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 2, 0) == 8);
101 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(1, 0, 0) == 12);
102 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(1, 2, 3) == 23); // Last element
103
104 // Verify against manual calculation
105 for (size_t i = 0; i < 2; i++) {
106 for (size_t j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
107 for (size_t k = 0; k < 4; k++) {
108 size_t manual = i * 3 * 4 + j * 4 + k;
109 size_t indexed = indexer(i, j, k);
110 DOCTEST_CHECK(manual == indexed);
111 }
112 }
113 }
114 }
115
116 // Test 4D indexer
117 {
118 BufferIndexer4D indexer(2, 2, 2, 2); // 2x2x2x2 array
119
120 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 0, 0, 0) == 0);
121 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 0, 0, 1) == 1);
122 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 0, 1, 0) == 2);
123 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(0, 1, 0, 0) == 4);
124 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(1, 0, 0, 0) == 8);
125 DOCTEST_CHECK(indexer(1, 1, 1, 1) == 15); // Last element
126
127 // Verify against manual calculation
128 for (size_t i = 0; i < 2; i++) {
129 for (size_t j = 0; j < 2; j++) {
130 for (size_t k = 0; k < 2; k++) {
131 for (size_t l = 0; l < 2; l++) {
132 size_t manual = i * 2 * 2 * 2 + j * 2 * 2 + k * 2 + l;
133 size_t indexed = indexer(i, j, k, l);
134 DOCTEST_CHECK(manual == indexed);
135 }
136 }
137 }
138 }
139 }
140
141 // Test realistic dimensions matching radiation plugin usage
142 {
143 const size_t Nsources = 5;
144 const size_t Nprimitives = 100;
145 const size_t Nbands = 20;
146 const size_t Ncameras = 3;
147
148 MaterialPropertyIndexer mat_indexer(Nsources, Nprimitives, Nbands);
149
150 // Verify a few random indices
151 DOCTEST_CHECK(mat_indexer(0, 0, 0) == 0);
152 DOCTEST_CHECK(mat_indexer(0, 0, 1) == 1);
153 DOCTEST_CHECK(mat_indexer(0, 1, 0) == 20);
154 DOCTEST_CHECK(mat_indexer(1, 0, 0) == 2000);
155
156 // Verify against manual calculation for all combinations
157 for (size_t s = 0; s < Nsources; s++) {
158 for (size_t p = 0; p < Nprimitives; p++) {
159 for (size_t b = 0; b < Nbands; b++) {
160 size_t manual = s * Nprimitives * Nbands + p * Nbands + b;
161 size_t indexed = mat_indexer(s, p, b);
162 DOCTEST_CHECK(manual == indexed);
163 }
164 }
165 }
166
167 // Test 4D camera material indexer
168 CameraMaterialIndexer cam_mat_indexer(Nsources, Nprimitives, Nbands, Ncameras);
169
170 for (size_t s = 0; s < 2; s++) { // Test subset
171 for (size_t p = 0; p < 10; p++) {
172 for (size_t b = 0; b < Nbands; b++) {
173 for (size_t c = 0; c < Ncameras; c++) {
174 size_t manual = s * Nprimitives * Nbands * Ncameras + p * Nbands * Ncameras + b * Ncameras + c;
175 size_t indexed = cam_mat_indexer(s, p, b, c);
176 DOCTEST_CHECK(manual == indexed);
177 }
178 }
179 }
180 }
181 }
182}
183
184DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Simple Direct") {
185 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
186 // Minimal test: single patch, collimated source, no scattering, no emission
187 Context context;
188 uint patch = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1)); // Horizontal 1x1 patch
189 context.setPrimitiveData(patch, "twosided_flag", uint(0)); // One-sided
190 context.setPrimitiveData(patch, "reflectivity_SW", 0.0f); // No reflection (100% absorption)
191
192 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
193 radiation.disableMessages();
194
195 // Add shortwave band
196 radiation.addRadiationBand("SW");
197 radiation.disableEmission("SW");
198 uint sun = radiation.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, 1)); // Sun pointing down (+Z)
199 radiation.setSourceFlux(sun, "SW", 1000.0f); // 1000 W/m²
200 radiation.setDirectRayCount("SW", 10000);
201 radiation.setScatteringDepth("SW", 0); // No scattering
202
203 radiation.updateGeometry();
204 radiation.runBand("SW");
205
206 float flux;
207 context.getPrimitiveData(patch, "radiation_flux_SW", flux);
208
209 // With no reflection, horizontal patch, downward sun: should absorb ~1000 W/m²
210 float error = fabsf(flux - 1000.0f) / 1000.0f;
211 DOCTEST_CHECK(error <= 0.01); // 1% tolerance
212}
213
214DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel 90 Degree Common-Edge Squares") {
215 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
216 float error_threshold = 0.005;
217 int Nensemble = 500;
218
219 uint Ndiffuse_1 = 100000;
220 uint Ndirect_1 = 5000;
221
222 float Qs = 1000.f;
223 float sigma = 5.6703744E-8;
224
225 float shortwave_exact_0 = 0.7f * Qs;
226 float shortwave_exact_1 = 0.3f * 0.2f * Qs;
227 float longwave_exact_0 = 0.f;
228 float longwave_exact_1 = sigma * powf(300.f, 4) * 0.2f;
229
230 Context context_1;
231 uint UUID0 = context_1.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
232 uint UUID1 = context_1.addPatch(make_vec3(0.5, 0, 0.5), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0.5 * M_PI, -0.5 * M_PI));
233
234 uint ts_flag = 0;
235 context_1.setPrimitiveData(UUID0, "twosided_flag", ts_flag);
236 context_1.setPrimitiveData(UUID1, "twosided_flag", ts_flag);
237
238 context_1.setPrimitiveData(0, "temperature", 300.f);
239 context_1.setPrimitiveData(1, "temperature", 0.f);
240
241 float shortwave_rho = 0.3f;
242 context_1.setPrimitiveData(0, "reflectivity_SW", shortwave_rho);
243
244 RadiationModel radiationmodel_1 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_1);
245 radiationmodel_1.disableMessages();
246
247 // Longwave band
248 radiationmodel_1.addRadiationBand("LW");
249 radiationmodel_1.setDirectRayCount("LW", Ndiffuse_1);
250 radiationmodel_1.setDiffuseRayCount("LW", Ndiffuse_1);
251 radiationmodel_1.setScatteringDepth("LW", 0);
252
253 // Shortwave band
254 uint SunSource_1 = radiationmodel_1.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
255 radiationmodel_1.addRadiationBand("SW");
256 radiationmodel_1.disableEmission("SW");
257 radiationmodel_1.setDirectRayCount("SW", Ndirect_1);
258 radiationmodel_1.setDiffuseRayCount("SW", Ndirect_1);
259 radiationmodel_1.setScatteringDepth("SW", 1);
260 radiationmodel_1.setSourceFlux(SunSource_1, "SW", Qs);
261
262 radiationmodel_1.updateGeometry();
263
264 float longwave_model_0 = 0.f;
265 float longwave_model_1 = 0.f;
266 float shortwave_model_0 = 0.f;
267 float shortwave_model_1 = 0.f;
268 float R;
269
270 for (int r = 0; r < Nensemble; r++) {
271 std::vector<std::string> bands{"LW", "SW"};
272 radiationmodel_1.runBand(bands);
273
274 // patch 0 emission
275 context_1.getPrimitiveData(0, "radiation_flux_LW", R);
276 longwave_model_0 += R / float(Nensemble);
277 // patch 1 emission
278 context_1.getPrimitiveData(1, "radiation_flux_LW", R);
279 longwave_model_1 += R / float(Nensemble);
280
281 // patch 0 shortwave
282 context_1.getPrimitiveData(0, "radiation_flux_SW", R);
283 shortwave_model_0 += R / float(Nensemble);
284 // patch 1 shortwave
285 context_1.getPrimitiveData(1, "radiation_flux_SW", R);
286 shortwave_model_1 += R / float(Nensemble);
287 }
288
289 float shortwave_error_0 = fabsf(shortwave_model_0 - shortwave_exact_0) / fabsf(shortwave_exact_0);
290 float shortwave_error_1 = fabsf(shortwave_model_1 - shortwave_exact_1) / fabsf(shortwave_exact_1);
291 float longwave_error_1 = fabsf(longwave_model_1 - longwave_exact_1) / fabsf(longwave_exact_1);
292
293 DOCTEST_CHECK(shortwave_error_0 <= error_threshold);
294 DOCTEST_CHECK(shortwave_error_1 <= error_threshold);
295 // For zero expected value, check direct equality
296 DOCTEST_CHECK(longwave_model_0 == longwave_exact_0);
297 DOCTEST_CHECK(longwave_error_1 <= error_threshold);
298}
299
300DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Black Parallel Rectangles") {
301 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
302 float error_threshold = 0.005;
303 int Nensemble = 500;
304
305 uint Ndiffuse_2 = 50000;
306
307 float a = 1;
308 float b = 2;
309 float c = 0.5;
310
311 float X = a / c;
312 float Y = b / c;
313 float X2 = X * X;
314 float Y2 = Y * Y;
315
316 float F12 =
317 2.0f / float(M_PI * X * Y) * (logf(std::sqrt((1.f + X2) * (1.f + Y2) / (1.f + X2 + Y2))) + X * std::sqrt(1.f + Y2) * atanf(X / std::sqrt(1.f + Y2)) + Y * std::sqrt(1.f + X2) * atanf(Y / std::sqrt(1.f + X2)) - X * atanf(X) - Y * atanf(Y));
318
319 float shortwave_exact_0 = (1.f - F12);
320 float shortwave_exact_1 = (1.f - F12);
321
322 Context context_2;
323 uint patch0 = context_2.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(a, b));
324 uint patch1 = context_2.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, c), make_vec2(a, b), make_SphericalCoord(M_PI, 0.f));
325
326 uint flag = 0;
327 context_2.setPrimitiveData(patch0, "twosided_flag", flag);
328 context_2.setPrimitiveData(patch1, "twosided_flag", flag);
329
330 RadiationModel radiationmodel_2 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_2);
331 radiationmodel_2.disableMessages();
332
333 // Shortwave band
334 radiationmodel_2.addRadiationBand("SW");
335 radiationmodel_2.disableEmission("SW");
336 radiationmodel_2.setDiffuseRayCount("SW", Ndiffuse_2);
337 radiationmodel_2.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("SW", 1.f);
338 radiationmodel_2.setScatteringDepth("SW", 0);
339
340 radiationmodel_2.updateGeometry();
341
342 float shortwave_model_0 = 0.f;
343 float shortwave_model_1 = 0.f;
344 float R;
345
346 for (int r = 0; r < Nensemble; r++) {
347 radiationmodel_2.runBand("SW");
348
349 context_2.getPrimitiveData(0, "radiation_flux_SW", R);
350 shortwave_model_0 += R / float(Nensemble);
351 context_2.getPrimitiveData(1, "radiation_flux_SW", R);
352 shortwave_model_1 += R / float(Nensemble);
353 }
354
355 float shortwave_error_0 = fabsf(shortwave_model_0 - shortwave_exact_0) / fabsf(shortwave_exact_0);
356 float shortwave_error_1 = fabsf(shortwave_model_1 - shortwave_exact_1) / fabsf(shortwave_exact_1);
357
358 DOCTEST_CHECK(shortwave_error_0 <= error_threshold);
359 DOCTEST_CHECK(shortwave_error_1 <= error_threshold);
360}
361
362DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Gray Parallel Rectangles") {
363 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
364 float error_threshold = 0.005;
365 int Nensemble = 500;
366 float sigma = 5.6703744E-8;
367
368 uint Ndiffuse_3 = 100000;
369 uint Nscatter_3 = 5;
370
371 float longwave_rho = 0.4;
372 float eps = 0.6f;
373
374 float T0 = 300.f;
375 float T1 = 300.f;
376
377 float a = 1;
378 float b = 2;
379 float c = 0.5;
380
381 float X = a / c;
382 float Y = b / c;
383 float X2 = X * X;
384 float Y2 = Y * Y;
385
386 float F12 =
387 2.0f / float(M_PI * X * Y) * (logf(std::sqrt((1.f + X2) * (1.f + Y2) / (1.f + X2 + Y2))) + X * std::sqrt(1.f + Y2) * atanf(X / std::sqrt(1.f + Y2)) + Y * std::sqrt(1.f + X2) * atanf(Y / std::sqrt(1.f + X2)) - X * atanf(X) - Y * atanf(Y));
388
389 float longwave_exact_0 = (eps * (1.f / eps - 1.f) * F12 * sigma * (powf(T1, 4) - F12 * powf(T0, 4)) + sigma * (powf(T0, 4) - F12 * powf(T1, 4))) / (1.f / eps - (1.f / eps - 1.f) * F12 * eps * (1 / eps - 1) * F12) - eps * sigma * powf(T0, 4);
390 float longwave_exact_1 = fabsf(eps * ((1 / eps - 1) * F12 * (longwave_exact_0 + eps * sigma * powf(T0, 4)) + sigma * (powf(T1, 4) - F12 * powf(T0, 4))) - eps * sigma * powf(T1, 4));
391 longwave_exact_0 = fabsf(longwave_exact_0);
392
393 Context context_3;
394 context_3.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(a, b));
395 context_3.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, c), make_vec2(a, b), make_SphericalCoord(M_PI, 0.f));
396
397 context_3.setPrimitiveData(0, "temperature", T0);
398 context_3.setPrimitiveData(1, "temperature", T1);
399
400 context_3.setPrimitiveData(0, "emissivity_LW", eps);
401 context_3.setPrimitiveData(0, "reflectivity_LW", longwave_rho);
402 context_3.setPrimitiveData(1, "emissivity_LW", eps);
403 context_3.setPrimitiveData(1, "reflectivity_LW", longwave_rho);
404
405 uint flag = 0;
406 context_3.setPrimitiveData(0, "twosided_flag", flag);
407 context_3.setPrimitiveData(1, "twosided_flag", flag);
408
409 RadiationModel radiationmodel_3 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_3);
410 radiationmodel_3.disableMessages();
411
412 // Longwave band
413 radiationmodel_3.addRadiationBand("LW");
414 radiationmodel_3.setDirectRayCount("LW", Ndiffuse_3);
415 radiationmodel_3.setDiffuseRayCount("LW", Ndiffuse_3);
416 radiationmodel_3.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("LW", 0.f);
417 radiationmodel_3.setScatteringDepth("LW", Nscatter_3);
418
419 radiationmodel_3.updateGeometry();
420
421 float longwave_model_0 = 0.f;
422 float longwave_model_1 = 0.f;
423 float R;
424
425 for (int r = 0; r < Nensemble; r++) {
426 radiationmodel_3.runBand("LW");
427
428 context_3.getPrimitiveData(0, "radiation_flux_LW", R);
429 longwave_model_0 += R / float(Nensemble);
430 context_3.getPrimitiveData(1, "radiation_flux_LW", R);
431 longwave_model_1 += R / float(Nensemble);
432 }
433
434 float longwave_error_0 = fabsf(longwave_exact_0 - longwave_model_0) / fabsf(longwave_exact_0);
435 float longwave_error_1 = fabsf(longwave_exact_1 - longwave_model_1) / fabsf(longwave_exact_1);
436
437 DOCTEST_CHECK(longwave_error_0 <= error_threshold);
438 DOCTEST_CHECK(longwave_error_1 <= error_threshold);
439}
440
441DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Sphere Source") {
442 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
443 float error_threshold = 0.005;
444 int Nensemble = 500;
445
446 uint Ndirect_4 = 10000;
447
448 float r = 0.5;
449 float d = 0.75f;
450 float l1 = 1.5f;
451 float l2 = 2.f;
452
453 float D1 = d / l1;
454 float D2 = d / l2;
455
456 float F12 = 0.25f / float(M_PI) * atanf(sqrtf(1.f / (D1 * D1 + D2 * D2 + D1 * D1 * D2 * D2)));
457
458 float shortwave_exact_0 = 4.0f * float(M_PI) * r * r * F12 / (l1 * l2);
459
460 Context context_4;
461 context_4.addPatch(make_vec3(0.5f * l1, 0.5f * l2, 0), make_vec2(l1, l2));
462
463 RadiationModel radiationmodel_4 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_4);
464 radiationmodel_4.disableMessages();
465
466 uint Source_4 = radiationmodel_4.addSphereRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, d), r);
467
468 // Shortwave band
469 radiationmodel_4.addRadiationBand("SW");
470 radiationmodel_4.disableEmission("SW");
471 radiationmodel_4.setDirectRayCount("SW", Ndirect_4);
472 radiationmodel_4.setSourceFlux(Source_4, "SW", 1.f);
473 radiationmodel_4.setScatteringDepth("SW", 0);
474
475 radiationmodel_4.updateGeometry();
476
477 float shortwave_model_0 = 0.f;
478 float R;
479
480 for (int i = 0; i < Nensemble; i++) {
481 radiationmodel_4.runBand("SW");
482
483 context_4.getPrimitiveData(0, "radiation_flux_SW", R);
484 shortwave_model_0 += R / float(Nensemble);
485 }
486
487 float shortwave_error_0 = fabsf(shortwave_exact_0 - shortwave_model_0) / fabsf(shortwave_exact_0);
488
489 DOCTEST_CHECK(shortwave_error_0 <= error_threshold);
490}
491
492DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel 90 Degree Common-Edge Sub-Triangles") {
493 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
494 float error_threshold = 0.005;
495 int Nensemble = 500;
496 float sigma = 5.6703744E-8;
497
498 float Qs = 1000.f;
499
500 uint Ndiffuse_5 = 100000;
501 uint Ndirect_5 = 5000;
502
503 float shortwave_exact_0 = 0.7f * Qs;
504 float shortwave_exact_1 = 0.3f * 0.2f * Qs;
505 float longwave_exact_0 = 0.f;
506 float longwave_exact_1 = sigma * powf(300.f, 4) * 0.2f;
507
508 Context context_5;
509
510 context_5.addTriangle(make_vec3(-0.5, -0.5, 0), make_vec3(0.5, -0.5, 0), make_vec3(0.5, 0.5, 0));
511 context_5.addTriangle(make_vec3(-0.5, -0.5, 0), make_vec3(0.5, 0.5, 0), make_vec3(-0.5, 0.5, 0));
512
513 context_5.addTriangle(make_vec3(0.5, 0.5, 0), make_vec3(0.5, -0.5, 0), make_vec3(0.5, -0.5, 1));
514 context_5.addTriangle(make_vec3(0.5, 0.5, 0), make_vec3(0.5, -0.5, 1), make_vec3(0.5, 0.5, 1));
515
516 context_5.setPrimitiveData(0, "temperature", 300.f);
517 context_5.setPrimitiveData(1, "temperature", 300.f);
518 context_5.setPrimitiveData(2, "temperature", 0.f);
519 context_5.setPrimitiveData(3, "temperature", 0.f);
520
521 float shortwave_rho = 0.3f;
522 context_5.setPrimitiveData(0, "reflectivity_SW", shortwave_rho);
523 context_5.setPrimitiveData(1, "reflectivity_SW", shortwave_rho);
524
525 uint flag = 0;
526 context_5.setPrimitiveData(0, "twosided_flag", flag);
527 context_5.setPrimitiveData(1, "twosided_flag", flag);
528 context_5.setPrimitiveData(2, "twosided_flag", flag);
529 context_5.setPrimitiveData(3, "twosided_flag", flag);
530
531 RadiationModel radiationmodel_5 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_5);
532 radiationmodel_5.disableMessages();
533
534 // Longwave band
535 radiationmodel_5.addRadiationBand("LW");
536 radiationmodel_5.setDirectRayCount("LW", Ndiffuse_5);
537 radiationmodel_5.setDiffuseRayCount("LW", Ndiffuse_5);
538 radiationmodel_5.setScatteringDepth("LW", 0);
539
540 // Shortwave band
541 uint SunSource_5 = radiationmodel_5.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
542 radiationmodel_5.addRadiationBand("SW");
543 radiationmodel_5.disableEmission("SW");
544 radiationmodel_5.setDirectRayCount("SW", Ndirect_5);
545 radiationmodel_5.setDiffuseRayCount("SW", Ndirect_5);
546 radiationmodel_5.setScatteringDepth("SW", 1);
547 radiationmodel_5.setSourceFlux(SunSource_5, "SW", Qs);
548
549 radiationmodel_5.updateGeometry();
550
551 float longwave_model_0 = 0.f;
552 float longwave_model_1 = 0.f;
553 float shortwave_model_0 = 0.f;
554 float shortwave_model_1 = 0.f;
555 float R;
556
557 for (int i = 0; i < Nensemble; i++) {
558 std::vector<std::string> bands{"SW", "LW"};
559 radiationmodel_5.runBand(bands);
560
561 // patch 0 emission
562 context_5.getPrimitiveData(0, "radiation_flux_LW", R);
563 longwave_model_0 += 0.5f * R / float(Nensemble);
564 context_5.getPrimitiveData(1, "radiation_flux_LW", R);
565 longwave_model_0 += 0.5f * R / float(Nensemble);
566 // patch 1 emission
567 context_5.getPrimitiveData(2, "radiation_flux_LW", R);
568 longwave_model_1 += 0.5f * R / float(Nensemble);
569 context_5.getPrimitiveData(3, "radiation_flux_LW", R);
570 longwave_model_1 += 0.5f * R / float(Nensemble);
571
572 // patch 0 shortwave
573 context_5.getPrimitiveData(0, "radiation_flux_SW", R);
574 shortwave_model_0 += 0.5f * R / float(Nensemble);
575 context_5.getPrimitiveData(1, "radiation_flux_SW", R);
576 shortwave_model_0 += 0.5f * R / float(Nensemble);
577 // patch 1 shortwave
578 context_5.getPrimitiveData(2, "radiation_flux_SW", R);
579 shortwave_model_1 += 0.5f * R / float(Nensemble);
580 context_5.getPrimitiveData(3, "radiation_flux_SW", R);
581 shortwave_model_1 += 0.5f * R / float(Nensemble);
582 }
583
584 float shortwave_error_0 = fabsf(shortwave_model_0 - shortwave_exact_0) / fabsf(shortwave_exact_0);
585 float shortwave_error_1 = fabsf(shortwave_model_1 - shortwave_exact_1) / fabsf(shortwave_exact_1);
586 float longwave_error_1 = fabsf(longwave_model_1 - longwave_exact_1) / fabsf(longwave_exact_1);
587
588 DOCTEST_CHECK(shortwave_error_0 <= error_threshold);
589 DOCTEST_CHECK(shortwave_error_1 <= error_threshold);
590 // For zero expected value, check direct equality
591 DOCTEST_CHECK(longwave_model_0 == longwave_exact_0);
592 DOCTEST_CHECK(longwave_error_1 <= error_threshold);
593}
594
595DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Parallel Disks Texture Masked Patches") {
596 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
597 float error_threshold = 0.005;
598 int Nensemble = 500;
599 float sigma = 5.6703744E-8;
600
601 uint Ndirect_6 = 1000;
602 uint Ndiffuse_6 = 500000;
603
604 float shortwave_rho = 0.3;
605
606 float r1 = 1.f;
607 float r2 = 0.5f;
608 float h = 0.75f;
609
610 float A1 = M_PI * r1 * r1;
611 float A2 = M_PI * r2 * r2;
612
613 float R1 = r1 / h;
614 float R2 = r2 / h;
615
616 float X = 1.f + (1.f + R2 * R2) / (R1 * R1);
617 float F12 = 0.5f * (X - std::sqrt(X * X - 4.f * powf(R2 / R1, 2)));
618
619 float shortwave_exact_0 = (A1 - A2) / A1 * (1.f - shortwave_rho);
620 float shortwave_exact_1 = (A1 - A2) / A1 * F12 * A1 / A2 * shortwave_rho;
621 float longwave_exact_0 = sigma * powf(300.f, 4) * F12;
622 float longwave_exact_1 = sigma * powf(300.f, 4) * F12 * A1 / A2;
623
624 Context context_6;
625
626 context_6.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(2.f * r1, 2.f * r1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), "plugins/radiation/disk.png");
627 context_6.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, h), make_vec2(2.f * r2, 2.f * r2), make_SphericalCoord(M_PI, 0), "plugins/radiation/disk.png");
628 context_6.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, h + 0.01f), make_vec2(2.f * r2, 2.f * r2), make_SphericalCoord(M_PI, 0), "plugins/radiation/disk.png");
629
630 context_6.setPrimitiveData(0, "reflectivity_SW", shortwave_rho);
631
632 context_6.setPrimitiveData(0, "temperature", 300.f);
633 context_6.setPrimitiveData(1, "temperature", 300.f);
634
635 uint flag = 0;
636 context_6.setPrimitiveData(0, "twosided_flag", flag);
637 context_6.setPrimitiveData(1, "twosided_flag", flag);
638 context_6.setPrimitiveData(2, "twosided_flag", flag);
639
640 RadiationModel radiationmodel_6 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_6);
641 radiationmodel_6.disableMessages();
642
643 uint SunSource_6 = radiationmodel_6.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
644
645 // Shortwave band
646 radiationmodel_6.addRadiationBand("SW");
647 radiationmodel_6.disableEmission("SW");
648 radiationmodel_6.setDirectRayCount("SW", Ndirect_6);
649 radiationmodel_6.setDiffuseRayCount("SW", Ndiffuse_6);
650 radiationmodel_6.setSourceFlux(SunSource_6, "SW", 1.f);
651 radiationmodel_6.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("SW", 0);
652 radiationmodel_6.setScatteringDepth("SW", 1);
653
654 // Longwave band
655 radiationmodel_6.addRadiationBand("LW");
656 radiationmodel_6.setDiffuseRayCount("LW", Ndiffuse_6);
657 radiationmodel_6.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("LW", 0.f);
658 radiationmodel_6.setScatteringDepth("LW", 0);
659
660 radiationmodel_6.updateGeometry();
661
662 float shortwave_model_0 = 0;
663 float shortwave_model_1 = 0;
664 float longwave_model_0 = 0;
665 float longwave_model_1 = 0;
666 float R;
667
668 for (uint i = 0; i < Nensemble; i++) {
669 radiationmodel_6.runBand("SW");
670 radiationmodel_6.runBand("LW");
671
672 context_6.getPrimitiveData(0, "radiation_flux_SW", R);
673 shortwave_model_0 += R / float(Nensemble);
674
675 context_6.getPrimitiveData(1, "radiation_flux_SW", R);
676 shortwave_model_1 += R / float(Nensemble);
677
678 context_6.getPrimitiveData(0, "radiation_flux_LW", R);
679 longwave_model_0 += R / float(Nensemble);
680
681 context_6.getPrimitiveData(1, "radiation_flux_LW", R);
682 longwave_model_1 += R / float(Nensemble);
683 }
684
685 float shortwave_error_0 = fabsf(shortwave_exact_0 - shortwave_model_0) / fabsf(shortwave_exact_0);
686 float shortwave_error_1 = fabsf(shortwave_exact_1 - shortwave_model_1) / fabsf(shortwave_exact_1);
687 float longwave_error_0 = fabsf(longwave_exact_0 - longwave_model_0) / fabsf(longwave_exact_0);
688 float longwave_error_1 = fabsf(longwave_exact_1 - longwave_model_1) / fabsf(longwave_exact_1);
689
690 DOCTEST_CHECK(shortwave_error_0 <= error_threshold);
691 DOCTEST_CHECK(shortwave_error_1 <= error_threshold);
692 DOCTEST_CHECK(longwave_error_0 <= error_threshold);
693 DOCTEST_CHECK(longwave_error_1 <= error_threshold);
694}
695
696DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Second Law Equilibrium Test") {
697 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
698 float error_threshold = 0.005;
699 float sigma = 5.6703744E-8;
700
701 uint Ndiffuse_7 = 50000;
702
703 float eps1_7 = 0.8f;
704 float eps2_7 = 1.f;
705
706 float T = 300.f;
707
708 Context context_7;
709
710 uint objID_7 = context_7.addBoxObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec3(10, 10, 10), make_int3(5, 5, 5), RGB::black, true);
711 std::vector<uint> UUIDt = context_7.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(objID_7);
712
713 uint flag = 0;
714 context_7.setPrimitiveData(UUIDt, "twosided_flag", flag);
715 context_7.setPrimitiveData(UUIDt, "emissivity_LW", eps1_7);
716 context_7.setPrimitiveData(UUIDt, "reflectivity_LW", 1.f - eps1_7);
717
718 context_7.setPrimitiveData(UUIDt, "temperature", T);
719
720 RadiationModel radiationmodel_7 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_7);
721 radiationmodel_7.disableMessages();
722
723 // Longwave band
724 radiationmodel_7.addRadiationBand("LW");
725 radiationmodel_7.setDiffuseRayCount("LW", Ndiffuse_7);
726 radiationmodel_7.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("LW", 0);
727 radiationmodel_7.setScatteringDepth("LW", 5);
728
729 radiationmodel_7.updateGeometry();
730
731 radiationmodel_7.runBand("LW");
732
733 // Test constant emissivity
734 float flux_err = 0.f;
735 for (int p = 0; p < UUIDt.size(); p++) {
736 float R;
737 context_7.getPrimitiveData(UUIDt.at(p), "radiation_flux_LW", R);
738 flux_err += fabsf(R - eps1_7 * sigma * powf(300, 4)) / (eps1_7 * sigma * powf(300, 4)) / float(UUIDt.size());
739 }
740
741 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux_err <= error_threshold);
742
743 // Test random emissivity distribution
744 for (uint p: UUIDt) {
745 float emissivity;
746 if (context_7.randu() < 0.5f) {
747 emissivity = eps1_7;
748 } else {
749 emissivity = eps2_7;
750 }
751 context_7.setPrimitiveData(p, "emissivity_LW", emissivity);
752 context_7.setPrimitiveData(p, "reflectivity_LW", 1.f - emissivity);
753 }
754
755 radiationmodel_7.updateGeometry();
756 radiationmodel_7.runBand("LW");
757
758 flux_err = 0.f;
759 for (int p = 0; p < UUIDt.size(); p++) {
760 float R;
761 context_7.getPrimitiveData(UUIDt.at(p), "radiation_flux_LW", R);
762 float emissivity;
763 context_7.getPrimitiveData(UUIDt.at(p), "emissivity_LW", emissivity);
764 flux_err += fabsf(R - emissivity * sigma * powf(300, 4)) / (emissivity * sigma * powf(300, 4)) / float(UUIDt.size());
765 }
766
767 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux_err <= error_threshold);
768}
769
770DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Texture Mapping") {
771 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
772 float error_threshold = 0.005;
773
774 Context context_8;
775
776 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_8);
777
778 uint source = radiation.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
779
780 radiation.addRadiationBand("SW");
781
782 radiation.setDirectRayCount("SW", 10000);
783 radiation.disableEmission("SW");
784 radiation.disableMessages();
785
786 radiation.setSourceFlux(source, "SW", 1.f);
787
788 vec2 sz(4, 2);
789
790 vec3 p0(3, 4, 2);
791
792 vec3 p1 = p0 + make_vec3(0, 0, 2.4);
793
794 // 8a: texture-mapped ellipse patch above rectangle
795 uint UUID0 = context_8.addPatch(p0, sz);
796 uint UUID1 = context_8.addPatch(p1, sz, make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), "lib/images/disk_texture.png");
797
798 radiation.updateGeometry();
799
800 radiation.runBand("SW");
801
802 float F0, F1;
803 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID0, "radiation_flux_SW", F0);
804 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID1, "radiation_flux_SW", F1);
805
806 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabs(F0 - (1.f - 0.25f * M_PI)) <= error_threshold);
807 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F1 - 1.f) <= error_threshold);
808
809 // 8b: texture-mapped (u,v) inscribed ellipse tile object above rectangle
810 context_8.deletePrimitive(UUID1);
811
812 uint objID_8 = context_8.addTileObject(p1, sz, make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(5, 4), "lib/images/disk_texture.png");
813 std::vector<uint> UUIDs1 = context_8.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(objID_8);
814
815 radiation.updateGeometry();
816
817 radiation.runBand("SW");
818
819 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID0, "radiation_flux_SW", F0);
820
821 F1 = 0;
822 float A = 0;
823 for (uint p: UUIDs1) {
824
825 float area = context_8.getPrimitiveArea(p);
826 A += area;
827
828 float Rflux;
829 context_8.getPrimitiveData(p, "radiation_flux_SW", Rflux);
830 F1 += Rflux * area;
831 }
832 F1 = F1 / A;
833
834 bool test_8b_pass = true;
835 for (uint p = 0; p < UUIDs1.size(); p++) {
836 float R;
837 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUIDs1.at(p), "radiation_flux_SW", R);
838 if (fabs(R - 1.f) > error_threshold) {
839 test_8b_pass = false;
840 }
841 }
842
843 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabs(F0 - (1.f - 0.25f * M_PI)) <= error_threshold);
844 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F1 - 1.f) <= error_threshold);
845 DOCTEST_CHECK(test_8b_pass);
846
847 context_8.deleteObject(objID_8);
848
849 // 8c: texture-mapped (u,v) inscribed ellipse patch above rectangle
850 UUID1 = context_8.addPatch(p1, sz, make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), "lib/images/disk_texture.png", make_vec2(0.5, 0.5), make_vec2(0.5, 0.5));
851
852 radiation.updateGeometry();
853
854 radiation.runBand("SW");
855
856 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID0, "radiation_flux_SW", F0);
857 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID1, "radiation_flux_SW", F1);
858
859 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F0) <= error_threshold);
860 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F1 - 1.f) <= error_threshold);
861
862 // 8d: texture-mapped (u,v) quarter ellipse patch above rectangle
863 context_8.deletePrimitive(UUID1);
864
865 UUID1 = context_8.addPatch(p1, sz, make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), "lib/images/disk_texture.png", make_vec2(0.5, 0.5), make_vec2(1, 1));
866
867 radiation.updateGeometry();
868
869 radiation.runBand("SW");
870
871 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID0, "radiation_flux_SW", F0);
872 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID1, "radiation_flux_SW", F1);
873
874 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabs(F0 - (1.f - 0.25f * M_PI)) <= error_threshold);
875 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F1 - 1.f) <= error_threshold);
876
877 // 8e: texture-mapped (u,v) half ellipse triangle above rectangle
878 context_8.deletePrimitive(UUID1);
879
880 UUID1 = context_8.addTriangle(p1 + make_vec3(-0.5f * sz.x, -0.5f * sz.y, 0), p1 + make_vec3(0.5f * sz.x, 0.5f * sz.y, 0.f), p1 + make_vec3(-0.5f * sz.x, 0.5f * sz.y, 0.f), "lib/images/disk_texture.png", make_vec2(0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1),
881 make_vec2(0, 1));
882
883 radiation.updateGeometry();
884
885 radiation.runBand("SW");
886
887 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID0, "radiation_flux_SW", F0);
888 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID1, "radiation_flux_SW", F1);
889
890 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabs(F0 - 0.5 - 0.5 * (1.f - 0.25f * M_PI)) <= error_threshold);
891 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F1 - 1.f) <= error_threshold);
892
893 // 8f: texture-mapped (u,v) two ellipse triangles above ellipse patch
894 context_8.deletePrimitive(UUID0);
895
896 UUID0 = context_8.addPatch(p0, sz, make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), "lib/images/disk_texture.png");
897
898 uint UUID2 = context_8.addTriangle(p1 + make_vec3(-0.5f * sz.x, -0.5f * sz.y, 0), p1 + make_vec3(0.5f * sz.x, -0.5f * sz.y, 0), p1 + make_vec3(0.5f * sz.x, 0.5f * sz.y, 0), "lib/images/disk_texture.png", make_vec2(0, 0), make_vec2(1, 0),
899 make_vec2(1, 1));
900
901 radiation.updateGeometry();
902
903 radiation.runBand("SW");
904
905 float F2;
906 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID0, "radiation_flux_SW", F0);
907 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID1, "radiation_flux_SW", F1);
908 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID2, "radiation_flux_SW", F2);
909
910 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F0) <= error_threshold);
911 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F1 - 1.f) <= error_threshold);
912 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F2 - 1.f) <= error_threshold);
913
914 // 8g: texture-mapped (u,v) ellipse patch above two ellipse triangles
915 context_8.deletePrimitive(UUID0);
916 context_8.deletePrimitive(UUID1);
917 context_8.deletePrimitive(UUID2);
918
919 UUID0 = context_8.addPatch(p1, sz, make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), "lib/images/disk_texture.png");
920
921 UUID1 = context_8.addTriangle(p0 + make_vec3(-0.5f * sz.x, -0.5f * sz.y, 0), p0 + make_vec3(0.5f * sz.x, 0.5f * sz.y, 0), p0 + make_vec3(-0.5f * sz.x, 0.5f * sz.y, 0), "lib/images/disk_texture.png", make_vec2(0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1),
922 make_vec2(0, 1));
923 UUID2 = context_8.addTriangle(p0 + make_vec3(-0.5f * sz.x, -0.5f * sz.y, 0), p0 + make_vec3(0.5f * sz.x, -0.5f * sz.y, 0), p0 + make_vec3(0.5f * sz.x, 0.5f * sz.y, 0), "lib/images/disk_texture.png", make_vec2(0, 0), make_vec2(1, 0),
924 make_vec2(1, 1));
925
926 radiation.updateGeometry();
927
928 radiation.runBand("SW");
929
930 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID0, "radiation_flux_SW", F0);
931 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID1, "radiation_flux_SW", F1);
932 context_8.getPrimitiveData(UUID2, "radiation_flux_SW", F2);
933
934 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F1) <= error_threshold);
935 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F2) <= error_threshold);
936 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(F0 - 1.f) <= error_threshold);
937}
938
939DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Homogeneous Canopy of Patches") {
940 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
941 float error_threshold = 0.005;
942 float sigma = 5.6703744E-8;
943
944 uint Ndirect_9 = 1000;
945 uint Ndiffuse_9 = 5000;
946
947 float D_9 = 50; // domain width
948 float D_inc_9 = 40; // domain size to include in calculations
949 float LAI_9 = 2.0; // canopy leaf area index
950 float h_9 = 3; // canopy height
951 float w_leaf_9 = 0.075; // leaf width
952
953 int Nleaves = (int) lroundf(LAI_9 * D_9 * D_9 / w_leaf_9 / w_leaf_9);
954
955 Context context_9;
956
957 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_leaf, UUIDs_inc;
958
959 for (int i = 0; i < Nleaves; i++) {
960 vec3 position((-0.5f + context_9.randu()) * D_9, (-0.5f + context_9.randu()) * D_9, 0.5f * w_leaf_9 + context_9.randu() * h_9);
961 SphericalCoord rotation(1.f, acos_safe(1.f - context_9.randu()), 2.f * float(M_PI) * context_9.randu());
962 uint UUID = context_9.addPatch(position, make_vec2(w_leaf_9, w_leaf_9), rotation);
963 context_9.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "twosided_flag", uint(1));
964 if (fabsf(position.x) <= 0.5 * D_inc_9 && fabsf(position.y) <= 0.5 * D_inc_9) {
965 UUIDs_inc.push_back(UUID);
966 }
967 }
968
969 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_ground = context_9.addTile(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(D_9, D_9), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(100, 100));
970 context_9.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_ground, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
971
972 RadiationModel radiation_9 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_9);
973 radiation_9.disableMessages();
974
975 radiation_9.addRadiationBand("direct");
976 radiation_9.disableEmission("direct");
977 radiation_9.setDirectRayCount("direct", Ndirect_9);
978 float theta_s = 0.2 * M_PI;
979 uint ID = radiation_9.addSunSphereRadiationSource(make_SphericalCoord(0.5f * float(M_PI) - theta_s, 0.f));
980 radiation_9.setSourceFlux(ID, "direct", 1.f / cosf(theta_s));
981
982 radiation_9.addRadiationBand("diffuse");
983 radiation_9.disableEmission("diffuse");
984 radiation_9.setDiffuseRayCount("diffuse", Ndiffuse_9);
985 radiation_9.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("diffuse", 1.f);
986
987 radiation_9.updateGeometry();
988
989 radiation_9.runBand("direct");
990 radiation_9.runBand("diffuse");
991
992 float intercepted_leaf_direct = 0.f;
993 float intercepted_leaf_diffuse = 0.f;
994 for (uint i: UUIDs_inc) {
995 float area = context_9.getPrimitiveArea(i);
996 float flux;
997 context_9.getPrimitiveData(i, "radiation_flux_direct", flux);
998 intercepted_leaf_direct += flux * area / D_inc_9 / D_inc_9;
999 context_9.getPrimitiveData(i, "radiation_flux_diffuse", flux);
1000 intercepted_leaf_diffuse += flux * area / D_inc_9 / D_inc_9;
1001 }
1002
1003 float intercepted_ground_direct = 0.f;
1004 float intercepted_ground_diffuse = 0.f;
1005 for (uint i: UUIDs_ground) {
1006 float area = context_9.getPrimitiveArea(i);
1007 float flux_dir;
1008 context_9.getPrimitiveData(i, "radiation_flux_direct", flux_dir);
1009 float flux_diff;
1010 context_9.getPrimitiveData(i, "radiation_flux_diffuse", flux_diff);
1011 vec3 position = context_9.getPatchCenter(i);
1012 if (fabsf(position.x) <= 0.5 * D_inc_9 && fabsf(position.y) <= 0.5 * D_inc_9) {
1013 intercepted_ground_direct += flux_dir * area / D_inc_9 / D_inc_9;
1014 intercepted_ground_diffuse += flux_diff * area / D_inc_9 / D_inc_9;
1015 }
1016 }
1017
1018 intercepted_ground_direct = 1.f - intercepted_ground_direct;
1019 intercepted_ground_diffuse = 1.f - intercepted_ground_diffuse;
1020
1021 int N = 50;
1022 float dtheta = 0.5f * float(M_PI) / float(N);
1023
1024 float intercepted_theoretical_diffuse = 0.f;
1025 for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
1026 float theta = (float(i) + 0.5f) * dtheta;
1027 intercepted_theoretical_diffuse += 2.f * (1.f - expf(-0.5f * LAI_9 / cosf(theta))) * cosf(theta) * sinf(theta) * dtheta;
1028 }
1029
1030 float intercepted_theoretical_direct = 1.f - expf(-0.5f * LAI_9 / cosf(theta_s));
1031
1032 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_ground_direct - intercepted_theoretical_direct) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1033 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_leaf_direct - intercepted_theoretical_direct) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1034 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_ground_diffuse - intercepted_theoretical_diffuse) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1035 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_leaf_diffuse - intercepted_theoretical_diffuse) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1036}
1037
1038DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Gas-filled Furnace") {
1039 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1040 float error_threshold = 0.005;
1041 float sigma = 5.6703744E-8;
1042
1043 float Rref_10 = 33000.f;
1044 uint Ndiffuse_10 = 10000;
1045
1046 float w_10 = 1.f; // width of box (y-dir)
1047 float h_10 = 1.f; // height of box (z-dir)
1048 float d_10 = 3.f; // depth of box (x-dir)
1049
1050 float Tw_10 = 1273.f; // temperature of walls (K)
1051 float Tm_10 = 1773.f; // temperature of medium (K)
1052
1053 float kappa_10 = 0.1f; // attenuation coefficient of medium (1/m)
1054 float eps_m_10 = 1.f; // emissivity of medium
1055 float w_patch_10 = 0.01;
1056
1057 int Npatches_10 = (int) lroundf(2.f * kappa_10 * w_10 * h_10 * d_10 / w_patch_10 / w_patch_10);
1058
1059 Context context_10;
1060
1061 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_box = context_10.addBox(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec3(d_10, w_10, h_10), make_int3(round(d_10 / w_patch_10), round(w_10 / w_patch_10), round(h_10 / w_patch_10)), RGB::green, true);
1062
1063 context_10.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_box, "temperature", Tw_10);
1064 context_10.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_box, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
1065
1066 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_patches;
1067
1068 for (int i = 0; i < Npatches_10; i++) {
1069 float x = -0.5f * d_10 + 0.5f * w_patch_10 + (d_10 - 2 * w_patch_10) * context_10.randu();
1070 float y = -0.5f * w_10 + 0.5f * w_patch_10 + (w_10 - 2 * w_patch_10) * context_10.randu();
1071 float z = -0.5f * h_10 + 0.5f * w_patch_10 + (h_10 - 2 * w_patch_10) * context_10.randu();
1072
1073 float theta = acosf(1.f - context_10.randu());
1074 float phi = 2.f * float(M_PI) * context_10.randu();
1075
1076 UUIDs_patches.push_back(context_10.addPatch(make_vec3(x, y, z), make_vec2(w_patch_10, w_patch_10), make_SphericalCoord(theta, phi)));
1077 }
1078 context_10.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_patches, "temperature", Tm_10);
1079 context_10.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_patches, "emissivity_LW", eps_m_10);
1080 context_10.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_patches, "reflectivity_LW", 1.f - eps_m_10);
1081
1082 RadiationModel radiation_10 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_10);
1083 radiation_10.disableMessages();
1084
1085 radiation_10.addRadiationBand("LW");
1086 radiation_10.setDiffuseRayCount("LW", Ndiffuse_10);
1087 radiation_10.setScatteringDepth("LW", 0);
1088
1089 radiation_10.updateGeometry();
1090 radiation_10.runBand("LW");
1091
1092 float R_wall = 0;
1093 float A_wall = 0.f;
1094 for (uint i: UUIDs_box) {
1095 float area = context_10.getPrimitiveArea(i);
1096 float flux;
1097 context_10.getPrimitiveData(i, "radiation_flux_LW", flux);
1098 A_wall += area;
1099 R_wall += flux * area;
1100 }
1101 R_wall = R_wall / A_wall - sigma * powf(Tw_10, 4);
1102
1103 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(R_wall - Rref_10) / Rref_10 <= error_threshold);
1104}
1105
1106DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Purely Scattering Medium Between Infinite Plates") {
1107 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1108 float error_threshold = 0.005;
1109 float sigma = 5.6703744E-8;
1110
1111 float W_11 = 10.f; // width of entire slab in x and y directions
1112 float w_11 = 5.f; // width of slab to be considered in calculations
1113 float h_11 = 1.f; // height of slab
1114
1115 float Tw1_11 = 300.f; // temperature of upper wall (K)
1116 float Tw2_11 = 400.f; // temperature of lower wall (K)
1117
1118 float epsw1_11 = 0.8f; // emissivity of upper wall
1119 float epsw2_11 = 0.5f; // emissivity of lower wall
1120
1121 float omega_11 = 1.f; // single-scatter albedo
1122 float tauL_11 = 0.1f; // optical depth of slab
1123
1124 float Psi2_exact = 0.427; // exact non-dimensional heat flux of lower plate
1125
1126 float w_patch_11 = 0.05; // width of medium patches
1127
1128 float beta = tauL_11 / h_11; // attenuation coefficient
1129
1130 int Nleaves_11 = (int) lroundf(2.f * beta * W_11 * W_11 * h_11 / w_patch_11 / w_patch_11);
1131
1132 Context context_11;
1133
1134 // top wall
1135 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_1 = context_11.addTile(make_vec3(0, 0, 0.5f * h_11), make_vec2(W_11, W_11), make_SphericalCoord(M_PI, 0), make_int2(round(W_11 / w_patch_11 / 5), round(W_11 / w_patch_11 / 5)));
1136
1137 // bottom wall
1138 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_2 = context_11.addTile(make_vec3(0, 0, -0.5f * h_11), make_vec2(W_11, W_11), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(round(W_11 / w_patch_11 / 5), round(W_11 / w_patch_11 / 5)));
1139
1140 context_11.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_1, "temperature", Tw1_11);
1141 context_11.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_2, "temperature", Tw2_11);
1142 context_11.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_1, "emissivity_LW", epsw1_11);
1143 context_11.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_2, "emissivity_LW", epsw2_11);
1144 context_11.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_1, "reflectivity_LW", 1.f - epsw1_11);
1145 context_11.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_2, "reflectivity_LW", 1.f - epsw2_11);
1146 context_11.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_1, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
1147 context_11.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_2, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
1148
1149 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_patches_11;
1150
1151 for (int i = 0; i < Nleaves_11; i++) {
1152 float x = -0.5f * W_11 + 0.5f * w_patch_11 + (W_11 - w_patch_11) * context_11.randu();
1153 float y = -0.5f * W_11 + 0.5f * w_patch_11 + (W_11 - w_patch_11) * context_11.randu();
1154 float z = -0.5f * h_11 + 0.5f * w_patch_11 + (h_11 - w_patch_11) * context_11.randu();
1155
1156 float theta = acosf(1.f - context_11.randu());
1157 float phi = 2.f * float(M_PI) * context_11.randu();
1158
1159 UUIDs_patches_11.push_back(context_11.addPatch(make_vec3(x, y, z), make_vec2(w_patch_11, w_patch_11), make_SphericalCoord(theta, phi)));
1160 }
1161 context_11.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_patches_11, "temperature", 0.f);
1162 context_11.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_patches_11, "emissivity_LW", 1.f - omega_11);
1163 context_11.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_patches_11, "reflectivity_LW", omega_11);
1164
1165 RadiationModel radiation_11 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_11);
1166 radiation_11.disableMessages();
1167
1168 radiation_11.addRadiationBand("LW");
1169 radiation_11.setDiffuseRayCount("LW", 10000);
1170 radiation_11.setScatteringDepth("LW", 4);
1171
1172 radiation_11.updateGeometry();
1173 radiation_11.runBand("LW");
1174
1175 float R_wall2 = 0;
1176 float A_wall2 = 0.f;
1177 for (int i = 0; i < UUIDs_1.size(); i++) {
1178 vec3 position = context_11.getPatchCenter(UUIDs_1.at(i));
1179
1180 if (fabsf(position.x) < 0.5 * w_11 && fabsf(position.y) < 0.5 * w_11) {
1181 float area = context_11.getPrimitiveArea(UUIDs_1.at(i));
1182
1183 float flux;
1184 context_11.getPrimitiveData(UUIDs_2.at(i), "radiation_flux_LW", flux);
1185 R_wall2 += flux * area;
1186
1187 A_wall2 += area;
1188 }
1189 }
1190 R_wall2 = (R_wall2 / A_wall2 - epsw2_11 * sigma * pow(Tw2_11, 4)) / (sigma * (pow(Tw1_11, 4) - pow(Tw2_11, 4)));
1191
1192 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(R_wall2 - Psi2_exact) <= 10.f * error_threshold);
1193}
1194
1195DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Homogeneous Canopy with Periodic Boundaries") {
1196 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1197 float error_threshold = 0.005;
1198
1199 uint Ndirect_12 = 1000;
1200 uint Ndiffuse_12 = 5000;
1201
1202 float D_12 = 20; // domain width
1203 float LAI_12 = 2.0; // canopy leaf area index
1204 float h_12 = 3; // canopy height
1205 float w_leaf_12 = 0.05; // leaf width
1206
1207 int Nleaves_12 = round(LAI_12 * D_12 * D_12 / w_leaf_12 / w_leaf_12);
1208
1209 Context context_12;
1210
1211 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_leaf_12;
1212
1213 for (int i = 0; i < Nleaves_12; i++) {
1214 vec3 position((-0.5 + context_12.randu()) * D_12, (-0.5 + context_12.randu()) * D_12, 0.5 * w_leaf_12 + context_12.randu() * h_12);
1215 SphericalCoord rotation(1.f, acos(1.f - context_12.randu()), 2.f * M_PI * context_12.randu());
1216 uint UUID = context_12.addPatch(position, make_vec2(w_leaf_12, w_leaf_12), rotation);
1217 context_12.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "twosided_flag", uint(1));
1218 UUIDs_leaf_12.push_back(UUID);
1219 }
1220
1221 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_ground_12 = context_12.addTile(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(D_12, D_12), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(100, 100));
1222 context_12.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_ground_12, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
1223
1224 RadiationModel radiation_12 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_12);
1225 radiation_12.disableMessages();
1226
1227 radiation_12.addRadiationBand("direct");
1228 radiation_12.disableEmission("direct");
1229 radiation_12.setDirectRayCount("direct", Ndirect_12);
1230 float theta_s = 0.2 * M_PI;
1231 uint ID = radiation_12.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_SphericalCoord(0.5 * M_PI - theta_s, 0.f));
1232 radiation_12.setSourceFlux(ID, "direct", 1.f / cos(theta_s));
1233
1234 radiation_12.addRadiationBand("diffuse");
1235 radiation_12.disableEmission("diffuse");
1236 radiation_12.setDiffuseRayCount("diffuse", Ndiffuse_12);
1237 radiation_12.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("diffuse", 1.f);
1238
1239 radiation_12.enforcePeriodicBoundary("xy");
1240
1241 radiation_12.updateGeometry();
1242
1243 radiation_12.runBand("direct");
1244 radiation_12.runBand("diffuse");
1245
1246 float intercepted_leaf_direct_12 = 0.f;
1247 float intercepted_leaf_diffuse_12 = 0.f;
1248 for (int i = 0; i < UUIDs_leaf_12.size(); i++) {
1249 float area = context_12.getPrimitiveArea(UUIDs_leaf_12.at(i));
1250 float flux;
1251 context_12.getPrimitiveData(UUIDs_leaf_12.at(i), "radiation_flux_direct", flux);
1252 intercepted_leaf_direct_12 += flux * area / D_12 / D_12;
1253 context_12.getPrimitiveData(UUIDs_leaf_12.at(i), "radiation_flux_diffuse", flux);
1254 intercepted_leaf_diffuse_12 += flux * area / D_12 / D_12;
1255 }
1256
1257 float intercepted_ground_direct_12 = 0.f;
1258 float intercepted_ground_diffuse_12 = 0.f;
1259 for (int i = 0; i < UUIDs_ground_12.size(); i++) {
1260 float area = context_12.getPrimitiveArea(UUIDs_ground_12.at(i));
1261 float flux_dir;
1262 context_12.getPrimitiveData(UUIDs_ground_12.at(i), "radiation_flux_direct", flux_dir);
1263 float flux_diff;
1264 context_12.getPrimitiveData(UUIDs_ground_12.at(i), "radiation_flux_diffuse", flux_diff);
1265 vec3 position = context_12.getPatchCenter(UUIDs_ground_12.at(i));
1266 intercepted_ground_direct_12 += flux_dir * area / D_12 / D_12;
1267 intercepted_ground_diffuse_12 += flux_diff * area / D_12 / D_12;
1268 }
1269
1270 intercepted_ground_direct_12 = 1.f - intercepted_ground_direct_12;
1271 intercepted_ground_diffuse_12 = 1.f - intercepted_ground_diffuse_12;
1272
1273 int N = 50;
1274 float dtheta = 0.5 * M_PI / float(N);
1275
1276 float intercepted_theoretical_diffuse_12 = 0.f;
1277 for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
1278 float theta = (i + 0.5f) * dtheta;
1279 intercepted_theoretical_diffuse_12 += 2.f * (1.f - exp(-0.5 * LAI_12 / cos(theta))) * cos(theta) * sin(theta) * dtheta;
1280 }
1281
1282 float intercepted_theoretical_direct_12 = 1.f - exp(-0.5 * LAI_12 / cos(theta_s));
1283
1284 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_ground_direct_12 - intercepted_theoretical_direct_12) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1285 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_leaf_direct_12 - intercepted_theoretical_direct_12) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1286 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_ground_diffuse_12 - intercepted_theoretical_diffuse_12) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1287 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_leaf_diffuse_12 - intercepted_theoretical_diffuse_12) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1288}
1289
1290DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Texture-masked Tile Objects with Periodic Boundaries") {
1291 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1292 float error_threshold = 0.005;
1293
1294 uint Ndirect_13 = 1000;
1295 uint Ndiffuse_13 = 5000;
1296
1297 float D_13 = 20; // domain width
1298 float LAI_13 = 1.0; // canopy leaf area index
1299 float h_13 = 3; // canopy height
1300 float w_leaf_13 = 0.05; // leaf width
1301
1302 Context context_13;
1303
1304 uint objID_ptype = context_13.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(w_leaf_13, w_leaf_13), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2), "plugins/radiation/disk.png");
1305 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_ptype = context_13.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(objID_ptype);
1306
1307 float A_leaf = 0;
1308 for (uint p = 0; p < UUIDs_ptype.size(); p++) {
1309 A_leaf += context_13.getPrimitiveArea(UUIDs_ptype.at(p));
1310 }
1311
1312 int Nleaves_13 = round(LAI_13 * D_13 * D_13 / A_leaf);
1313
1314 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_leaf_13;
1315
1316 for (int i = 0; i < Nleaves_13; i++) {
1317 vec3 position((-0.5 + context_13.randu()) * D_13, (-0.5 + context_13.randu()) * D_13, 0.5 * w_leaf_13 + context_13.randu() * h_13);
1318 SphericalCoord rotation(1.f, acos(1.f - context_13.randu()), 2.f * M_PI * context_13.randu());
1319
1320 uint objID = context_13.copyObject(objID_ptype);
1321
1322 context_13.rotateObject(objID, -rotation.elevation, "y");
1323 context_13.rotateObject(objID, rotation.azimuth, "z");
1324 context_13.translateObject(objID, position);
1325
1326 std::vector<uint> UUIDs = context_13.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(objID);
1327 UUIDs_leaf_13.insert(UUIDs_leaf_13.end(), UUIDs.begin(), UUIDs.end());
1328 }
1329
1330 context_13.deleteObject(objID_ptype);
1331
1332 std::vector<uint> UUIDs_ground_13 = context_13.addTile(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(D_13, D_13), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(100, 100));
1333 context_13.setPrimitiveData(UUIDs_ground_13, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
1334
1335 RadiationModel radiation_13 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_13);
1336 radiation_13.disableMessages();
1337
1338 radiation_13.addRadiationBand("direct");
1339 radiation_13.disableEmission("direct");
1340 radiation_13.setDirectRayCount("direct", Ndirect_13);
1341 float theta_s = 0.2 * M_PI;
1342 uint ID = radiation_13.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_SphericalCoord(0.5 * M_PI - theta_s, 0.f));
1343 radiation_13.setSourceFlux(ID, "direct", 1.f / cos(theta_s));
1344
1345 radiation_13.addRadiationBand("diffuse");
1346 radiation_13.disableEmission("diffuse");
1347 radiation_13.setDiffuseRayCount("diffuse", Ndiffuse_13);
1348 radiation_13.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("diffuse", 1.f);
1349
1350 radiation_13.enforcePeriodicBoundary("xy");
1351
1352 radiation_13.updateGeometry();
1353
1354 radiation_13.runBand("direct");
1355 radiation_13.runBand("diffuse");
1356
1357 float intercepted_leaf_direct_13 = 0.f;
1358 float intercepted_leaf_diffuse_13 = 0.f;
1359 for (int i = 0; i < UUIDs_leaf_13.size(); i++) {
1360 float area = context_13.getPrimitiveArea(UUIDs_leaf_13.at(i));
1361 float flux;
1362 context_13.getPrimitiveData(UUIDs_leaf_13.at(i), "radiation_flux_direct", flux);
1363 intercepted_leaf_direct_13 += flux * area / D_13 / D_13;
1364 context_13.getPrimitiveData(UUIDs_leaf_13.at(i), "radiation_flux_diffuse", flux);
1365 intercepted_leaf_diffuse_13 += flux * area / D_13 / D_13;
1366 }
1367
1368 float intercepted_ground_direct_13 = 0.f;
1369 float intercepted_ground_diffuse_13 = 0.f;
1370 for (int i = 0; i < UUIDs_ground_13.size(); i++) {
1371 float area = context_13.getPrimitiveArea(UUIDs_ground_13.at(i));
1372 float flux_dir;
1373 context_13.getPrimitiveData(UUIDs_ground_13.at(i), "radiation_flux_direct", flux_dir);
1374 float flux_diff;
1375 context_13.getPrimitiveData(UUIDs_ground_13.at(i), "radiation_flux_diffuse", flux_diff);
1376 vec3 position = context_13.getPatchCenter(UUIDs_ground_13.at(i));
1377 intercepted_ground_direct_13 += flux_dir * area / D_13 / D_13;
1378 intercepted_ground_diffuse_13 += flux_diff * area / D_13 / D_13;
1379 }
1380
1381 intercepted_ground_direct_13 = 1.f - intercepted_ground_direct_13;
1382 intercepted_ground_diffuse_13 = 1.f - intercepted_ground_diffuse_13;
1383
1384 int N = 50;
1385 float dtheta = 0.5 * M_PI / float(N);
1386
1387 float intercepted_theoretical_diffuse_13 = 0.f;
1388 for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
1389 float theta = (i + 0.5f) * dtheta;
1390 intercepted_theoretical_diffuse_13 += 2.f * (1.f - exp(-0.5 * LAI_13 / cos(theta))) * cos(theta) * sin(theta) * dtheta;
1391 }
1392
1393 float intercepted_theoretical_direct_13 = 1.f - exp(-0.5 * LAI_13 / cos(theta_s));
1394
1395 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_ground_direct_13 - intercepted_theoretical_direct_13) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1396 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_leaf_direct_13 - intercepted_theoretical_direct_13) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1397 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_ground_diffuse_13 - intercepted_theoretical_diffuse_13) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1398 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(intercepted_leaf_diffuse_13 - intercepted_theoretical_diffuse_13) <= 4.f * error_threshold);
1399}
1400
1401DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Anisotropic Diffuse Radiation Horizontal Patch") {
1402 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1403 float error_threshold = 0.005;
1404
1405 uint Ndiffuse_14 = 50000;
1406
1407 Context context_14;
1408
1409 std::vector<float> K_14;
1410 K_14.push_back(0.f);
1411 K_14.push_back(0.25f);
1412 K_14.push_back(1.f);
1413
1414 std::vector<float> thetas_14;
1415 thetas_14.push_back(0.f);
1416 thetas_14.push_back(0.25 * M_PI);
1417
1418 uint UUID_14 = context_14.addPatch();
1419 context_14.setPrimitiveData(UUID_14, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
1420
1421 RadiationModel radiation_14 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_14);
1422 radiation_14.disableMessages();
1423
1424 radiation_14.addRadiationBand("diffuse");
1425 radiation_14.disableEmission("diffuse");
1426 radiation_14.setDiffuseRayCount("diffuse", Ndiffuse_14);
1427 radiation_14.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("diffuse", 1.f);
1428
1429 radiation_14.updateGeometry();
1430
1431 for (int t = 0; t < thetas_14.size(); t++) {
1432 for (int k = 0; k < K_14.size(); k++) {
1433 radiation_14.setDiffuseRadiationExtinctionCoeff("diffuse", K_14.at(k), make_SphericalCoord(0.5 * M_PI - thetas_14.at(t), 0.f));
1434 radiation_14.runBand("diffuse");
1435
1436 float Rdiff;
1437 context_14.getPrimitiveData(UUID_14, "radiation_flux_diffuse", Rdiff);
1438
1439 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(Rdiff - 1.f) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1440 }
1441 }
1442}
1443
1444DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Prague Sky Diffuse Radiation Normalization") {
1445 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1446 float error_threshold = 0.015;
1447
1448 uint Ndiffuse_prague = 100000;
1449
1450 Context context_prague;
1451
1452 // Simulate Prague parameters in Context (as set by SolarPosition plugin)
1453 // Test with different atmospheric conditions to verify normalization works correctly
1454
1455 std::vector<std::vector<float>> prague_test_conditions;
1456
1457 // Condition 1: Clear sky, moderate circumsolar
1458 std::vector<float> clear_sky;
1459 clear_sky.push_back(3.0f); // circumsolar strength
1460 clear_sky.push_back(15.0f); // circumsolar width (degrees)
1461 clear_sky.push_back(1.5f); // horizon brightness
1462 prague_test_conditions.push_back(clear_sky);
1463
1464 // Condition 2: Turbid sky, strong circumsolar
1465 std::vector<float> turbid_sky;
1466 turbid_sky.push_back(8.0f); // circumsolar strength
1467 turbid_sky.push_back(10.0f); // circumsolar width (degrees)
1468 turbid_sky.push_back(2.5f); // horizon brightness
1469 prague_test_conditions.push_back(turbid_sky);
1470
1471 // Condition 3: Overcast sky, weak circumsolar
1472 std::vector<float> overcast_sky;
1473 overcast_sky.push_back(0.5f); // circumsolar strength
1474 overcast_sky.push_back(30.0f); // circumsolar width (degrees)
1475 overcast_sky.push_back(1.2f); // horizon brightness
1476 prague_test_conditions.push_back(overcast_sky);
1477
1478 uint UUID_prague = context_prague.addPatch();
1479 context_prague.setPrimitiveData(UUID_prague, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
1480
1481 RadiationModel radiation_prague = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_prague);
1482 radiation_prague.disableMessages();
1483
1484 radiation_prague.addRadiationBand("diffuse");
1485 radiation_prague.disableEmission("diffuse");
1486 radiation_prague.setDiffuseRayCount("diffuse", Ndiffuse_prague);
1487
1488 // Set diffuse flux to 1.0 - this is what we expect to receive regardless of angular distribution
1489 radiation_prague.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("diffuse", 1.f);
1490
1491 // Set diffuse spectrum for spectral integration
1492 std::vector<helios::vec2> diffuse_spectrum_prague = {{400, 1.0}, {550, 1.0}, {700, 1.0}};
1493 context_prague.setGlobalData("prague_test_diffuse_spectrum", diffuse_spectrum_prague);
1494 radiation_prague.setDiffuseSpectrum("prague_test_diffuse_spectrum");
1495
1496 radiation_prague.updateGeometry();
1497
1498 // Set Prague data as valid
1499 context_prague.setGlobalData("prague_sky_valid", 1);
1500 context_prague.setGlobalData("prague_sky_sun_direction", make_vec3(0, 0.5f, 0.866f)); // 60° elevation
1501 context_prague.setGlobalData("prague_sky_visibility_km", 50.0f);
1502 context_prague.setGlobalData("prague_sky_ground_albedo", 0.2f);
1503
1504 for (size_t cond = 0; cond < prague_test_conditions.size(); cond++) {
1505 float circ_str = prague_test_conditions[cond][0];
1506 float circ_width = prague_test_conditions[cond][1];
1507 float horiz_bright = prague_test_conditions[cond][2];
1508
1509 // Compute normalization factor (same logic as in RadiationModel::computeAngularNormalization)
1510 const int N = 50;
1511 float integral = 0.0f;
1512 helios::vec3 sun_dir = make_vec3(0, 0, 1); // Sun at zenith for normalization
1513 for (int j = 0; j < N; ++j) {
1514 for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
1515 float theta = 0.5f * M_PI * (i + 0.5f) / N;
1516 float phi = 2.0f * M_PI * (j + 0.5f) / N;
1517 helios::vec3 dir = sphere2cart(make_SphericalCoord(0.5f * M_PI - theta, phi));
1518
1519 // Angular distance from sun (degrees)
1520 float cos_gamma = std::max(-1.0f, std::min(1.0f, dir.x * sun_dir.x + dir.y * sun_dir.y + dir.z * sun_dir.z));
1521 float gamma = std::acos(cos_gamma) * 180.0f / M_PI;
1522
1523 // Compute angular pattern (same as GPU)
1524 float cos_theta = std::max(0.0f, dir.z);
1525 float horizon_term = 1.0f + (horiz_bright - 1.0f) * (1.0f - cos_theta);
1526 float circ_term = 1.0f + circ_str * std::exp(-gamma / circ_width);
1527 float pattern = circ_term * horizon_term;
1528
1529 integral += pattern * std::cos(theta) * std::sin(theta) * (M_PI / (2.0f * N)) * (2.0f * M_PI / N);
1530 }
1531 }
1532 float normalization = 1.0f / std::max(integral, 1e-10f);
1533
1534 // Create minimal Prague spectral parameters (just one wavelength at 550nm)
1535 std::vector<float> prague_params;
1536 prague_params.push_back(550.0f); // wavelength
1537 prague_params.push_back(0.1f); // L_zenith (not used in this test)
1538 prague_params.push_back(circ_str); // circumsolar strength
1539 prague_params.push_back(circ_width); // circumsolar width
1540 prague_params.push_back(horiz_bright); // horizon brightness
1541 prague_params.push_back(normalization); // normalization factor
1542
1543 context_prague.setGlobalData("prague_sky_spectral_params", prague_params);
1544
1545 // Run radiation model
1546 radiation_prague.runBand("diffuse");
1547
1548 // Get received flux
1549 float Rdiff_prague;
1550 context_prague.getPrimitiveData(UUID_prague, "radiation_flux_diffuse", Rdiff_prague);
1551
1552 // Verify that integrated hemispherical flux equals what we set (1.0)
1553 // This confirms that Prague angular distribution normalization is correct
1554 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabsf(Rdiff_prague - 1.f) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1555 }
1556}
1557
1558DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Prague Sky Angular Distribution") {
1559 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1560 // Tests that Prague sky model parameters are correctly applied in the diffuse shader.
1561 //
1562 // RadiationModel::computeAngularNormalization() always computes the normalization factor
1563 // with the sun at zenith. When the actual sun is at a different elevation, the Prague
1564 // distribution integrates to a value different from 1.0 on a horizontal patch, making
1565 // Prague measurably different from isotropic.
1566 //
1567 // Test design: horizontal patch, sun at 45° elevation (not zenith).
1568 // - Isotropic: flux = 1.0 (all horizontal rays above horizon, normalization exact)
1569 // - Prague: flux ≈ 0.91 (circumsolar peak at 45° elevation has lower cosine weight
1570 // than the zenith-calibrated normalization expects → total < 1.0)
1571 //
1572 // If Prague params are zeroed (bug): isotropic fallback → flux ≈ 1.0 → test FAILS
1573 // If Prague params are applied (fix): Prague distribution → flux ≈ 0.91 → test PASSES
1574
1575 Context context;
1576
1577 // Horizontal patch (default orientation, normal = +Z)
1578 uint UUID = context.addPatch();
1579 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
1580
1581 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
1582 radiation.disableMessages();
1583
1584 radiation.addRadiationBand("diffuse");
1585 radiation.disableEmission("diffuse");
1586 radiation.setDiffuseRayCount("diffuse", 200000);
1587 radiation.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("diffuse", 1.f);
1588
1589 // Diffuse spectrum required for Prague spectral integration
1590 std::vector<helios::vec2> diffuse_spectrum = {{400, 1.0}, {550, 1.0}, {700, 1.0}};
1591 context.setGlobalData("prague_angular_test_spectrum", diffuse_spectrum);
1592 radiation.setDiffuseSpectrum("prague_angular_test_spectrum");
1593
1594 radiation.updateGeometry();
1595
1596 // Prague sky: sun at 45° elevation (+Y azimuth), no horizon brightening
1597 // Normalization is computed for sun at zenith, so sun at 45° creates a measurable
1598 // deficit: circumsolar peak at cos_zenith=0.707 vs. normalization calibrated at cos_zenith=1.0
1599 vec3 sun_dir = make_vec3(0, 0.707f, 0.707f); // 45° elevation, toward +Y
1600 context.setGlobalData("prague_sky_valid", 1);
1601 context.setGlobalData("prague_sky_sun_direction", sun_dir);
1602 context.setGlobalData("prague_sky_visibility_km", 50.0f);
1603 context.setGlobalData("prague_sky_ground_albedo", 0.2f);
1604
1605 // Prague spectral params: circ_str=8, circ_width=10°, horiz_bright=1.0
1606 // RadiationModel recomputes normalization via computeAngularNormalization(8, 10, 1) ≈ 0.222
1607 std::vector<float> prague_params;
1608 prague_params.push_back(550.0f); // wavelength
1609 prague_params.push_back(0.1f); // L_zenith (not used in this test)
1610 prague_params.push_back(8.0f); // circumsolar strength
1611 prague_params.push_back(10.0f); // circumsolar width (degrees)
1612 prague_params.push_back(1.0f); // horizon brightness (1.0 = no brightening)
1613 prague_params.push_back(0.0f); // normalization (recomputed by RadiationModel)
1614 context.setGlobalData("prague_sky_spectral_params", prague_params);
1615
1616 radiation.runBand("diffuse");
1617
1618 float flux;
1619 context.getPrimitiveData(UUID, "radiation_flux_diffuse", flux);
1620
1621 // Isotropic sky on a horizontal patch gives 1.0 (exact, by normalization design)
1622 // Prague with sun at 45° and normalization for sun at zenith gives ~0.91 (~9% below isotropic)
1623 // This large margin (9%) is well above Monte Carlo noise (~0.2% at 200k rays)
1624 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux < 0.97f); // Prague gives measurably less than isotropic (1.0)
1625 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux > 0.70f); // Sanity: flux is reasonable
1626}
1627
1628DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Disk Radiation Source Above Circular Element") {
1629 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1630 float error_threshold = 0.005;
1631
1632 uint Ndirect_15 = 10000;
1633
1634 float r1_15 = 0.2; // disk source radius
1635 float r2_15 = 0.5; // disk element radius
1636 float a_15 = 0.5; // distance between radiation source and element
1637
1638 Context context_15;
1639 RadiationModel radiation_15 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_15);
1640 radiation_15.disableMessages();
1641
1642 uint UUID_15 = context_15.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(2 * r2_15, 2 * r2_15), make_SphericalCoord(0.5 * M_PI, 0), "lib/images/disk_texture.png");
1643
1644 uint ID_15 = radiation_15.addDiskRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, a_15, 0), r1_15, make_vec3(0.5 * M_PI, 0, 0));
1645
1646 radiation_15.addRadiationBand("light");
1647 radiation_15.disableEmission("light");
1648 radiation_15.setSourceFlux(ID_15, "light", 1.f);
1649 radiation_15.setDirectRayCount("light", Ndirect_15);
1650
1651 radiation_15.updateGeometry();
1652 radiation_15.runBand("light");
1653
1654 float F12_15;
1655 context_15.getPrimitiveData(UUID_15, "radiation_flux_light", F12_15);
1656
1657 float R1_15 = r1_15 / a_15;
1658 float R2_15 = r2_15 / a_15;
1659 float X_15 = 1.f + (1.f + R2_15 * R2_15) / (R1_15 * R1_15);
1660 float F12_exact_15 = 0.5f * (X_15 - sqrtf(X_15 * X_15 - 4.f * powf(R2_15 / R1_15, 2)));
1661
1662 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabs(F12_15 - F12_exact_15 * r1_15 * r1_15 / r2_15 / r2_15) <= 2.f * error_threshold);
1663}
1664
1665DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Rectangular Radiation Source Above Patch") {
1666 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1667 float error_threshold = 0.01;
1668
1669 uint Ndirect_16 = 50000;
1670
1671 float a_16 = 1; // width of patch/source
1672 float b_16 = 2; // length of patch/source
1673 float c_16 = 0.5; // distance between source and patch
1674
1675 Context context_16;
1676 RadiationModel radiation_16 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_16);
1677 radiation_16.disableMessages();
1678
1679 uint UUID_16 = context_16.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(a_16, b_16), nullrotation);
1680
1681 uint ID_16 = radiation_16.addRectangleRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, c_16), make_vec2(a_16, b_16), make_vec3(M_PI, 0, 0));
1682
1683 radiation_16.addRadiationBand("light");
1684 radiation_16.disableEmission("light");
1685 radiation_16.setSourceFlux(ID_16, "light", 1.f);
1686 radiation_16.setDirectRayCount("light", Ndirect_16);
1687
1688 radiation_16.updateGeometry();
1689 radiation_16.runBand("light");
1690
1691 float F12_16;
1692 context_16.getPrimitiveData(UUID_16, "radiation_flux_light", F12_16);
1693
1694 float X_16 = a_16 / c_16;
1695 float Y_16 = b_16 / c_16;
1696 float X2_16 = X_16 * X_16;
1697 float Y2_16 = Y_16 * Y_16;
1698
1699 float F12_exact_16 = 2.0f / float(M_PI * X_16 * Y_16) *
1700 (logf(std::sqrt((1.f + X2_16) * (1.f + Y2_16) / (1.f + X2_16 + Y2_16))) + X_16 * std::sqrt(1.f + Y2_16) * atanf(X_16 / std::sqrt(1.f + Y2_16)) + Y_16 * std::sqrt(1.f + X2_16) * atanf(Y_16 / std::sqrt(1.f + X2_16)) -
1701 X_16 * atanf(X_16) - Y_16 * atanf(Y_16));
1702
1703 DOCTEST_CHECK(fabs(F12_16 - F12_exact_16) <= error_threshold);
1704}
1705
1706DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel ROMC Camera Test Verification") {
1707 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1708 Context context_17;
1709 float sunzenithd = 30;
1710 float reflectivityleaf = 0.02; // NIR
1711 float transmissivityleaf = 0.01;
1712 std::string bandname = "RED";
1713
1714 float viewazimuth = 0;
1715 float heightscene = 30.f;
1716 float rangescene = 100.f;
1717 std::vector<float> viewangles = {-75, 0, 36};
1718 float sunazimuth = 0;
1719 // Reference values updated for new camera radiometry (v1.3.57) which converts flux to intensity via /π factor
1720 std::vector<float> referencevalues = {21.f, 71.6f, 87.2f};
1721
1722 // add canopy to context
1723 std::vector<std::vector<float>> CSpositions = {{-24.8302, 11.6110, 15.6210}, {-38.3380, -9.06342, 17.6094}, {-5.26569, 18.9618, 17.2535}, {-27.4794, -32.0266, 15.9146},
1724 {33.5709, -6.31039, 14.5332}, {11.9126, 8.32062, 12.1220}, {32.4756, -26.9023, 16.3684}}; // HET 51
1725
1726 for (int w = -1; w < 2; w++) {
1727 vec3 movew = make_vec3(0, float(rangescene * w), 0);
1728 for (auto &CSposition: CSpositions) {
1729 vec3 transpos = movew + make_vec3(CSposition.at(0), CSposition.at(1), CSposition.at(2));
1730 CameraCalibration cameracalibration(&context_17);
1731 std::vector<uint> iCUUIDsn = cameracalibration.readROMCCanopy();
1732 context_17.translatePrimitive(iCUUIDsn, transpos);
1733 context_17.setPrimitiveData(iCUUIDsn, "twosided_flag", uint(1));
1734 context_17.setPrimitiveData(iCUUIDsn, "reflectivity_spectrum", "leaf_reflectivity");
1735 context_17.setPrimitiveData(iCUUIDsn, "transmissivity_spectrum", "leaf_transmissivity");
1736 }
1737 }
1738
1739 // set optical properties
1740 std::vector<helios::vec2> leafspectrarho(2200);
1741 std::vector<helios::vec2> leafspectratau(2200);
1742 std::vector<helios::vec2> sourceintensity(2200);
1743 for (int i = 0; i < leafspectrarho.size(); i++) {
1744 leafspectrarho.at(i).x = float(301 + i);
1745 leafspectrarho.at(i).y = reflectivityleaf;
1746 leafspectratau.at(i).x = float(301 + i);
1747 leafspectratau.at(i).y = transmissivityleaf;
1748 sourceintensity.at(i).x = float(301 + i);
1749 sourceintensity.at(i).y = 1;
1750 }
1751 context_17.setGlobalData("leaf_reflectivity", leafspectrarho);
1752 context_17.setGlobalData("leaf_transmissivity", leafspectratau);
1753 context_17.setGlobalData("camera_response", sourceintensity); // camera response is 1
1754 context_17.setGlobalData("source_intensity", sourceintensity); // source intensity is 1
1755
1756 // Add sensors to receive radiation
1757 vec3 camera_lookat = make_vec3(0, 0, heightscene);
1758 std::vector<std::string> cameralabels;
1759 RadiationModel radiation_17 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context_17);
1760 radiation_17.disableMessages();
1761 for (float viewangle: viewangles) {
1762 // Set camera properties
1763 vec3 camerarotation = sphere2cart(make_SphericalCoord(deg2rad((90 - viewangle)), deg2rad(viewazimuth)));
1764 vec3 camera_position = 100000 * camerarotation + camera_lookat;
1765 CameraProperties cameraproperties;
1766 cameraproperties.camera_resolution = make_int2(200, int(std::abs(std::round(200 * std::cos(deg2rad(viewangle))))));
1767 cameraproperties.focal_plane_distance = 100000;
1768 cameraproperties.lens_diameter = 0;
1769 cameraproperties.HFOV = 0.02864786f * 2.f;
1770 // FOV_aspect_ratio is auto-calculated from camera_resolution
1771
1772 std::string cameralabel = "ROMC" + std::to_string(viewangle);
1773 radiation_17.addRadiationCamera(cameralabel, {bandname}, camera_position, camera_lookat, cameraproperties, 60); // overlap warning multiple cameras
1774 cameralabels.push_back(cameralabel);
1775 }
1776 radiation_17.addSunSphereRadiationSource(make_SphericalCoord(deg2rad(90 - sunzenithd), deg2rad(sunazimuth)));
1777 radiation_17.setSourceSpectrum(0, "source_intensity");
1778 radiation_17.addRadiationBand(bandname, 500, 502);
1779 radiation_17.setDiffuseRayCount(bandname, 20);
1780 radiation_17.disableEmission(bandname);
1781 radiation_17.setSourceFlux(0, bandname, 5); // try large source flux
1782 radiation_17.setScatteringDepth(bandname, 1);
1783 radiation_17.setDiffuseRadiationFlux(bandname, 0);
1784 radiation_17.setDiffuseRadiationExtinctionCoeff(bandname, 0.f, make_vec3(-0.5, 0.5, 1));
1785
1786 for (const auto &cameralabel: cameralabels) {
1787 radiation_17.setCameraSpectralResponse(cameralabel, bandname, "camera_response");
1788 }
1789 radiation_17.updateGeometry();
1790 radiation_17.runBand(bandname);
1791
1792 float cameravalue;
1793 std::vector<float> camera_data;
1794 std::vector<uint> camera_UUID;
1795
1796 for (int i = 0; i < cameralabels.size(); i++) {
1797 std::string global_data_label = "camera_" + cameralabels.at(i) + "_" + bandname; //_pixel_UUID
1798 std::string global_UUID = "camera_" + cameralabels.at(i) + "_pixel_UUID";
1799 context_17.getGlobalData(global_data_label.c_str(), camera_data);
1800 context_17.getGlobalData(global_UUID.c_str(), camera_UUID);
1801 float camera_all_data = 0;
1802 int filtered_count = 0, uuid_zero_count = 0, uuid_invalid_count = 0;
1803 float unfiltered_sum = 0, uuid_zero_sum = 0;
1804 for (int v = 0; v < camera_data.size(); v++) {
1805 if (camera_data.at(v) > 0) {
1806 unfiltered_sum += camera_data.at(v);
1807 uint raw_uuid = camera_UUID.at(v);
1808 if (raw_uuid == 0) {
1809 uuid_zero_count++;
1810 uuid_zero_sum += camera_data.at(v);
1811 } else {
1812 uint iUUID = raw_uuid - 1;
1813 if (context_17.doesPrimitiveExist(iUUID)) {
1814 camera_all_data += camera_data.at(v);
1815 filtered_count++;
1816 } else {
1817 uuid_invalid_count++;
1818 }
1819 }
1820 }
1821 }
1822 cameravalue = std::abs(referencevalues.at(i) - camera_all_data);
1823 DOCTEST_CHECK(cameravalue <= 1.5f);
1824 }
1825}
1826
1827DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Spectral Integration and Interpolation Tests") {
1828 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1829
1830 Context context;
1831 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
1832 radiation.disableMessages();
1833
1834 // Test 1: Basic spectral integration
1835 {
1836 std::vector<helios::vec2> test_spectrum;
1837 test_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(400, 0.1f));
1838 test_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(500, 0.5f));
1839 test_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(600, 0.3f));
1840 test_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(700, 0.2f));
1841
1842 // Test full spectrum integration using trapezoidal rule
1843 float full_integral = radiation.integrateSpectrum(test_spectrum);
1844 // Trapezoidal integration: (y0+y1)*dx/2 + (y1+y2)*dx/2 + (y2+y3)*dx/2
1845 float expected_integral = (0.1f + 0.5f) * 100.0f * 0.5f + (0.5f + 0.3f) * 100.0f * 0.5f + (0.3f + 0.2f) * 100.0f * 0.5f;
1846 DOCTEST_CHECK(std::abs(full_integral - expected_integral) < 1e-5f);
1847
1848 // Test partial spectrum integration (450-650 nm)
1849 // The algorithm integrates over segments that overlap with bounds, but returns full spectrum integral
1850 float partial_integral = radiation.integrateSpectrum(test_spectrum, 450, 650);
1851 // This actually returns the same as full integral due to implementation
1852 DOCTEST_CHECK(std::abs(partial_integral - full_integral) < 1e-5f);
1853 }
1854
1855 // Test 2: Source spectrum integration
1856 {
1857 std::vector<helios::vec2> source_spectrum;
1858 source_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(400, 1.0f));
1859 source_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(500, 2.0f));
1860 source_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(600, 1.5f));
1861 source_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(700, 0.5f));
1862
1863 std::vector<helios::vec2> surface_spectrum;
1864 surface_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(400, 0.2f));
1865 surface_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(500, 0.6f));
1866 surface_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(600, 0.4f));
1867 surface_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(700, 0.1f));
1868
1869 uint source_ID = radiation.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_SphericalCoord(0, 0));
1870 radiation.setSourceSpectrum(source_ID, source_spectrum);
1871
1872 float integrated_product = radiation.integrateSpectrum(source_ID, surface_spectrum, 400, 700);
1873
1874 // Should compute normalized integral of source * surface spectrum
1875 DOCTEST_CHECK(integrated_product > 0.0f);
1876 DOCTEST_CHECK(integrated_product <= 1.0f); // Normalized result
1877 }
1878
1879 // Test 3: Camera spectral response integration
1880 {
1881 std::vector<helios::vec2> surface_spectrum;
1882 surface_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(400, 0.3f));
1883 surface_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(500, 0.7f));
1884 surface_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(600, 0.5f));
1885 surface_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(700, 0.2f));
1886
1887 std::vector<helios::vec2> camera_response;
1888 camera_response.push_back(make_vec2(400, 0.1f));
1889 camera_response.push_back(make_vec2(500, 0.8f));
1890 camera_response.push_back(make_vec2(600, 0.9f));
1891 camera_response.push_back(make_vec2(700, 0.3f));
1892
1893 float camera_integrated = radiation.integrateSpectrum(surface_spectrum, camera_response);
1894 DOCTEST_CHECK(camera_integrated >= 0.0f);
1895 DOCTEST_CHECK(camera_integrated <= 1.0f);
1896 }
1897}
1898
1899DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Spectral Radiative Properties Setting and Validation") {
1900 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
1901
1902 Context context;
1903 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
1904 radiation.disableMessages();
1905
1906 // Create test geometry
1907 uint patch_UUID = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
1908
1909 // Test 1: Setting spectral reflectivity and transmissivity
1910 {
1911 // Create test spectral data
1912 std::vector<helios::vec2> leaf_reflectivity;
1913 leaf_reflectivity.push_back(make_vec2(400, 0.05f));
1914 leaf_reflectivity.push_back(make_vec2(500, 0.10f));
1915 leaf_reflectivity.push_back(make_vec2(600, 0.08f));
1916 leaf_reflectivity.push_back(make_vec2(700, 0.45f));
1917 leaf_reflectivity.push_back(make_vec2(800, 0.50f));
1918
1919 std::vector<helios::vec2> leaf_transmissivity;
1920 leaf_transmissivity.push_back(make_vec2(400, 0.02f));
1921 leaf_transmissivity.push_back(make_vec2(500, 0.05f));
1922 leaf_transmissivity.push_back(make_vec2(600, 0.04f));
1923 leaf_transmissivity.push_back(make_vec2(700, 0.40f));
1924 leaf_transmissivity.push_back(make_vec2(800, 0.45f));
1925
1926 context.setGlobalData("test_leaf_reflectivity", leaf_reflectivity);
1927 context.setGlobalData("test_leaf_transmissivity", leaf_transmissivity);
1928
1929 // Set spectral properties on primitive
1930 context.setPrimitiveData(patch_UUID, "reflectivity_spectrum", "test_leaf_reflectivity");
1931 context.setPrimitiveData(patch_UUID, "transmissivity_spectrum", "test_leaf_transmissivity");
1932
1933 // Verify the spectral data was set correctly
1934 std::string refl_spectrum_label;
1935 context.getPrimitiveData(patch_UUID, "reflectivity_spectrum", refl_spectrum_label);
1936 DOCTEST_CHECK(refl_spectrum_label == "test_leaf_reflectivity");
1937
1938 std::string trans_spectrum_label;
1939 context.getPrimitiveData(patch_UUID, "transmissivity_spectrum", trans_spectrum_label);
1940 DOCTEST_CHECK(trans_spectrum_label == "test_leaf_transmissivity");
1941
1942 // Verify global data exists and matches
1943 std::vector<helios::vec2> retrieved_refl;
1944 context.getGlobalData("test_leaf_reflectivity", retrieved_refl);
1945 DOCTEST_CHECK(retrieved_refl.size() == leaf_reflectivity.size());
1946
1947 for (size_t i = 0; i < retrieved_refl.size(); i++) {
1948 DOCTEST_CHECK(std::abs(retrieved_refl[i].x - leaf_reflectivity[i].x) < 1e-5f);
1949 DOCTEST_CHECK(std::abs(retrieved_refl[i].y - leaf_reflectivity[i].y) < 1e-5f);
1950 }
1951 }
1952
1953 // Test 2: Integration with radiation bands and source spectrum
1954 {
1955 radiation.addRadiationBand("VIS", 400, 700);
1956 radiation.addRadiationBand("NIR", 700, 900);
1957
1958 // Add solar spectrum
1959 std::vector<helios::vec2> solar_spectrum;
1960 solar_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(400, 1.5f));
1961 solar_spectrum.push_back(make_vec2(500, 2.0f));
