3716 // Test error handling - wrong primitive data type for query data
3717 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Error: wrong primitive data type for query") {
3718 Context context8;
3719 RadiationModel radiationmodel8 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context8);
3720 radiationmodel8.disableMessages();
3721
3722 context8.setGlobalData("spec", spectrum_young);
3723
3724 uint uuid = context8.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
3725 context8.setPrimitiveData(uuid, "age", 5); // int instead of float
3726
3727 std::vector<uint> uuids = {uuid};
3728 std::vector<std::string> spectra = {"spec"};
3729 std::vector<float> values = {0.0f};
3730
3731 // This should succeed - validation happens later
3732 radiationmodel8.interpolateSpectrumFromPrimitiveData(uuids, spectra, values, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
3733
3734 radiationmodel8.addRadiationBand("PAR");
3735 uint source = radiationmodel8.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
3736 radiationmodel8.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
3737 radiationmodel8.updateGeometry();
3738
3739 // Error should occur when running the band
3740 bool exception_thrown = false;
3741 try {
3742 radiationmodel8.runBand("PAR");
3743 } catch (const std::runtime_error &e) {
3744 exception_thrown = true;
3745 std::string error_msg(e.what());
3746 DOCTEST_CHECK(error_msg.find("HELIOS_TYPE_FLOAT") != std::string::npos);
3747 }
3748 DOCTEST_CHECK(exception_thrown);
3749 }
3750
3751 // Test with primitive missing query data (should not crash, just skip)
3752 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Primitive without query data is skipped") {
3753 Context context9;
3754 RadiationModel radiationmodel9 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context9);
3755 radiationmodel9.disableMessages();
3756
3757 context9.setGlobalData("spec1", spectrum_young);
3758 context9.setGlobalData("spec2", spectrum_old);
3759
3760 uint uuid_with_data = context9.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
3761 uint uuid_without_data = context9.addPatch(make_vec3(2, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
3762
3763 context9.setPrimitiveData(uuid_with_data, "age", 2.0f);
3764 // uuid_without_data does not have "age" data
3765
3766 std::vector<uint> uuids = {uuid_with_data, uuid_without_data};
3767 std::vector<std::string> spectra = {"spec1", "spec2"};
3768 std::vector<float> values = {0.0f, 10.0f};
3769
3770 radiationmodel9.interpolateSpectrumFromPrimitiveData(uuids, spectra, values, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
3771
3772 radiationmodel9.addRadiationBand("PAR");
3773 uint source = radiationmodel9.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
3774 radiationmodel9.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
3775 radiationmodel9.updateGeometry();
3776 radiationmodel9.runBand("PAR");
3777
3778 // uuid_with_data should have spectrum assigned
3779 std::string assigned_spectrum;
3780 context9.getPrimitiveData(uuid_with_data, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
3781 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec1");
3782
3783 // uuid_without_data should not have spectrum assigned (or may not exist)
3784 if (context9.doesPrimitiveDataExist(uuid_without_data, "reflectivity_spectrum")) {
3785 // If it exists, it should not be one of our test spectra (could be empty or default)
3786 context9.getPrimitiveData(uuid_without_data, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
3787 // It's OK if it doesn't have a value, or has an empty value
3788 }
3789 }
3790}
3791
3792DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Spectrum Interpolation from Object Data") {
3793 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
3794
3795 Context context;
3796 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
3797 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
3798
3799 // Create test spectra as global data
3800 std::vector<vec2> spectrum_young = {{400, 0.1}, {500, 0.15}, {600, 0.2}, {700, 0.25}};
3801 std::vector<vec2> spectrum_mature = {{400, 0.3}, {500, 0.35}, {600, 0.4}, {700, 0.45}};
3802 std::vector<vec2> spectrum_old = {{400, 0.5}, {500, 0.55}, {600, 0.6}, {700, 0.65}};
3803
3804 context.setGlobalData("spectrum_age_0", spectrum_young);
3805 context.setGlobalData("spectrum_age_5", spectrum_mature);
3806 context.setGlobalData("spectrum_age_10", spectrum_old);
3807
3808 // Create test objects with primitives
3809 uint obj0 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
3810 uint obj1 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(2, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
3811 uint obj2 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(4, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
3812 uint obj3 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(6, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
3813 uint obj4 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(8, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
3814
3815 // Set age object data
3816 context.setObjectData(obj0, "age", 0.0f); // Exact match to first spectrum
3817 context.setObjectData(obj1, "age", 2.0f); // Between first and second, closer to first
3818 context.setObjectData(obj2, "age", 5.0f); // Exact match to second spectrum
3819 context.setObjectData(obj3, "age", 8.0f); // Between second and third, closer to third
3820 context.setObjectData(obj4, "age", 12.0f); // Beyond last value
3821
3822 // Test basic interpolation with reflectivity
3823 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Basic interpolation with 3 spectra") {
3824 std::vector<uint> obj_ids = {obj0, obj1, obj2, obj3, obj4};
3825 std::vector<std::string> spectra = {"spectrum_age_0", "spectrum_age_5", "spectrum_age_10"};
3826 std::vector<float> values = {0.0f, 5.0f, 10.0f};
3827
3828 radiationmodel.interpolateSpectrumFromObjectData(obj_ids, spectra, values, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
3829
3830 // Add band, sources, and run to trigger interpolation via updateRadiativeProperties()
3831 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("PAR");
3832 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
3833 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
3834 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
3835 radiationmodel.runBand("PAR");
3836
3837 // Verify that the correct spectra were assigned to all primitives of each object
3838 std::string assigned_spectrum;
3839 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids0 = context.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj0);
3840 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids0) {
3841 context.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
3842 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spectrum_age_0");
3843 }
3844
3845 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids1 = context.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj1);
3846 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids1) {
3847 context.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
3848 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spectrum_age_0"); // 2.0 is closer to 0.0 than 5.0
3849 }
3850
3851 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids2 = context.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj2);
3852 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids2) {
3853 context.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
3854 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spectrum_age_5");
3855 }
3856
3857 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids3 = context.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj3);
3858 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids3) {
3859 context.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
3860 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spectrum_age_10"); // 8.0 is closer to 10.0 than 5.0
3861 }
3862
3863 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids4 = context.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj4);
3864 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids4) {
3865 context.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
3866 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spectrum_age_10"); // 12.0 is closest to 10.0
3867 }
3868 }
3869
3870 // Test with transmissivity spectrum
3871 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Interpolation with transmissivity_spectrum") {
3872 Context context2;
3873 RadiationModel radiationmodel2 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context2);
3874 radiationmodel2.disableMessages();
3875
3876 context2.setGlobalData("trans_young", spectrum_young);
3877 context2.setGlobalData("trans_old", spectrum_old);
3878
3879 uint obj_a = context2.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
3880 uint obj_b = context2.addTileObject(make_vec3(2, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
3881
3882 context2.setObjectData(obj_a, "leaf_age", 1.0f);
3883 context2.setObjectData(obj_b, "leaf_age", 9.0f);
3884
3885 std::vector<uint> obj_ids = {obj_a, obj_b};
3886 std::vector<std::string> spectra = {"trans_young", "trans_old"};
3887 std::vector<float> values = {0.0f, 10.0f};
3888
3889 radiationmodel2.interpolateSpectrumFromObjectData(obj_ids, spectra, values, "leaf_age", "transmissivity_spectrum");
3890
3891 radiationmodel2.addRadiationBand("PAR");
3892 uint source = radiationmodel2.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
3893 radiationmodel2.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
3894 radiationmodel2.updateGeometry();
3895 radiationmodel2.runBand("PAR");
3896
3897 std::string assigned_spectrum;
3898 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids_a = context2.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj_a);
3899 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids_a) {
3900 context2.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "transmissivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
3901 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "trans_young");
3902 }
3903
3904 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids_b = context2.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj_b);
3905 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids_b) {
3906 context2.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "transmissivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
3907 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "trans_old");
3908 }
3909 }
3910
3911 // Test error handling - mismatched vector lengths
3912 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Error: mismatched vector lengths") {
3913 Context context3;
3914 RadiationModel radiationmodel3 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context3);
3915 radiationmodel3.disableMessages();
3916
3917 uint obj_test = context3.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
3918 std::vector<uint> obj_ids = {obj_test};
3919 std::vector<std::string> spectra = {"spec1", "spec2"};
3920 std::vector<float> values = {0.0f}; // Wrong size
3921
3922 bool caught_error = false;
3923 try {
3924 radiationmodel3.interpolateSpectrumFromObjectData(obj_ids, spectra, values, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
3925 } catch (const std::exception &e) {
3926 caught_error = true;
3927 }
3928 DOCTEST_CHECK(caught_error);
3929 }
3930
3931 // Test error handling - empty spectra vector
3932 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Error: empty spectra vector") {
3933 Context context4;
3934 RadiationModel radiationmodel4 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context4);
3935 radiationmodel4.disableMessages();
3936
3937 uint obj_test = context4.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
3938 std::vector<uint> obj_ids = {obj_test};
3939 std::vector<std::string> spectra;
3940 std::vector<float> values;
3941
3942 bool caught_error = false;
3943 try {
3944 radiationmodel4.interpolateSpectrumFromObjectData(obj_ids, spectra, values, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
3945 } catch (const std::exception &e) {
3946 caught_error = true;
3947 }
3948 DOCTEST_CHECK(caught_error);
3949 }

3990 // Test error handling - empty target label

3992 Context context7;

3994 radiationmodel7.disableMessages();
3995
3996 uint obj_test = context7.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
3997 std::vector<uint> obj_ids = {obj_test};
3998 std::vector<std::string> spectra = {"spec1"};

4000
4001 bool caught_error = false;

4003 radiationmodel7.interpolateSpectrumFromObjectData(obj_ids, spectra, values, "age", "");

4009
4010 // Test graceful handling - object doesn't have the data field
4011 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Graceful skip: object without query data") {
4012 Context context8;
4013 RadiationModel radiationmodel8 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context8);
4014 radiationmodel8.disableMessages();
4015
4016 context8.setGlobalData("spec1", spectrum_young);
4017
4018 uint obj_with_data = context8.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4019 uint obj_without_data = context8.addTileObject(make_vec3(2, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4020
4021 context8.setObjectData(obj_with_data, "age", 5.0f);
4022 // obj_without_data doesn't have "age" data
4023
4024 std::vector<uint> obj_ids = {obj_with_data, obj_without_data};
4025 std::vector<std::string> spectra = {"spec1"};
4026 std::vector<float> values = {5.0f};
4027
4028 radiationmodel8.interpolateSpectrumFromObjectData(obj_ids, spectra, values, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
4029
4030 radiationmodel8.addRadiationBand("PAR");
4031 uint source = radiationmodel8.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
4032 radiationmodel8.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
4033 radiationmodel8.updateGeometry();
4034 radiationmodel8.runBand("PAR");
4035
4036 std::string assigned_spectrum;
4037 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids_with = context8.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj_with_data);
4038 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids_with) {
4039 context8.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4040 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec1");
4041 }
4042
4043 // obj_without_data's primitives should not have spectrum assigned
4044 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids_without = context8.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj_without_data);
4045 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids_without) {
4046 if (context8.doesPrimitiveDataExist(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum")) {
4047 context8.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4048 }
4049 }
4050 }
4051
4052 // Test graceful handling - invalid object ID (deleted object)
4053 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Graceful skip: invalid object ID") {
4054 Context context9;
4055 RadiationModel radiationmodel9 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context9);
4056 radiationmodel9.disableMessages();
4057
4058 context9.setGlobalData("spec1", spectrum_young);
4059
4060 uint obj_valid = context9.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4061 uint obj_to_delete = context9.addTileObject(make_vec3(2, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4062
4063 context9.setObjectData(obj_valid, "age", 5.0f);
4064 context9.setObjectData(obj_to_delete, "age", 5.0f);
4065
4066 std::vector<uint> obj_ids = {obj_valid, obj_to_delete};
4067 std::vector<std::string> spectra = {"spec1"};
4068 std::vector<float> values = {5.0f};
4069
4070 radiationmodel9.interpolateSpectrumFromObjectData(obj_ids, spectra, values, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
4071
4072 // Delete the object before running
4073 context9.deleteObject(obj_to_delete);
4074
4075 radiationmodel9.addRadiationBand("PAR");
4076 uint source = radiationmodel9.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
4077 radiationmodel9.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
4078 radiationmodel9.updateGeometry();
4079 radiationmodel9.runBand("PAR");
4080
4081 std::string assigned_spectrum;
4082 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids_valid = context9.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj_valid);
4083 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids_valid) {
4084 context9.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4085 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec1");
4086 }
4087 }
4088

4094

4096

4099

4114 } catch (const std::exception &e) {

4180
4181DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Spectrum Interpolation - Duplicate Handling") {
4182 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
4183
4184 // Test merging of duplicate primitive UUIDs with same spectra/values
4185 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Primitive: Merge duplicates with matching spectra") {
4186 Context context;
4187 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
4188 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
4189
4190 std::vector<vec2> spectrum1 = {{400, 0.1}, {500, 0.15}};
4191 std::vector<vec2> spectrum2 = {{400, 0.3}, {500, 0.35}};
4192 context.setGlobalData("spec1", spectrum1);
4193 context.setGlobalData("spec2", spectrum2);
4194
4195 uint uuid0 = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
4196 uint uuid1 = context.addPatch(make_vec3(2, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
4197 uint uuid2 = context.addPatch(make_vec3(4, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
4198
4199 context.setPrimitiveData(uuid0, "age", 1.0f);
4200 context.setPrimitiveData(uuid1, "age", 1.0f);
4201 context.setPrimitiveData(uuid2, "age", 9.0f);
4202
4203 // First call with uuid0 and uuid1
4204 radiationmodel.interpolateSpectrumFromPrimitiveData({uuid0, uuid1}, {"spec1", "spec2"}, {0.0f, 10.0f}, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
4205
4206 // Second call with uuid1 (duplicate) and uuid2 (new) - same spectra/values
4207 radiationmodel.interpolateSpectrumFromPrimitiveData({uuid1, uuid2}, {"spec1", "spec2"}, {0.0f, 10.0f}, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
4208
4209 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("PAR");
4210 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
4211 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
4212 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
4213 radiationmodel.runBand("PAR");
4214
4215 // All three should be processed correctly (uuid1 appears only once due to set deduplication)
4216 std::string assigned_spectrum;
4217 context.getPrimitiveData(uuid0, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4218 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec1");
4219
4220 context.getPrimitiveData(uuid1, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4221 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec1");
4222
4223 context.getPrimitiveData(uuid2, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4224 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec2");
4225 }
4226
4227 // Test replacement when spectra/values change
4228 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Primitive: Replace config with different spectra") {
4229 Context context2;
4230 RadiationModel radiationmodel2 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context2);
4231 radiationmodel2.disableMessages();
4232
4233 std::vector<vec2> spectrum1 = {{400, 0.1}, {500, 0.15}};
4234 std::vector<vec2> spectrum2 = {{400, 0.3}, {500, 0.35}};
4235 std::vector<vec2> spectrum3 = {{400, 0.5}, {500, 0.55}};
4236 context2.setGlobalData("spec1", spectrum1);
4237 context2.setGlobalData("spec2", spectrum2);
4238 context2.setGlobalData("spec3", spectrum3);
4239
4240 uint uuid0 = context2.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
4241 uint uuid1 = context2.addPatch(make_vec3(2, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
4242
4243 context2.setPrimitiveData(uuid0, "age", 1.0f);
4244 context2.setPrimitiveData(uuid1, "age", 15.0f);
4245
4246 // First call with 2 spectra
4247 radiationmodel2.interpolateSpectrumFromPrimitiveData({uuid0, uuid1}, {"spec1", "spec2"}, {0.0f, 10.0f}, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
4248
4249 // Second call with same labels but 3 spectra (should replace)
4250 radiationmodel2.interpolateSpectrumFromPrimitiveData({uuid0, uuid1}, {"spec1", "spec2", "spec3"}, {0.0f, 10.0f, 20.0f}, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
4251
4252 radiationmodel2.addRadiationBand("PAR");
4253 uint source = radiationmodel2.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
4254 radiationmodel2.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
4255 radiationmodel2.updateGeometry();
4256 radiationmodel2.runBand("PAR");
4257
4258 // Should use the new 3-spectrum config
4259 std::string assigned_spectrum;
4260 context2.getPrimitiveData(uuid0, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4261 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec1");
4262
4263 context2.getPrimitiveData(uuid1, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4264 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec2"); // 15.0 is closer to 10.0 than 20.0
4265 }
4266
4267 // Test merging of duplicate object IDs with same spectra/values
4268 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Object: Merge duplicates with matching spectra") {
4269 Context context3;
4270 RadiationModel radiationmodel3 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context3);
4271 radiationmodel3.disableMessages();
4272
4273 std::vector<vec2> spectrum1 = {{400, 0.1}, {500, 0.15}};
4274 std::vector<vec2> spectrum2 = {{400, 0.3}, {500, 0.35}};
4275 context3.setGlobalData("spec1", spectrum1);
4276 context3.setGlobalData("spec2", spectrum2);
4277
4278 uint obj0 = context3.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4279 uint obj1 = context3.addTileObject(make_vec3(2, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4280 uint obj2 = context3.addTileObject(make_vec3(4, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4281
4282 context3.setObjectData(obj0, "age", 1.0f);
4283 context3.setObjectData(obj1, "age", 1.0f);
4284 context3.setObjectData(obj2, "age", 9.0f);
4285
4286 // First call with obj0 and obj1
4287 radiationmodel3.interpolateSpectrumFromObjectData({obj0, obj1}, {"spec1", "spec2"}, {0.0f, 10.0f}, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
4288
4289 // Second call with obj1 (duplicate) and obj2 (new) - same spectra/values
4290 radiationmodel3.interpolateSpectrumFromObjectData({obj1, obj2}, {"spec1", "spec2"}, {0.0f, 10.0f}, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
4291
4292 radiationmodel3.addRadiationBand("PAR");
4293 uint source = radiationmodel3.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
4294 radiationmodel3.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
4295 radiationmodel3.updateGeometry();
4296 radiationmodel3.runBand("PAR");
4297
4298 // All three objects' primitives should be processed correctly
4299 std::string assigned_spectrum;
4300 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids0 = context3.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj0);
4301 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids0) {
4302 context3.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4303 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec1");
4304 }
4305
4306 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids1 = context3.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj1);
4307 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids1) {
4308 context3.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4309 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec1");
4310 }
4311
4312 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids2 = context3.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj2);
4313 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids2) {
4314 context3.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4315 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec2");
4316 }
4317 }
4318
4319 // Test replacement when spectra/values change for objects
4320 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Object: Replace config with different spectra") {
4321 Context context4;
4322 RadiationModel radiationmodel4 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context4);
4323 radiationmodel4.disableMessages();
4324
4325 std::vector<vec2> spectrum1 = {{400, 0.1}, {500, 0.15}};
4326 std::vector<vec2> spectrum2 = {{400, 0.3}, {500, 0.35}};
4327 std::vector<vec2> spectrum3 = {{400, 0.5}, {500, 0.55}};
4328 context4.setGlobalData("spec1", spectrum1);
4329 context4.setGlobalData("spec2", spectrum2);
4330 context4.setGlobalData("spec3", spectrum3);
4331
4332 uint obj0 = context4.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4333 uint obj1 = context4.addTileObject(make_vec3(2, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4334
4335 context4.setObjectData(obj0, "age", 1.0f);
4336 context4.setObjectData(obj1, "age", 15.0f);
4337
4338 // First call with 2 spectra
4339 radiationmodel4.interpolateSpectrumFromObjectData({obj0, obj1}, {"spec1", "spec2"}, {0.0f, 10.0f}, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
4340
4341 // Second call with same labels but 3 spectra (should replace)
4342 radiationmodel4.interpolateSpectrumFromObjectData({obj0, obj1}, {"spec1", "spec2", "spec3"}, {0.0f, 10.0f, 20.0f}, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
4343
4344 radiationmodel4.addRadiationBand("PAR");
4345 uint source = radiationmodel4.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
4346 radiationmodel4.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
4347 radiationmodel4.updateGeometry();
4348 radiationmodel4.runBand("PAR");
4349
4350 // Should use the new 3-spectrum config
4351 std::string assigned_spectrum;
4352 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids0 = context4.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj0);
4353 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids0) {
4354 context4.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4355 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec1");
4356 }
4357
4358 std::vector<uint> prim_uuids1 = context4.getObjectPrimitiveUUIDs(obj1);
4359 for (uint uuid: prim_uuids1) {
4360 context4.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
4361 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "spec2"); // 15.0 is closer to 10.0 than 20.0
4362 }
4363 }
4364
4365 // Test that different query/target label pairs create separate configs
4366 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Primitive: Separate configs for different labels") {
4367 Context context5;
4368 RadiationModel radiationmodel5 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context5);
4369 radiationmodel5.disableMessages();
4370
4371 std::vector<vec2> spectrum1 = {{400, 0.1}, {500, 0.15}};
4372 std::vector<vec2> spectrum2 = {{400, 0.3}, {500, 0.35}};
4373 context5.setGlobalData("spec1", spectrum1);
4374 context5.setGlobalData("spec2", spectrum2);
4375
4376 uint uuid0 = context5.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
4377
4378 context5.setPrimitiveData(uuid0, "age", 1.0f);
4379 context5.setPrimitiveData(uuid0, "maturity", 9.0f);
4380
4381 // Two different configs with different query labels
4382 radiationmodel5.interpolateSpectrumFromPrimitiveData({uuid0}, {"spec1", "spec2"}, {0.0f, 10.0f}, "age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
4383 radiationmodel5.interpolateSpectrumFromPrimitiveData({uuid0}, {"spec1", "spec2"}, {0.0f, 10.0f}, "maturity", "transmissivity_spectrum");
4384
4385 radiationmodel5.addRadiationBand("PAR");
4386 uint source = radiationmodel5.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
4387 radiationmodel5.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
4388 radiationmodel5.updateGeometry();
4389 radiationmodel5.runBand("PAR");
4390
4391 // Both should be set independently
4392 std::string assigned_spectrum_rho;
4393 std::string assigned_spectrum_tau;
4394 context5.getPrimitiveData(uuid0, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum_rho);
4395 context5.getPrimitiveData(uuid0, "transmissivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum_tau);
4396
4397 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum_rho == "spec1"); // age=1.0 -> spec1
4398 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum_tau == "spec2"); // maturity=9.0 -> spec2
4399 }
4400}
4401
4402DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Camera Metadata Export") {
4403 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
4404 Context context;
4405
4406 // Set context properties for metadata
4407 context.setDate(30, 9, 2025); // day, month, year
4408 context.setTime(0, 30, 10); // second, minute, hour
4409 context.setLocation(make_Location(34.0522, -118.2437, 8.0)); // Los Angeles
4410
4411 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
4412 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
4413
4414 // Add a simple surface for the camera to image
4415 uint uuid = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
4416 context.setPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_SW", 0.5f);
4417
4418 // Add radiation band and source
4419 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("RGB_R");
4420 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("RGB_G");
4421 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("RGB_B");
4422
4423 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
4424 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "RGB_R", 100.f);
4425 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "RGB_G", 100.f);
4426 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "RGB_B", 100.f);
4427
4428 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Auto-populate metadata with custom sensor size") {
4429 // Create camera with custom sensor size
4430 CameraProperties camera_props;
4431 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(512, 512);
4432 camera_props.focal_plane_distance = 2.0f; // 2 meters working distance
4433 camera_props.lens_diameter = 0.05f; // 5 cm lens diameter
4434 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f; // 45 degree horizontal FOV
4435 // FOV_aspect_ratio is auto-calculated from camera_resolution (square: 1.0)
4436 camera_props.sensor_width_mm = 24.0f; // APS-C sensor size
4437
4438 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_camera", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(0, -5, 2), // Position at x=0, y=-5, z=2
4439 make_vec3(0, 0, 0), // Looking at origin
4440 camera_props, 1);
4441
4442 // Get auto-populated metadata (metadata is auto-populated when camera is added)
4443 CameraMetadata metadata = radiationmodel.getCameraMetadata("test_camera");
4444
4445 // Check camera properties
4446 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.width == 512);
4447 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.height == 512);
4448 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.channels == 3);
4449
4450 // Check sensor dimensions
4451 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.sensor_width == 24.0f);
4452 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.sensor_height == doctest::Approx(24.0f).epsilon(0.01)); // Should equal sensor_width/aspect_ratio
4453
4454 // Check focal length calculation: focal_length = sensor_width / (2 * tan(HFOV/2))
4455 float expected_focal_length = 24.0f / (2.0f * tan(45.0f * M_PI / 180.0f / 2.0f));
4456 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.focal_length == doctest::Approx(expected_focal_length).epsilon(0.01));
4457
4458 // Check aperture calculation: f-number = focal_length / lens_diameter_mm
4459 float lens_diameter_mm = 0.05f * 1000.0f; // Convert to mm
4460 float expected_f_number = expected_focal_length / lens_diameter_mm;
4461 std::ostringstream expected_aperture;
4462 expected_aperture << "f/" << std::fixed << std::setprecision(1) << expected_f_number;
4463 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.aperture == expected_aperture.str());
4464
4465 // Check camera model (should be default "generic")
4466 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.model == "generic");
4467
4468 // Check location properties
4469 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.location_properties.latitude == doctest::Approx(34.0522).epsilon(0.0001));
4470 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.location_properties.longitude == doctest::Approx(-118.2437).epsilon(0.0001));
4471
4472 // Check acquisition properties
4473 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.acquisition_properties.date == "2025-09-30");
4474 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.acquisition_properties.time == "10:30:00");
4475 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.acquisition_properties.UTC_offset == 8.0f);
4476 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.acquisition_properties.camera_height_m == 2.0f); // z-position
4477
4478 // Check tilt angle: camera at (0,-5,2) looking at (0,0,0)
4479 // Direction vector: (0,5,-2), normalized: (0, 0.9285, -0.3714)
4480 // Tilt angle: -asin(-0.3714) = 21.8 degrees (positive = pointing downward)
4481 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.acquisition_properties.camera_angle_deg == doctest::Approx(21.8).epsilon(0.5));
4482
4483 // Check light source detection (should be "sunlight" with collimated source)
4484 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.acquisition_properties.light_source == "sunlight");
4485
4486 // Path should be empty until image is written
4487 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.path == "");
4488 }
4489
4490 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Pinhole camera aperture") {
4491 CameraProperties camera_props;
4492 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(256, 256);
4493 camera_props.focal_plane_distance = 1.0f;
4494 camera_props.lens_diameter = 0.0f; // Pinhole camera
4495 camera_props.HFOV = 30.0f;
4496 // FOV_aspect_ratio is auto-calculated from camera_resolution (square: 1.0)
4497 camera_props.sensor_width_mm = 35.0f; // Default full-frame
4498
4499 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("pinhole_camera", {"RGB_R"}, make_vec3(0, 0, 5), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
4500
4501 // Get auto-populated metadata
4502 CameraMetadata metadata = radiationmodel.getCameraMetadata("pinhole_camera");
4503
4504 // Check pinhole aperture
4505 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.aperture == "pinhole");
4506 }
4507
4508 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Light source detection") {
4509 CameraProperties camera_props;
4510 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(128, 128);
4511 camera_props.HFOV = 20.0f;
4512
4513 // Test with no sources (already has collimated source, so remove it for clean test)
4514 Context context2;
4515 RadiationModel radiationmodel2 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context2);
4516 radiationmodel2.disableMessages();
4517
4518 radiationmodel2.addRadiationBand("test");
4519 radiationmodel2.addRadiationCamera("camera1", {"test"}, make_vec3(0, 0, 1), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
4520
4521 // Get auto-populated metadata
4522 CameraMetadata metadata1 = radiationmodel2.getCameraMetadata("camera1");
4523 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata1.acquisition_properties.light_source == "none");
4524
4525 // Add collimated source -> "sunlight"
4526 uint source1 = radiationmodel2.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
4527 radiationmodel2.setSourceFlux(source1, "test", 100.f);
4528 // Re-get metadata to reflect new light source
4529 metadata1 = radiationmodel2.getCameraMetadata("camera1");
4530 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata1.acquisition_properties.light_source == "sunlight");
4531
4532 // Add disk source -> "mixed"
4533 uint source2 = radiationmodel2.addDiskRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, 10), 1.0f, make_vec3(0, 0, 0));
4534 radiationmodel2.setSourceFlux(source2, "test", 50.f);
4535 // Re-get metadata to reflect mixed light sources
4536 metadata1 = radiationmodel2.getCameraMetadata("camera1");
4537 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata1.acquisition_properties.light_source == "mixed");
4538 }
4539
4540 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Set metadata and automatic JSON export") {
4541 CameraProperties camera_props;
4542 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(256, 256);
4543 camera_props.HFOV = 35.0f;
4544 camera_props.sensor_width_mm = 35.0f;
4545
4546 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("export_camera", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(0, -3, 1.5), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
4547
4548 // Enable automatic metadata JSON export
4549 radiationmodel.enableCameraMetadata("export_camera");
4550
4551 // Run simulation
4552 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
4553 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
4554 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_G");
4555 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_B");
4556
4557 // Write camera image (should automatically write JSON metadata)
4558 std::string image_path = radiationmodel.writeCameraImage("export_camera", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, "test_metadata");
4559
4560 // Check that image was written
4561 DOCTEST_CHECK(!image_path.empty());
4562 DOCTEST_CHECK(image_path.find(".jpeg") != std::string::npos);
4563
4564 // Check that JSON file exists
4565 std::string json_path = image_path.substr(0, image_path.find_last_of(".")) + ".json";
4566 std::ifstream json_file(json_path);
4567 DOCTEST_CHECK(json_file.is_open());
4568
4569 if (json_file.is_open()) {
4570 // Parse JSON and validate structure
4571 nlohmann::json j;
4572 json_file >> j;
4573 json_file.close();
4574
4575 // Validate JSON structure
4576 DOCTEST_CHECK(j.contains("path"));
4577 DOCTEST_CHECK(j.contains("camera_properties"));
4578 DOCTEST_CHECK(j.contains("location_properties"));
4579 DOCTEST_CHECK(j.contains("acquisition_properties"));
4580
4581 // Validate camera_properties fields
4582 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"].contains("height"));
4583 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"].contains("width"));
4584 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"].contains("channels"));
4585 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"].contains("focal_length"));
4586 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"].contains("aperture"));
4587 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"].contains("sensor_width"));
4588 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"].contains("sensor_height"));
4589 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"].contains("model"));
4590
4591 // Validate values
4592 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"]["width"] == 256);
4593 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"]["height"] == 256);
4594 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"]["channels"] == 3);
4595 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["camera_properties"]["model"] == "generic");
4596
4597 // Extract filename from full path for comparison
4598 size_t last_slash = image_path.find_last_of("/\\");
4599 std::string expected_filename = (last_slash != std::string::npos) ? image_path.substr(last_slash + 1) : image_path;
4600 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["path"] == expected_filename);
4601
4602 // Clean up test files
4603 std::remove(image_path.c_str());
4604 std::remove(json_path.c_str());
4605 }
4606 }
4607
4608 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Manual metadata population") {
4609 CameraProperties camera_props;
4610 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(128, 128);
4611
4612 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("manual_camera", {"RGB_R"}, make_vec3(0, 0, 2), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
4613
4614 // Manually create metadata
4615 CameraMetadata metadata;
4616 metadata.camera_properties.width = 128;
4617 metadata.camera_properties.height = 128;
4618 metadata.camera_properties.channels = 1;
4619 metadata.camera_properties.focal_length = 50.0f;
4620 metadata.camera_properties.aperture = "f/1.8";
4621 metadata.camera_properties.sensor_width = 36.0f;
4622 metadata.camera_properties.sensor_height = 24.0f;
4623 metadata.camera_properties.model = "Nikon D700";
4624
4625 metadata.location_properties.latitude = 40.0f;
4626 metadata.location_properties.longitude = -75.0f;
4627
4628 metadata.acquisition_properties.date = "2025-01-01";
4629 metadata.acquisition_properties.time = "12:00:00";
4630 metadata.acquisition_properties.UTC_offset = 5.0f;
4631 metadata.acquisition_properties.camera_height_m = 10.0f;
4632 metadata.acquisition_properties.camera_angle_deg = 45.0f;
4633 metadata.acquisition_properties.light_source = "artificial";
4634
4635 // Set manual metadata
4636 radiationmodel.setCameraMetadata("manual_camera", metadata);
4637
4638 // Verify it was stored by retrieving it (note: getCameraMetadata re-populates from camera properties,
4639 // so we can only verify setCameraMetadata doesn't throw an exception)
4640 DOCTEST_CHECK(true);
4641 }
4642
4643 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Enable metadata for multiple cameras with vector") {
4644 CameraProperties camera_props;
4645 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(128, 128);
4646 camera_props.HFOV = 30.0f;
4647
4648 // Add three cameras
4649 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("camera_A", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(0, -2, 1), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
4650 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("camera_B", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(2, 0, 1), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
4651 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("camera_C", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(0, 2, 1), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
4652
4653 // Enable metadata for all three cameras using vector overload
4654 std::vector<std::string> camera_labels = {"camera_A", "camera_B", "camera_C"};
4655 radiationmodel.enableCameraMetadata(camera_labels);
4656
4657 // Run simulation
4658 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
4659 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
4660 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_G");
4661 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_B");
4662
4663 // Write images for all cameras and verify JSON files are created
4664 std::vector<std::string> image_paths;
4665 std::vector<std::string> json_paths;
4666
4667 for (const auto &label: camera_labels) {
4668 std::string image_path = radiationmodel.writeCameraImage(label, {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, "test_vector");
4669 DOCTEST_CHECK(!image_path.empty());
4670
4671 std::string json_path = image_path.substr(0, image_path.find_last_of(".")) + ".json";
4672 std::ifstream json_file(json_path);
4673 DOCTEST_CHECK(json_file.is_open());
4674 json_file.close();
4675
4676 image_paths.push_back(image_path);
4677 json_paths.push_back(json_path);
4678 }
4679
4680 // Clean up test files
4681 for (size_t i = 0; i < image_paths.size(); i++) {
4682 std::remove(image_paths[i].c_str());
4683 std::remove(json_paths[i].c_str());
4684 }
4685 }
4686
4687 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("applyCameraImageCorrections stores parameters in metadata") {
4688 // Add geometry
4689 context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(2, 2));
4690
4691 CameraProperties camera_props;
4692 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(128, 128);
4693 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
4694 camera_props.sensor_width_mm = 35.0f;
4695
4696 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("corrections_camera", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(0, -2, 1), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
4697
4698 // Enable automatic metadata JSON export
4699 radiationmodel.enableCameraMetadata("corrections_camera");
4700
4701 // Run simulation
4702 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
4703 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
4704 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_G");
4705 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_B");
4706
4707 // Apply image corrections with non-default values
4708 float saturation = 1.5f;
4709 float brightness = 1.2f;
4710 float contrast = 1.1f;
4711 radiationmodel.applyCameraImageCorrections("corrections_camera", "RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B", saturation, brightness, contrast);
4712
4713 // Write camera image (should automatically write JSON metadata with image_processing)
4714 std::string image_path = radiationmodel.writeCameraImage("corrections_camera", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, "test_corrections");
4715
4716 DOCTEST_CHECK(!image_path.empty());
4717
4718 // Check that JSON file exists and contains image_processing parameters
4719 std::string json_path = image_path.substr(0, image_path.find_last_of(".")) + ".json";
4720 std::ifstream json_file(json_path);
4721 DOCTEST_CHECK(json_file.is_open());
4722
4723 if (json_file.is_open()) {
4724 nlohmann::json j;
4725 json_file >> j;
4726 json_file.close();
4727
4728 // Validate image_processing is a top-level block
4729 DOCTEST_CHECK(j.contains("acquisition_properties"));
4730 DOCTEST_CHECK(j.contains("image_processing"));
4731
4732 // Validate image_processing values
4733 auto &img_proc = j["image_processing"];
4734 DOCTEST_CHECK(img_proc.contains("saturation_adjustment"));
4735 DOCTEST_CHECK(img_proc.contains("brightness_adjustment"));
4736 DOCTEST_CHECK(img_proc.contains("contrast_adjustment"));
4737 DOCTEST_CHECK(img_proc.contains("color_space"));
4738
4739 DOCTEST_CHECK(img_proc["saturation_adjustment"].get<double>() == doctest::Approx(saturation).epsilon(0.01));
4740 DOCTEST_CHECK(img_proc["brightness_adjustment"].get<double>() == doctest::Approx(brightness).epsilon(0.01));
4741 DOCTEST_CHECK(img_proc["contrast_adjustment"].get<double>() == doctest::Approx(contrast).epsilon(0.01));
4742 DOCTEST_CHECK(img_proc["color_space"].get<std::string>() == "sRGB");
4743
4744 // Clean up test files
4745 std::remove(image_path.c_str());
4746 std::remove(json_path.c_str());
4747 }
4748 }
4749}
4750
4751DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Camera Metadata Agronomic Properties") {
4752 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
4753 Context context;
4754
4755 // Set context properties for metadata
4756 context.setDate(15, 6, 2025);
4757 context.setTime(0, 0, 12);
4758 context.setLocation(make_Location(38.0, -120.0, -8.0));
4759
4760 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
4761 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
4762
4763 // Add radiation bands
4764 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("RGB_R");
4765 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("RGB_G");
4766 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("RGB_B");
4767
4768 // Add radiation source
4769 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
4770 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "RGB_R", 100.f);
4771 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "RGB_G", 100.f);
4772 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "RGB_B", 100.f);
4773
4774 // Enable scattering to ensure pixel labeling runs
4775 radiationmodel.setScatteringDepth("RGB_R", 1);
4776 radiationmodel.setScatteringDepth("RGB_G", 1);
4777 radiationmodel.setScatteringDepth("RGB_B", 1);
4778
4779 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Agronomic properties with multiple species and weeds") {
4780 // Create plant objects with different species and weed status
4781 // Bean plants (plantID 1, 2, 3)
4782 uint bean_obj_1 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.2, 0.2), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4783 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_1, "plant_name", std::string("bean"));
4784 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_1, "plantID", 1);
4785 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_1, "plant_type", std::string("crop"));
4786 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_1, "plant_height", 0.45f);
4787 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_1, "age", 30.0f);
4788 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_1, "phenology_stage", std::string("flowering"));
4789 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_1, "reflectivity_SW", 0.3f);
4790
4791 uint bean_obj_2 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(0.5, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.2, 0.2), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4792 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_2, "plant_name", std::string("bean"));
4793 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_2, "plantID", 2);
4794 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_2, "plant_type", std::string("crop"));
4795 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_2, "plant_height", 0.50f);
4796 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_2, "age", 32.0f);
4797 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_2, "phenology_stage", std::string("flowering"));
4798 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_2, "reflectivity_SW", 0.3f);
4799
4800 uint bean_obj_3 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(1.0, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.2, 0.2), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4801 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_3, "plant_name", std::string("bean"));
4802 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_3, "plantID", 3);
4803 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_3, "plant_type", std::string("crop"));
4804 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_3, "plant_height", 0.42f);
4805 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_3, "age", 28.0f);
4806 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_3, "phenology_stage", std::string("flowering"));
4807 context.setObjectData(bean_obj_3, "reflectivity_SW", 0.3f);
4808
4809 // Weed plants (plantID 4, 5)
4810 uint weed_obj_1 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0.5, 0), make_vec2(0.15, 0.15), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4811 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_1, "plant_name", std::string("pigweed"));
4812 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_1, "plantID", 4);
4813 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_1, "plant_type", std::string("weed"));
4814 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_1, "plant_height", 0.30f);
4815 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_1, "age", 15.0f);
4816 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_1, "phenology_stage", std::string("vegetative"));
4817 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_1, "reflectivity_SW", 0.25f);
4818
4819 uint weed_obj_2 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(0.5, 0.5, 0), make_vec2(0.15, 0.15), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4820 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_2, "plant_name", std::string("pigweed"));
4821 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_2, "plantID", 5);
4822 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_2, "plant_type", std::string("weed"));
4823 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_2, "plant_height", 0.35f);
4824 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_2, "age", 18.0f);
4825 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_2, "phenology_stage", std::string("vegetative"));
4826 context.setObjectData(weed_obj_2, "reflectivity_SW", 0.25f);
4827
4828 // Create camera looking down at the scene
4829 CameraProperties camera_props;
4830 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(256, 256);
4831 camera_props.HFOV = 60.0f;
4832 camera_props.sensor_width_mm = 35.0f;
4833
4834 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_camera", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(0.5, 0.25, 3.0), make_vec3(0.5, 0.25, 0), camera_props, 1);
4835
4836 // Run simulation to generate pixel UUID map
4837 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
4838 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
4839 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_G");
4840 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_B");
4841
4842 // Get metadata (should automatically compute agronomic properties from camera pixels)
4843 CameraMetadata metadata = radiationmodel.getCameraMetadata("test_camera");
4844
4845 // Check agronomic properties
4846 DOCTEST_CHECK(!metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_species.empty());
4847 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_species.size() == 2); // bean and pigweed
4848
4849 // Find indices for bean and pigweed
4850 int bean_idx = -1;
4851 int pigweed_idx = -1;
4852 for (size_t i = 0; i < metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_species.size(); i++) {
4853 if (metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_species[i] == "bean") {
4854 bean_idx = static_cast<int>(i);
4855 } else if (metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_species[i] == "pigweed") {
4856 pigweed_idx = static_cast<int>(i);
4857 }
4858 }
4859
4860 DOCTEST_CHECK(bean_idx >= 0);
4861 DOCTEST_CHECK(pigweed_idx >= 0);
4862
4863 // Check plant counts
4864 if (bean_idx >= 0) {
4865 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_count[bean_idx] == 3); // 3 bean plants
4866 }
4867 if (pigweed_idx >= 0) {
4868 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_count[pigweed_idx] == 2); // 2 weed plants
4869 }
4870
4871 // Check weed pressure: 2 weeds out of 5 plants = 40% = "moderate"
4872 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.weed_pressure == "moderate");
4873
4874 // Check new agronomic properties
4875 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_height_m.size() == 2);
4876 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_age_days.size() == 2);
4877 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_stage.size() == 2);
4878 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.leaf_area_m2.size() == 2);
4879
4880 // Check plant height (weighted average per species)
4881 // Bean: (0.45 + 0.50 + 0.42) / 3 ≈ 0.46 (assuming equal pixel weights)
4882 // Pigweed: (0.30 + 0.35) / 2 = 0.325
4883 if (bean_idx >= 0) {
4884 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_height_m[bean_idx] > 0.40f);
4885 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_height_m[bean_idx] < 0.52f);
4886 }
4887 if (pigweed_idx >= 0) {
4888 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_height_m[pigweed_idx] > 0.28f);
4889 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_height_m[pigweed_idx] < 0.37f);
4890 }
4891
4892 // Check plant age (weighted average per species)
4893 // Bean: (30.0 + 32.0 + 28.0) / 3 = 30.0 days
4894 // Pigweed: (15.0 + 18.0) / 2 = 16.5 days
4895 if (bean_idx >= 0) {
4896 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_age_days[bean_idx] > 27.0f);
4897 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_age_days[bean_idx] < 33.0f);
4898 }
4899 if (pigweed_idx >= 0) {
4900 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_age_days[pigweed_idx] > 14.0f);
4901 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_age_days[pigweed_idx] < 19.0f);
4902 }
4903
4904 // Check plant stage (mode - most common phenology stage)
4905 // Bean: all 3 are "flowering" -> mode = "flowering"
4906 // Pigweed: both are "vegetative" -> mode = "vegetative"
4907 if (bean_idx >= 0) {
4908 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_stage[bean_idx] == "flowering");
4909 }
4910 if (pigweed_idx >= 0) {
4911 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_stage[pigweed_idx] == "vegetative");
4912 }
4913
4914 // Check leaf area (should be > 0 for both species)
4915 if (bean_idx >= 0) {
4916 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.leaf_area_m2[bean_idx] > 0.0f);
4917 }
4918 if (pigweed_idx >= 0) {
4919 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.leaf_area_m2[pigweed_idx] > 0.0f);
4920 }
4921 }
4922
4923 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Agronomic properties with low weed pressure") {
4924 // Create 10 crop plants and 1 weed (10% weeds = "low")
4925 for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
4926 uint crop_obj = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(i * 0.3, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.1, 0.1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4927 context.setObjectData(crop_obj, "plant_name", std::string("soybean"));
4928 context.setObjectData(crop_obj, "plantID", i + 1);
4929 context.setObjectData(crop_obj, "plant_type", std::string("crop"));
4930 context.setObjectData(crop_obj, "reflectivity_SW", 0.3f);
4931 }
4932
4933 uint weed_obj = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0.5, 0), make_vec2(0.1, 0.1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4934 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "plant_name", std::string("lambsquarter"));
4935 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "plantID", 11);
4936 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "plant_type", std::string("weed"));
4937 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "reflectivity_SW", 0.25f);
4938
4939 CameraProperties camera_props;
4940 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(512, 256);
4941 camera_props.HFOV = 90.0f;
4942
4943 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("low_weed_camera", {"RGB_R"}, make_vec3(1.5, 0.25, 2.0), make_vec3(1.5, 0.25, 0), camera_props, 1);
4944
4945 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
4946 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
4947
4948 // Get metadata with agronomic properties
4949 CameraMetadata metadata = radiationmodel.getCameraMetadata("low_weed_camera");
4950
4951 // 1 weed out of 11 plants = 9.09% = "low"
4952 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.weed_pressure == "low");
4953 }
4954
4955 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Agronomic properties with high weed pressure") {
4956 // Create 2 crops and 3 weeds (60% weeds = "high")
4957 uint crop_obj_1 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.2, 0.2), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4958 context.setObjectData(crop_obj_1, "plant_name", std::string("corn"));
4959 context.setObjectData(crop_obj_1, "plantID", 1);
4960 context.setObjectData(crop_obj_1, "plant_type", std::string("crop"));
4961 context.setObjectData(crop_obj_1, "reflectivity_SW", 0.3f);
4962
4963 uint crop_obj_2 = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(0.5, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.2, 0.2), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4964 context.setObjectData(crop_obj_2, "plant_name", std::string("corn"));
4965 context.setObjectData(crop_obj_2, "plantID", 2);
4966 context.setObjectData(crop_obj_2, "plant_type", std::string("crop"));
4967 context.setObjectData(crop_obj_2, "reflectivity_SW", 0.3f);
4968
4969 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
4970 uint weed_obj = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(i * 0.3, 0.5, 0), make_vec2(0.15, 0.15), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
4971 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "plant_name", std::string("foxtail"));
4972 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "plantID", 3 + i);
4973 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "plant_type", std::string("weed"));
4974 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "reflectivity_SW", 0.25f);
4975 }
4976
4977 CameraProperties camera_props;
4978 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(256, 256);
4979 camera_props.HFOV = 60.0f;
4980
4981 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("high_weed_camera", {"RGB_R"}, make_vec3(0.5, 0.25, 2.5), make_vec3(0.5, 0.25, 0), camera_props, 1);
4982
4983 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
4984 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
4985
4986 // Get metadata with agronomic properties
4987 CameraMetadata metadata = radiationmodel.getCameraMetadata("high_weed_camera");
4988
4989 // 3 weeds out of 5 plants = 60% = "high"
4990 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.weed_pressure == "high");
4991 }
4992
4993 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Agronomic properties with no plant data") {
4994 // Create objects without plant architecture data
4995 std::vector<uint> patch_UUIDs = context.addTile(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(5, 5));
4996 for (const auto &uuid: patch_UUIDs) {
4997 context.setPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_SW", 0.3f);
4998 }
4999
5000 CameraProperties camera_props;
5001 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(128, 128);
5002 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5003
5004 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("no_data_camera", {"RGB_R"}, make_vec3(0.5, 0.5, 2.0), make_vec3(0.5, 0.5, 0), camera_props, 1);
5005
5006 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
5007 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
5008
5009 // Get metadata with agronomic properties
5010 CameraMetadata metadata = radiationmodel.getCameraMetadata("no_data_camera");
5011
5012 // Should have empty agronomic properties when no plant data exists
5013 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_species.empty());
5014 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.plant_count.empty());
5015 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.agronomic_properties.weed_pressure == "");
5016 }
5017
5018 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Agronomic properties JSON export") {
5019 // Create a simple scene with plants
5020 uint bean_obj = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.3, 0.3), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(3, 3));
5021 context.setObjectData(bean_obj, "plant_name", std::string("bean"));
5022 context.setObjectData(bean_obj, "plantID", 1);
5023 context.setObjectData(bean_obj, "plant_type", std::string("crop"));
5024 context.setObjectData(bean_obj, "reflectivity_SW", 0.3f);
5025
5026 uint weed_obj = context.addTileObject(make_vec3(0.5, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.2, 0.2), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(2, 2));
5027 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "plant_name", std::string("weed"));
5028 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "plantID", 2);
5029 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "plant_type", std::string("weed"));
5030 context.setObjectData(weed_obj, "reflectivity_SW", 0.25f);
5031
5032 CameraProperties camera_props;
5033 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(256, 256);
5034 camera_props.HFOV = 50.0f;
5035
5036 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("json_export_camera", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(0.25, 0, 2.0), make_vec3(0.25, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5037
5038 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
5039 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
5040 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_G");
5041 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_B");
5042
5043 // Enable automatic metadata JSON export
5044 radiationmodel.enableCameraMetadata("json_export_camera");
5045
5046 // Write image (which triggers metadata JSON export)
5047 std::string image_path = radiationmodel.writeCameraImage("json_export_camera", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, "test_agronomic");
5048
5049 // Also verify metadata was populated correctly
5050 CameraMetadata metadata = radiationmodel.getCameraMetadata("json_export_camera");
5051
5052 // Check JSON file
5053 std::string json_path = image_path.substr(0, image_path.find_last_of(".")) + ".json";
5054 std::ifstream json_file(json_path);
5055 DOCTEST_CHECK(json_file.is_open());
5056
5057 if (json_file.is_open()) {
5058 nlohmann::json j;
5059 json_file >> j;
5060 json_file.close();
5061
5062 // Check that agronomic_properties exists
5063 DOCTEST_CHECK(j.contains("agronomic_properties"));
5064
5065 if (j.contains("agronomic_properties")) {
5066 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["agronomic_properties"].contains("plant_species"));
5067 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["agronomic_properties"].contains("plant_count"));
5068 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["agronomic_properties"].contains("weed_pressure"));
5069
5070 // Validate values
5071 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["agronomic_properties"]["plant_species"].is_array());
5072 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["agronomic_properties"]["plant_count"].is_array());
5073 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["agronomic_properties"]["weed_pressure"].is_string());
5074
5075 // 1 weed out of 2 plants = 50% = "high"
5076 DOCTEST_CHECK(j["agronomic_properties"]["weed_pressure"] == "high");
5077 }
5078
5079 // Clean up
5080 std::remove(image_path.c_str());
5081 std::remove(json_path.c_str());
5082 }
5083 }
5084}
5085
5086DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - FOV_aspect_ratio Deprecation") {
5087 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5088
5089 Context context;
5090
5091 // Create a basic radiation model
5092 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5093 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
5094
5095 // Add a radiation band
5096 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("test");
5097
5098 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Default FOV_aspect_ratio is auto-calculated") {
5099 // Create camera with non-square resolution
5100 CameraProperties camera_props;
5101 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(800, 600); // 4:3 aspect ratio
5102 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5103 // FOV_aspect_ratio left at default (0.0)
5104
5105 // Should not produce any warning
5106 std::string stderr_output;
5107 {
5108 capture_cerr captured_cerr;
5109 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_camera_1", {"test"}, make_vec3(0, 0, 2), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5110 stderr_output = captured_cerr.get_captured_output();
5111 } // capture destroyed here
5112 DOCTEST_CHECK(stderr_output.empty());
5113
5114 // Verify FOV_aspect_ratio was auto-calculated correctly
5115 // Expected: 800/600 = 1.333...
5116 float expected_aspect = float(camera_props.camera_resolution.x) / float(camera_props.camera_resolution.y);
5117 DOCTEST_CHECK(std::abs(expected_aspect - 1.333333f) < 0.0001f);
5118 }
5119
5120 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Explicit FOV_aspect_ratio triggers deprecation warning") {
5121 // Create camera with explicit FOV_aspect_ratio
5122 CameraProperties camera_props;
5123 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(640, 480);
5124 camera_props.HFOV = 50.0f;
5125 camera_props.FOV_aspect_ratio = 1.5f; // Explicitly set to non-zero value
5126
5127 // Should produce deprecation warning
5128 std::string stderr_output;
5129 {
5130 capture_cerr captured_cerr;
5131 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_camera_2", {"test"}, make_vec3(0, 0, 2), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5132 stderr_output = captured_cerr.get_captured_output();
5133 } // capture destroyed here
5134 DOCTEST_CHECK(stderr_output.find("WARNING") != std::string::npos);
5135 DOCTEST_CHECK(stderr_output.find("FOV_aspect_ratio") != std::string::npos);
5136 DOCTEST_CHECK(stderr_output.find("deprecated") != std::string::npos);
5137 DOCTEST_CHECK(stderr_output.find("auto-calculated") != std::string::npos);
5138 }
5139
5140 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Auto-calculated value ensures square pixels") {
5141 // Create cameras with various resolutions
5142 std::vector<helios::int2> resolutions = {
5143 make_int2(1920, 1080), // 16:9
5144 make_int2(1024, 768), // 4:3
5145 make_int2(512, 512), // 1:1
5146 make_int2(640, 480) // 4:3
5147 };
5148
5149 for (const auto &resolution: resolutions) {
5150 CameraProperties camera_props;
5151 camera_props.camera_resolution = resolution;
5152 camera_props.HFOV = 60.0f;
5153 // FOV_aspect_ratio left at default (0.0)
5154
5155 std::string camera_label = "camera_" + std::to_string(resolution.x) + "x" + std::to_string(resolution.y);
5156
5157 // Should not produce any warning
5158 std::string stderr_output;
5159 {
5160 capture_cerr captured_cerr;
5161 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera(camera_label, {"test"}, make_vec3(0, 0, 2), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5162 stderr_output = captured_cerr.get_captured_output();
5163 } // capture destroyed here
5164 DOCTEST_CHECK(stderr_output.empty());
5165 }
5166 }
5167}
5168
5169DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Atmospheric Sky Model for Camera") {
5170 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5171 // Test that atmospheric sky radiance model is computed when cameras are present
5172 // and that atmospheric parameters from SolarPosition plugin are used correctly
5173
5174 Context context;
5175
5176 // Create simple geometry
5177 uint UUID = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
5178 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "temperature", 300.f);
5179
5180 // Set atmospheric conditions (as would be set by SolarPosition plugin)
5181 float pressure_Pa = 95000.f; // Lower pressure (higher altitude)
5182 float temperature_K = 285.f; // Cooler temperature
5183 float humidity_rel = 0.6f; // 60% humidity
5184 float turbidity = 0.08f; // Moderately turbid (AOD at 500nm)
5185
5186 context.setGlobalData("atmosphere_pressure_Pa", pressure_Pa);
5187 context.setGlobalData("atmosphere_temperature_K", temperature_K);
5188 context.setGlobalData("atmosphere_humidity_rel", humidity_rel);
5189 context.setGlobalData("atmosphere_turbidity", turbidity);
5190
5191 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5192 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
5193
5194 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Sky model requires wavelength bounds with uniform response") {
5195 // Test that error is thrown if wavelength bounds not set for uniform camera response
5196 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("VIS"); // No wavelength bounds - will cause error
5197 radiationmodel.setScatteringDepth("VIS", 1); // Enable scattering so camera rendering code path is executed
5198 radiationmodel.setDirectRayCount("VIS", 100);
5199 radiationmodel.setDiffuseRayCount("VIS", 100);
5200 radiationmodel.disableEmission("VIS");
5201 radiationmodel.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("VIS", 100.f);
5202
5203 // Add sun source
5204 uint SunSource = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
5205 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(SunSource, "VIS", 1000.f);
5206
5207 // Add camera without setting wavelength bounds (will cause error)
5208 CameraProperties camera_props;
5209 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(100, 100);
5210 camera_props.HFOV = 60.0f;
5211 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_camera", {"VIS"}, make_vec3(0, 0, 5), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 10);
5212
5213 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
5214
5215 // Should throw error about missing wavelength bounds
5216 // Suppress expected Prague sky model warning (no SolarPosition data available)
5217 bool threw_error = false;
5218 {
5219 capture_cerr capture;
5220 try {
5221 radiationmodel.runBand("VIS");
5222 } catch (std::runtime_error &e) {
5223 std::string error_msg = e.what();
5224 threw_error = (error_msg.find("wavelength bounds") != std::string::npos);
5225 }
5226 }
5227 DOCTEST_CHECK(threw_error);
5228 }
5229
5230 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Sky model computed with camera and wavelength bounds") {
5231 // Add radiation band with wavelength bounds
5232 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("VIS", 400.f, 700.f); // Set wavelength bounds in constructor
5233 radiationmodel.setDirectRayCount("VIS", 100);
5234 radiationmodel.setDiffuseRayCount("VIS", 100);
5235 radiationmodel.disableEmission("VIS");
5236 radiationmodel.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("VIS", 100.f); // Set some diffuse flux for sky
5237
5238 // Add sun source (suppress expected "multiple sun sources" warning from previous subcase)
5239 uint SunSource;
5240 {
5241 capture_cerr capture;
5242 SunSource = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0.5, 0.3, 0.8));
5243 }
5244 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(SunSource, "VIS", 1000.f);
5245
5246 // Add camera
5247 CameraProperties camera_props;
5248 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(100, 100);
5249 camera_props.HFOV = 60.0f;
5250 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_camera", {"VIS"}, make_vec3(0, 0, 5), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 10);
5251
5252 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
5253
5254 // Run with camera - should compute atmospheric sky model
5255 // Suppress expected warning about Prague sky model not being available
5256 {
5257 capture_cerr capture;
5258 radiationmodel.runBand("VIS");
5259 }
5260
5261 // If we get here without crashing, the atmospheric sky model was successfully computed
5262 DOCTEST_CHECK(true);
5263 }
5264
5265 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Atmospheric parameters do not cause errors") {
5266 // Test that changing atmospheric parameters doesn't cause errors
5267 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("VIS", 400.f, 700.f); // Set wavelength bounds in constructor
5268 radiationmodel.setDirectRayCount("VIS", 0); // No direct rays
5269 radiationmodel.setDiffuseRayCount("VIS", 0);
5270 radiationmodel.disableEmission("VIS");
5271 radiationmodel.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("VIS", 100.f);
5272
5273 // Add camera looking at sky (no geometry in view)
5274 CameraProperties camera_props;
5275 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(50, 50);
5276 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5277 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("sky_camera", {"VIS"}, make_vec3(10, 10, 10), make_vec3(0, 0, 1), camera_props, 50);
5278
5279 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
5280 radiationmodel.runBand("VIS");
5281
5282 // Now change turbidity (higher turbidity = more scattering)
5283 // Typical values: 0.03-0.05 (very clear), 0.1 (clear), 0.2-0.3 (hazy), >0.4 (very hazy)
5284 float high_turbidity = 0.3f; // Hazy conditions (AOD at 500nm)
5285 context.setGlobalData("atmosphere_turbidity", high_turbidity);
5286
5287 radiationmodel.runBand("VIS");
5288
5289 // If we get here, the atmospheric model successfully handled parameter changes
5290 DOCTEST_CHECK(true);
5291 }
5292}
5293
5294DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Camera White Balance") {
5295 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5296 Context context;
5297
5298 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5299 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
5300
5301 // Add a simple surface for the camera to image
5302 uint uuid = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
5303 context.setPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_SW", 0.5f);
5304
5305 // Add radiation bands
5306 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("RGB_R");
5307 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("RGB_G");
5308 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("RGB_B");
5309
5310 // Add radiation source
5311 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
5312 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "RGB_R", 100.f);
5313 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "RGB_G", 150.f); // Different flux to create white balance imbalance
5314 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "RGB_B", 80.f);
5315
5316 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Default white_balance is 'auto'") {
5317 // Create camera with default properties
5318 CameraProperties camera_props;
5319 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(256, 256);
5320 camera_props.focal_plane_distance = 2.0f;
5321 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5322
5323 // Verify default is "auto"
5324 DOCTEST_CHECK(camera_props.white_balance == "auto");
5325
5326 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_camera", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(0, -5, 2), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5327
5328 // Verify camera has "auto" white balance
5329 CameraProperties retrieved_props = radiationmodel.getCameraParameters("test_camera");
5330 DOCTEST_CHECK(retrieved_props.white_balance == "auto");
5331 }
5332
5333 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("White balance mode 'off' preserves raw data") {
5334 // Create camera with white balance off
5335 CameraProperties camera_props;
5336 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(256, 256);
5337 camera_props.focal_plane_distance = 2.0f;
5338 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5339 camera_props.white_balance = "off";
5340
5341 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("camera_wb_off", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(0, -5, 2), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5342
5343 // Run simulation
5344 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
5345 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
5346 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_G");
5347 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_B");
5348
5349 // Verify white balance mode in metadata
5350 CameraMetadata metadata = radiationmodel.getCameraMetadata("camera_wb_off");
5351 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.white_balance == "off");
5352
5353 // The test passes if we get here without errors
5354 DOCTEST_CHECK(true);
5355 }
5356
5357 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("White balance mode 'auto' applies correction") {
5358 // Create camera with white balance auto
5359 CameraProperties camera_props;
5360 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(256, 256);
5361 camera_props.focal_plane_distance = 2.0f;
5362 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5363 camera_props.white_balance = "auto";
5364
5365 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("camera_wb_auto", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(0, -5, 2), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5366
5367 // Run simulation
5368 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
5369 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
5370 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_G");
5371 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_B");
5372
5373 // Verify white balance mode in metadata
5374 CameraMetadata metadata = radiationmodel.getCameraMetadata("camera_wb_auto");
5375 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.white_balance == "auto");
5376
5377 // The test passes if we get here without errors
5378 DOCTEST_CHECK(true);
5379 }
5380
5381 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Single-channel camera skips white balance") {
5382 // Create single-channel camera
5383 CameraProperties camera_props;
5384 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(256, 256);
5385 camera_props.focal_plane_distance = 2.0f;
5386 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5387 camera_props.white_balance = "auto"; // Set to auto, but should skip for 1-channel
5388
5389 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("camera_1ch", {"RGB_R"}, make_vec3(0, -5, 2), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5390
5391 // Run simulation
5392 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
5393 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
5394
5395 // Verify camera has 1 channel
5396 CameraMetadata metadata = radiationmodel.getCameraMetadata("camera_1ch");
5397 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.channels == 1);
5398 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.white_balance == "auto");
5399
5400 // The test passes if we get here without errors (white balance should be skipped silently)
5401 DOCTEST_CHECK(true);
5402 }
5403
5404 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Update camera white_balance parameter") {
5405 // Create camera with default settings
5406 CameraProperties camera_props;
5407 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(256, 256);
5408 camera_props.focal_plane_distance = 2.0f;
5409 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5410 camera_props.white_balance = "auto";
5411
5412 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("camera_update", {"RGB_R", "RGB_G", "RGB_B"}, make_vec3(0, -5, 2), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5413
5414 // Update to "off"
5415 CameraProperties updated_props = radiationmodel.getCameraParameters("camera_update");
5416 updated_props.white_balance = "off";
5417 radiationmodel.updateCameraParameters("camera_update", updated_props);
5418
5419 // Verify update
5420 CameraProperties retrieved_props = radiationmodel.getCameraParameters("camera_update");
5421 DOCTEST_CHECK(retrieved_props.white_balance == "off");
5422
5423 // Run simulation with updated settings
5424 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
5425 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_R");
5426 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_G");
5427 radiationmodel.runBand("RGB_B");
5428
5429 // Verify metadata reflects the update
5430 CameraMetadata metadata = radiationmodel.getCameraMetadata("camera_update");
5431 DOCTEST_CHECK(metadata.camera_properties.white_balance == "off");
5432 }
5433
5434 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("CameraProperties equality includes white_balance") {
5435 CameraProperties props1;
5436 props1.white_balance = "auto";
5437
5438 CameraProperties props2;
5439 props2.white_balance = "auto";
5440
5441 // Should be equal
5442 DOCTEST_CHECK(props1 == props2);
5443
5444 // Change white_balance
5445 props2.white_balance = "off";
5446
5447 // Should not be equal
5448 DOCTEST_CHECK(props1 != props2);
5449 }
5450}
5451
5452DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel setDiffuseSpectrum and emission band behavior") {
5453 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5454
5455 using namespace helios;
5456
5457 Context context;
5458
5459 // Create some spectral data for testing
5460 std::vector<vec2> test_spectrum;
5461 test_spectrum.emplace_back(400.f, 1.0f);
5462 test_spectrum.emplace_back(500.f, 1.5f);
5463 test_spectrum.emplace_back(600.f, 1.0f);
5464 test_spectrum.emplace_back(700.f, 0.5f);
5465 context.setGlobalData("test_spectrum", test_spectrum);
5466
5467 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5468 radiation.disableMessages();
5469
5470 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("setDiffuseSpectrum applies to all bands") {
5471 // Add multiple bands with wavelength bounds
5472 radiation.addRadiationBand("band1", 400.f, 500.f);
5473 radiation.addRadiationBand("band2", 500.f, 600.f);
5474 radiation.addRadiationBand("band3", 600.f, 700.f);
5475
5476 // Disable emission for all bands (shortwave bands)
5477 radiation.disableEmission("band1");
5478 radiation.disableEmission("band2");
5479 radiation.disableEmission("band3");
5480
5481 // Set spectrum for all bands at once
5482 radiation.setDiffuseSpectrum("test_spectrum");
5483
5484 // All bands should have non-zero diffuse flux from spectrum
5485 float flux1 = radiation.getDiffuseFlux("band1");
5486 float flux2 = radiation.getDiffuseFlux("band2");
5487 float flux3 = radiation.getDiffuseFlux("band3");
5488
5489 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux1 > 0.f);
5490 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux2 > 0.f);
5491 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux3 > 0.f);
5492 }
5493
5494 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("getDiffuseFlux returns 0 for emission-enabled bands with spectrum") {
5495 // Add a band with emission enabled (default)
5496 radiation.addRadiationBand("emission_band", 400.f, 700.f);
5497
5498 // Set spectrum (but emission is enabled, so it should be ignored)
5499 radiation.setDiffuseSpectrum("test_spectrum");
5500
5501 // Emission-enabled band should return 0 for diffuse flux when using spectrum
5502 float flux = radiation.getDiffuseFlux("emission_band");
5503 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux == 0.f);
5504 }
5505
5506 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("getDiffuseFlux returns manual flux for emission-enabled bands") {
5507 // Add a band with emission enabled (default)
5508 radiation.addRadiationBand("emission_band", 400.f, 700.f);
5509
5510 // Set spectrum (will be ignored for emission band)
5511 radiation.setDiffuseSpectrum("test_spectrum");
5512
5513 // Set manual flux for the emission band
5514 float manual_flux = 100.f;
5515 radiation.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("emission_band", manual_flux);
5516
5517 // Should return the manual flux, not 0
5518 float flux = radiation.getDiffuseFlux("emission_band");
5519 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux == manual_flux);
5520 }
5521
5522 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Manual flux overrides spectrum for non-emission bands") {
5523 // Add a band and disable emission
5524 radiation.addRadiationBand("shortwave", 400.f, 700.f);
5525 radiation.disableEmission("shortwave");
5526
5527 // Set spectrum
5528 radiation.setDiffuseSpectrum("test_spectrum");
5529
5530 // Get spectrum-based flux
5531 float spectrum_flux = radiation.getDiffuseFlux("shortwave");
5532 DOCTEST_CHECK(spectrum_flux > 0.f);
5533
5534 // Set manual flux - should override spectrum
5535 float manual_flux = 999.f;
5536 radiation.setDiffuseRadiationFlux("shortwave", manual_flux);
5537
5538 float flux = radiation.getDiffuseFlux("shortwave");
5539 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux == manual_flux);
5540 }
5541
5542 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("setDiffuseSpectrum with no bands does not error") {
5543 // Create a fresh radiation model with no bands
5544 Context context2;
5545 context2.setGlobalData("test_spectrum", test_spectrum);
5546 RadiationModel radiation2 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context2);
5547 radiation2.disableMessages();
5548
5549 // Should not throw when called with no bands
5550 radiation2.setDiffuseSpectrum("test_spectrum");
5551 DOCTEST_CHECK(true); // If we get here, no exception was thrown
5552 }
5553
5554 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("setDiffuseSpectrum before bands are added applies to later bands") {
5555 // Create a fresh radiation model with no bands
5556 Context context2;
5557 context2.setGlobalData("test_spectrum", test_spectrum);
5558 RadiationModel radiation2 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context2);
5559 radiation2.disableMessages();
5560
5561 // Set spectrum BEFORE adding bands
5562 radiation2.setDiffuseSpectrum("test_spectrum");
5563
5564 // Now add bands
5565 radiation2.addRadiationBand("band1", 400.f, 500.f);
5566 radiation2.addRadiationBand("band2", 500.f, 600.f);
5567
5568 // Disable emission for these bands
5569 radiation2.disableEmission("band1");
5570 radiation2.disableEmission("band2");
5571
5572 // Bands added after setDiffuseSpectrum should have the spectrum applied
5573 float flux1 = radiation2.getDiffuseFlux("band1");
5574 float flux2 = radiation2.getDiffuseFlux("band2");
5575
5576 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux1 > 0.f);
5577 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux2 > 0.f);
5578 }
5579
5580 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("setDiffuseSpectrumIntegral scales global spectrum before bands are added") {
5581 // Create a fresh radiation model with no bands
5582 Context context2;
5583 context2.setGlobalData("test_spectrum", test_spectrum);
5584 RadiationModel radiation2 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context2);
5585 radiation2.disableMessages();
5586
5587 // Set spectrum and integral BEFORE adding bands
5588 radiation2.setDiffuseSpectrum("test_spectrum");
5589 float target_integral = 850.f;
5590 radiation2.setDiffuseSpectrumIntegral(target_integral);
5591
5592 // Now add bands that cover the full spectrum range
5593 radiation2.addRadiationBand("full", 400.f, 700.f);
5594 radiation2.disableEmission("full");
5595
5596 // The diffuse flux for the full band should be close to the target integral
5597 // (accounting for the fact that the band only covers 400-700nm of the spectrum)
5598 float flux = radiation2.getDiffuseFlux("full");
5599
