5600 // The test spectrum covers 400-700nm, so the full band should get the full integral
5601 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux == doctest::Approx(target_integral).epsilon(0.01));
5602 }
5603
5604 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("setDiffuseSpectrumIntegral with wavelength bounds scales global spectrum") {
5605 // Create a fresh radiation model with no bands
5606 Context context2;
5607 context2.setGlobalData("test_spectrum", test_spectrum);
5608 RadiationModel radiation2 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context2);
5609 radiation2.disableMessages();
5610
5611 // Set spectrum and integral with wavelength bounds BEFORE adding bands
5612 radiation2.setDiffuseSpectrum("test_spectrum");
5613 float target_integral = 500.f;
5614 radiation2.setDiffuseSpectrumIntegral(target_integral, 500.f, 600.f);
5615
5616 // Now add a band that covers only the 500-600nm range
5617 radiation2.addRadiationBand("partial", 500.f, 600.f);
5618 radiation2.disableEmission("partial");
5619
5620 // The diffuse flux for this band should be close to the target integral
5621 float flux = radiation2.getDiffuseFlux("partial");
5622 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux == doctest::Approx(target_integral).epsilon(0.01));
5623 }
5624
5625 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("setDiffuseSpectrumIntegral applies to existing bands") {
5626 // Add bands first, then set spectrum and integral
5627 radiation.addRadiationBand("band1", 400.f, 700.f);
5628 radiation.disableEmission("band1");
5629
5630 radiation.setDiffuseSpectrum("test_spectrum");
5631 float target_integral = 1000.f;
5632 radiation.setDiffuseSpectrumIntegral(target_integral);
5633
5634 float flux = radiation.getDiffuseFlux("band1");
5635 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux == doctest::Approx(target_integral).epsilon(0.01));
5636 }
5637}
5638
5639// ===== Prague Sky Model Integration Tests =====
5640
5641DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("Radiation - Prague Context data fallback behavior") {
5642 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5643 Context context;
5644 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5645 radiation.disableMessages();
5646
5647 // Add a simple camera with RGB bands
5648 radiation.addRadiationBand("red");
5649 radiation.addRadiationBand("green");
5650 radiation.addRadiationBand("blue");
5651
5652 // Create simple test geometry
5653 uint UUID = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
5654 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "radiation_flux_red", 0.f);
5655 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "radiation_flux_green", 0.f);
5656 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "radiation_flux_blue", 0.f);
5657
5658 CameraProperties camera_props;
5659 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(64, 64);
5660 camera_props.focal_plane_distance = 2.0f;
5661 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5662
5663 radiation.addRadiationCamera("test_camera", {"red", "green", "blue"}, make_vec3(0, -3, 2), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5664
5665 // Try to update geometry without Prague data
5666 // Should fall back to uniform sky with warning (not crash)
5667 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(radiation.updateGeometry());
5668}
5669
5670DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("Radiation - Prague Context data integration end-to-end") {
5671 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5672 Context context;
5673 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5674 radiation.disableMessages();
5675
5676 // Mock Prague data in Context (simulating what SolarPosition would provide)
5677 // Create realistic spectral parameters with Rayleigh-like spectrum: 225 wavelengths × 6 params
5678 std::vector<float> spectral_params(225 * 6);
5679 for (int i = 0; i < 225; ++i) {
5680 float wavelength = 360.0f + i * 5.0f;
5681 int base = i * 6;
5682
5683 // Rayleigh spectrum: blue sky with λ^-4 dependence
5684 float rayleigh_factor = std::pow(550.0f / wavelength, 4.0f);
5685
5686 spectral_params[base + 0] = wavelength;
5687 spectral_params[base + 1] = 0.3f * rayleigh_factor; // L_zenith (W/m²/sr/nm) - blue-heavy
5688 spectral_params[base + 2] = 2.0f; // circ_str
5689 spectral_params[base + 3] = 15.0f; // circ_width (degrees)
5690 spectral_params[base + 4] = 2.0f; // horiz_bright
5691 spectral_params[base + 5] = 0.8f; // normalization
5692 }
5693
5694 context.setGlobalData("prague_sky_spectral_params", spectral_params);
5695 context.setGlobalData("prague_sky_sun_direction", make_vec3(0, 0.5f, 0.866f));
5696 context.setGlobalData("prague_sky_visibility_km", 40.0f);
5697 context.setGlobalData("prague_sky_ground_albedo", 0.33f);
5698 context.setGlobalData("prague_sky_valid", 1);
5699
5700 // Verify Prague data is in Context
5701 int valid = 0;
5702 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(context.getGlobalData("prague_sky_valid", valid));
5703 DOCTEST_CHECK(valid == 1);
5704
5705 std::vector<float> read_params;
5706 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(context.getGlobalData("prague_sky_spectral_params", read_params));
5707 DOCTEST_CHECK(read_params.size() == 225 * 6);
5708
5709 // Setup radiation with RGB bands
5710 radiation.addRadiationBand("red");
5711 radiation.addRadiationBand("green");
5712 radiation.addRadiationBand("blue");
5713
5714 // Create test geometry
5715 uint UUID = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
5716 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "radiation_flux_red", 0.f);
5717 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "radiation_flux_green", 0.f);
5718 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "radiation_flux_blue", 0.f);
5719
5720 CameraProperties camera_props;
5721 camera_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(64, 64);
5722 camera_props.focal_plane_distance = 2.0f;
5723 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5724
5725 radiation.addRadiationCamera("test_camera", {"red", "green", "blue"}, make_vec3(0, -3, 2), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5726
5727 // Update geometry - should read Prague data from Context (no warning)
5728 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(radiation.updateGeometry());
5729}
5730
5731DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Automatic Spectrum Update Detection") {
5732 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5733
5734 helios::Context context;
5735 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5736 radiation.disableMessages();
5737
5738 // Create initial direct spectrum
5739 std::vector<helios::vec2> direct_spectrum_v1 = {{300, 1.0}, {400, 2.0}, {500, 3.0}, {700, 2.0}, {800, 1.0}};
5740 context.setGlobalData("test_direct_spectrum", direct_spectrum_v1);
5741
5742 // Create initial diffuse spectrum
5743 std::vector<helios::vec2> diffuse_spectrum_v1 = {{300, 0.5}, {400, 1.0}, {500, 1.5}, {700, 1.0}, {800, 0.5}};
5744 context.setGlobalData("test_diffuse_spectrum", diffuse_spectrum_v1);
5745
5746 // Add radiation source with spectrum label
5747 uint sun = radiation.addCollimatedRadiationSource(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
5748 radiation.setSourceSpectrum(sun, "test_direct_spectrum");
5749
5750 // Set diffuse spectrum
5751 radiation.setDiffuseSpectrum("test_diffuse_spectrum");
5752
5753 // Add radiation band
5754 radiation.addRadiationBand("PAR", 400, 700);
5755
5756 // Add simple geometry
5757 uint ground = context.addPatch(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), helios::make_vec2(10, 10));
5758 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
5759
5760 // Run first simulation
5761 radiation.updateGeometry();
5762 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(radiation.runBand("PAR"));
5763
5764 float flux_v1;
5765 context.getPrimitiveData(ground, "radiation_flux_PAR", flux_v1);
5766 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux_v1 > 0.0f);
5767
5768 // Update direct spectrum in global data (double the flux)
5769 std::vector<helios::vec2> direct_spectrum_v2 = {{300, 2.0}, {400, 4.0}, {500, 6.0}, {700, 4.0}, {800, 2.0}};
5770 context.setGlobalData("test_direct_spectrum", direct_spectrum_v2);
5771
5772 // Run second simulation WITHOUT calling setSourceSpectrum() again
5773 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(radiation.runBand("PAR"));
5774
5775 float flux_v2;
5776 context.getPrimitiveData(ground, "radiation_flux_PAR", flux_v2);
5777
5778 // Flux should have doubled (with some tolerance for integration)
5779 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux_v2 > flux_v1 * 1.9f);
5780 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux_v2 < flux_v1 * 2.1f);
5781
5782 // Update diffuse spectrum in global data (triple the flux)
5783 std::vector<helios::vec2> diffuse_spectrum_v2 = {{300, 1.5}, {400, 3.0}, {500, 4.5}, {700, 3.0}, {800, 1.5}};
5784 context.setGlobalData("test_diffuse_spectrum", diffuse_spectrum_v2);
5785
5786 // Run third simulation WITHOUT calling setDiffuseSpectrum() again
5787 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(radiation.runBand("PAR"));
5788
5789 float flux_v3;
5790 context.getPrimitiveData(ground, "radiation_flux_PAR", flux_v3);
5791
5792 // Note: Diffuse contribution may be small in this simple test geometry
5793 // The important test is that direct spectrum update worked (verified above)
5794 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux_v3 >= flux_v2 * 0.99f); // Allow for small numerical differences
5795}
5796
5797DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel Multiple Sources Same Spectrum Update") {
5798 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5799
5800 helios::Context context;
5801 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5802 radiation.disableMessages();
5803
5804 // Create spectrum used by multiple sources
5805 std::vector<helios::vec2> shared_spectrum = {{300, 1.0}, {800, 1.0}};
5806 context.setGlobalData("shared_spectrum", shared_spectrum);
5807
5808 // Add multiple sources all using same spectrum
5809 // Suppress expected warnings about multiple sun sources
5810 {
5811 capture_cerr capture;
5812 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
5813 uint source = radiation.addCollimatedRadiationSource(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
5814 radiation.setSourceSpectrum(source, "shared_spectrum");
5815 }
5816 }
5817
5818 radiation.addRadiationBand("test", 400, 700);
5819
5820 uint ground = context.addPatch(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), helios::make_vec2(10, 10));
5821 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
5822
5823 radiation.updateGeometry();
5824 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(radiation.runBand("test"));
5825
5826 float flux_v1;
5827 context.getPrimitiveData(ground, "radiation_flux_test", flux_v1);
5828 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux_v1 > 0.0f);
5829
5830 // Update the shared spectrum
5831 std::vector<helios::vec2> updated_spectrum = {{300, 2.0}, {800, 2.0}};
5832 context.setGlobalData("shared_spectrum", updated_spectrum);
5833
5834 // Run again - all sources should use updated spectrum
5835 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(radiation.runBand("test"));
5836
5837 float flux_v2;
5838 context.getPrimitiveData(ground, "radiation_flux_test", flux_v2);
5839
5840 // All 3 sources doubled, so total flux should roughly double
5841 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux_v2 > flux_v1 * 1.8f);
5842}
5843
5844DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel No Update When Spectrum Unchanged") {
5845 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5846
5847 helios::Context context;
5848 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5849 radiation.disableMessages();
5850
5851 // Create spectrum
5852 std::vector<helios::vec2> spectrum = {{300, 1.0}, {800, 1.0}};
5853 context.setGlobalData("test_spectrum", spectrum);
5854
5855 uint source = radiation.addCollimatedRadiationSource(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
5856 radiation.setSourceSpectrum(source, "test_spectrum");
5857 radiation.addRadiationBand("test", 400, 700);
5858
5859 uint ground = context.addPatch(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), helios::make_vec2(10, 10));
5860 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
5861
5862 radiation.updateGeometry();
5863 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(radiation.runBand("test"));
5864
5865 // Run again WITHOUT changing spectrum - should not recompute radiative properties
5866 // (This is validated internally - if version hasn't changed, radiativepropertiesneedupdate stays false)
5867 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(radiation.runBand("test"));
5868
5869 float flux;
5870 context.getPrimitiveData(ground, "radiation_flux_test", flux);
5871 DOCTEST_CHECK(flux > 0.0f);
5872}
5873
5874DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - CameraProperties default camera_zoom") {
5875 CameraProperties props;
5876 DOCTEST_CHECK(props.camera_zoom == 1.0f);
5877}
5878
5879DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - CameraProperties equality with camera_zoom") {
5880 CameraProperties props1;
5881 CameraProperties props2;
5882
5883 DOCTEST_CHECK(props1 == props2); // Both have default camera_zoom = 1.0
5884
5885 props1.camera_zoom = 2.0f;
5886 DOCTEST_CHECK(props1 != props2); // Different zoom values
5887
5888 props2.camera_zoom = 2.0f;
5889 DOCTEST_CHECK(props1 == props2); // Same zoom values again
5890}
5891
5892DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - camera_zoom validation in updateCameraParameters") {
5893 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5894 Context context;
5895 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5896 radiation.disableMessages();
5897
5898 CameraProperties props;
5899 props.camera_resolution = make_int2(100, 100);
5900 props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5901 props.camera_zoom = 1.0f;
5902
5903 std::vector<std::string> bands = {"R"};
5904 radiation.addRadiationCamera("test_cam", bands, make_vec3(0, 0, 5), make_vec3(0, 0, -1), props, 1);
5905
5906 // Try to update with invalid zoom (0.0)
5907 CameraProperties invalid = radiation.getCameraParameters("test_cam");
5908 invalid.camera_zoom = 0.0f;
5909
5910 DOCTEST_CHECK_THROWS_WITH_AS(radiation.updateCameraParameters("test_cam", invalid), "ERROR (RadiationModel::updateCameraParameters): camera_zoom must be greater than 0.", std::runtime_error);
5911
5912 // Try to update with invalid zoom (negative)
5913 invalid.camera_zoom = -1.0f;
5914 DOCTEST_CHECK_THROWS_WITH_AS(radiation.updateCameraParameters("test_cam", invalid), "ERROR (RadiationModel::updateCameraParameters): camera_zoom must be greater than 0.", std::runtime_error);
5915}
5916
5917DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - camera_zoom parameter get/set") {
5918 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5919 Context context;
5920 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5921 radiation.disableMessages();
5922
5923 CameraProperties props;
5924 props.camera_resolution = make_int2(100, 100);
5925 props.HFOV = 60.0f;
5926 props.camera_zoom = 3.5f;
5927
5928 std::vector<std::string> bands = {"R", "G", "B"};
5929 radiation.addRadiationCamera("test_cam", bands, make_vec3(0, 0, 5), make_vec3(0, 0, -1), props, 1);
5930
5931 CameraProperties retrieved = radiation.getCameraParameters("test_cam");
5932 DOCTEST_CHECK(retrieved.camera_zoom == 3.5f);
5933 DOCTEST_CHECK(retrieved.HFOV == 60.0f); // Base HFOV unchanged
5934}
5935
5936DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - update camera_zoom") {
5937 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5938 Context context;
5939 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5940 radiation.disableMessages();
5941
5942 CameraProperties props;
5943 props.camera_resolution = make_int2(100, 100);
5944 props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5945 props.camera_zoom = 1.0f;
5946
5947 std::vector<std::string> bands = {"R"};
5948 radiation.addRadiationCamera("test_cam", bands, make_vec3(0, 0, 5), make_vec3(0, 0, -1), props, 1);
5949
5950 // Update camera_zoom
5951 CameraProperties updated = radiation.getCameraParameters("test_cam");
5952 updated.camera_zoom = 2.5f;
5953 radiation.updateCameraParameters("test_cam", updated);
5954
5955 CameraProperties final_props = radiation.getCameraParameters("test_cam");
5956 DOCTEST_CHECK(final_props.camera_zoom == 2.5f);
5957 DOCTEST_CHECK(final_props.HFOV == 45.0f); // Base HFOV should remain unchanged
5958}
5959DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("Lens Flare - Enable/Disable API") {
5960 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5961 helios::Context context;
5962 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5963
5964 // Add a camera
5965 CameraProperties camera_props;
5966 camera_props.camera_resolution = helios::make_int2(64, 64);
5967 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5968 radiation.addRadiationCamera("test_camera", {"red", "green", "blue"}, helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 5), helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5969
5970 // Test default state is disabled
5971 DOCTEST_CHECK(!radiation.isCameraLensFlareEnabled("test_camera"));
5972
5973 // Test enabling
5974 radiation.enableCameraLensFlare("test_camera");
5975 DOCTEST_CHECK(radiation.isCameraLensFlareEnabled("test_camera"));
5976
5977 // Test disabling
5978 radiation.disableCameraLensFlare("test_camera");
5979 DOCTEST_CHECK(!radiation.isCameraLensFlareEnabled("test_camera"));
5980
5981 // Test error for non-existent camera
5982 DOCTEST_CHECK_THROWS(radiation.enableCameraLensFlare("nonexistent_camera"));
5983 DOCTEST_CHECK_THROWS(radiation.disableCameraLensFlare("nonexistent_camera"));
5984 DOCTEST_CHECK_THROWS((void) radiation.isCameraLensFlareEnabled("nonexistent_camera"));
5985}
5986
5987DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("Lens Flare - Properties API") {
5988 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
5989 helios::Context context;
5990 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
5991
5992 // Add a camera
5993 CameraProperties camera_props;
5994 camera_props.camera_resolution = helios::make_int2(64, 64);
5995 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
5996 radiation.addRadiationCamera("test_camera", {"red", "green", "blue"}, helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 5), helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
5997
5998 // Test default properties
5999 LensFlareProperties default_props = radiation.getCameraLensFlareProperties("test_camera");
6000 DOCTEST_CHECK(default_props.aperture_blade_count == 6);
6001 DOCTEST_CHECK(default_props.coating_efficiency == doctest::Approx(0.96f));
6002 DOCTEST_CHECK(default_props.ghost_intensity == doctest::Approx(1.0f));
6003 DOCTEST_CHECK(default_props.starburst_intensity == doctest::Approx(1.0f));
6004 DOCTEST_CHECK(default_props.intensity_threshold == doctest::Approx(0.8f));
6005 DOCTEST_CHECK(default_props.ghost_count == 5);
6006
6007 // Test setting properties
6008 LensFlareProperties custom_props;
6009 custom_props.aperture_blade_count = 8;
6010 custom_props.coating_efficiency = 0.98f;
6011 custom_props.ghost_intensity = 0.5f;
6012 custom_props.starburst_intensity = 0.75f;
6013 custom_props.intensity_threshold = 0.9f;
6014 custom_props.ghost_count = 3;
6015
6016 radiation.setCameraLensFlareProperties("test_camera", custom_props);
6017 LensFlareProperties retrieved_props = radiation.getCameraLensFlareProperties("test_camera");
6018
6019 DOCTEST_CHECK(retrieved_props.aperture_blade_count == 8);
6020 DOCTEST_CHECK(retrieved_props.coating_efficiency == doctest::Approx(0.98f));
6021 DOCTEST_CHECK(retrieved_props.ghost_intensity == doctest::Approx(0.5f));
6022 DOCTEST_CHECK(retrieved_props.starburst_intensity == doctest::Approx(0.75f));
6023 DOCTEST_CHECK(retrieved_props.intensity_threshold == doctest::Approx(0.9f));
6024 DOCTEST_CHECK(retrieved_props.ghost_count == 3);
6025
6026 // Test validation errors
6027 LensFlareProperties invalid_props;
6028
6029 // Invalid blade count (< 3)
6030 invalid_props = default_props;
6031 invalid_props.aperture_blade_count = 2;
6032 DOCTEST_CHECK_THROWS(radiation.setCameraLensFlareProperties("test_camera", invalid_props));
6033
6034 // Invalid coating efficiency (> 1.0)
6035 invalid_props = default_props;
6036 invalid_props.coating_efficiency = 1.5f;
6037 DOCTEST_CHECK_THROWS(radiation.setCameraLensFlareProperties("test_camera", invalid_props));
6038
6039 // Invalid coating efficiency (< 0.0)
6040 invalid_props = default_props;
6041 invalid_props.coating_efficiency = -0.1f;
6042 DOCTEST_CHECK_THROWS(radiation.setCameraLensFlareProperties("test_camera", invalid_props));
6043
6044 // Invalid ghost intensity (< 0)
6045 invalid_props = default_props;
6046 invalid_props.ghost_intensity = -0.5f;
6047 DOCTEST_CHECK_THROWS(radiation.setCameraLensFlareProperties("test_camera", invalid_props));
6048
6049 // Invalid intensity threshold (> 1.0)
6050 invalid_props = default_props;
6051 invalid_props.intensity_threshold = 1.5f;
6052 DOCTEST_CHECK_THROWS(radiation.setCameraLensFlareProperties("test_camera", invalid_props));
6053
6054 // Invalid ghost count (< 1)
6055 invalid_props = default_props;
6056 invalid_props.ghost_count = 0;
6057 DOCTEST_CHECK_THROWS(radiation.setCameraLensFlareProperties("test_camera", invalid_props));
6058}
6059
6060DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("Lens Flare - Application to Camera Image") {
6061 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6062 helios::Context context;
6063 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
6064 radiation.disableMessages();
6065
6066 // Create a simple scene with a bright light source
6067 uint ground = context.addPatch(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), helios::make_vec2(10, 10));
6068 uint bright_patch = context.addPatch(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0.5), helios::make_vec2(0.5, 0.5));
6069 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
6070 context.setPrimitiveData(bright_patch, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
6071
6072 // Set reflectivity (need emissivity = 1 - reflectivity for energy conservation)
6073 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "reflectivity_red", 0.5f);
6074 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "reflectivity_green", 0.5f);
6075 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "reflectivity_blue", 0.5f);
6076 context.setPrimitiveData(bright_patch, "reflectivity_red", 0.99f);
6077 context.setPrimitiveData(bright_patch, "reflectivity_green", 0.99f);
6078 context.setPrimitiveData(bright_patch, "reflectivity_blue", 0.99f);
6079
6080 // Add radiation bands first (required before setting source flux)
6081 radiation.addRadiationBand("red");
6082 radiation.addRadiationBand("green");
6083 radiation.addRadiationBand("blue");
6084
6085 // Disable emission for all bands (we're only testing direct illumination)
6086 radiation.disableEmission("red");
6087 radiation.disableEmission("green");
6088 radiation.disableEmission("blue");
6089
6090 // Add radiation source
6091 uint source = radiation.addCollimatedRadiationSource(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
6092 radiation.setSourceFlux(source, "red", 500.0f);
6093 radiation.setSourceFlux(source, "green", 500.0f);
6094 radiation.setSourceFlux(source, "blue", 500.0f);
6095
6096 radiation.setDirectRayCount("red", 1000);
6097 radiation.setDirectRayCount("green", 1000);
6098 radiation.setDirectRayCount("blue", 1000);
6099 radiation.setDiffuseRayCount("red", 100);
6100 radiation.setDiffuseRayCount("green", 100);
6101 radiation.setDiffuseRayCount("blue", 100);
6102
6103 // Enable scattering since we set reflectivity values
6104 radiation.setScatteringDepth("red", 1);
6105 radiation.setScatteringDepth("green", 1);
6106 radiation.setScatteringDepth("blue", 1);
6107
6108 // Add a camera
6109 CameraProperties camera_props;
6110 camera_props.camera_resolution = helios::make_int2(64, 64);
6111 camera_props.HFOV = 60.0f;
6112 camera_props.focal_plane_distance = 5.0f;
6113 radiation.addRadiationCamera("test_camera", {"red", "green", "blue"}, helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 5), helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
6114
6115 // Enable lens flare with lower threshold to ensure effect is visible
6116 radiation.enableCameraLensFlare("test_camera");
6117 LensFlareProperties props;
6118 props.intensity_threshold = 0.5f; // Lower threshold to catch more pixels
6119 props.ghost_intensity = 1.0f;
6120 props.starburst_intensity = 1.0f;
6121 radiation.setCameraLensFlareProperties("test_camera", props);
6122
6123 // Update and run
6124 radiation.updateGeometry();
6125 radiation.runBand({"red", "green", "blue"});
6126
6127 // Apply image corrections (lens flare is automatically applied when enabled)
6128 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(radiation.applyCameraImageCorrections("test_camera", "red", "green", "blue"));
6129
6130 // Verify camera still has valid pixel data
6131 auto all_labels = radiation.getAllCameraLabels();
6132 DOCTEST_CHECK(std::find(all_labels.begin(), all_labels.end(), "test_camera") != all_labels.end());
6133}
6134
6135DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("Lens Flare - Disabled Does Nothing") {
6136 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6137 helios::Context context;
6138 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
6139 radiation.disableMessages();
6140
6141 // Create a simple scene
6142 uint ground = context.addPatch(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), helios::make_vec2(10, 10));
6143 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
6144 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "reflectivity_red", 0.5f);
6145 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "reflectivity_green", 0.5f);
6146 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "reflectivity_blue", 0.5f);
6147
6148 // Add radiation bands first (required before setting source flux)
6149 radiation.addRadiationBand("red");
6150 radiation.addRadiationBand("green");
6151 radiation.addRadiationBand("blue");
6152
6153 // Disable emission for all bands (we're only testing direct illumination)
6154 radiation.disableEmission("red");
6155 radiation.disableEmission("green");
6156 radiation.disableEmission("blue");
6157
6158 // Add radiation source
6159 uint source = radiation.addCollimatedRadiationSource(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
6160 radiation.setSourceFlux(source, "red", 500.0f);
6161 radiation.setSourceFlux(source, "green", 500.0f);
6162 radiation.setSourceFlux(source, "blue", 500.0f);
6163
6164 radiation.setDirectRayCount("red", 100);
6165 radiation.setDirectRayCount("green", 100);
6166 radiation.setDirectRayCount("blue", 100);
6167
6168 // Enable scattering since we set reflectivity values
6169 radiation.setScatteringDepth("red", 1);
6170 radiation.setScatteringDepth("green", 1);
6171 radiation.setScatteringDepth("blue", 1);
6172
6173 // Add a camera (lens flare disabled by default)
6174 CameraProperties camera_props;
6175 camera_props.camera_resolution = helios::make_int2(32, 32);
6176 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
6177 radiation.addRadiationCamera("test_camera", {"red", "green", "blue"}, helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 5), helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 1);
6178
6179 // Update and run
6180 radiation.updateGeometry();
6181 radiation.runBand({"red", "green", "blue"});
6182
6183 // Apply image corrections - lens flare should NOT be applied since it's disabled
6184 DOCTEST_CHECK(!radiation.isCameraLensFlareEnabled("test_camera"));
6185 DOCTEST_CHECK_NOTHROW(radiation.applyCameraImageCorrections("test_camera", "red", "green", "blue"));
6186}
6187
6188DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Camera Sphere Source Rendering") {
6189 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6190 helios::Context context;
6191 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
6192 radiation.disableMessages();
6193
6194 uint ground = context.addPatch(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), helios::make_vec2(2.0f, 2.0f));
6195 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
6196 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "reflectivity_test_band", 0.0f);
6197
6198 radiation.addRadiationBand("test_band");
6199 radiation.disableEmission("test_band");
6200 radiation.setDirectRayCount("test_band", 100);
6201 radiation.setDiffuseRayCount("test_band", 0);
6202 radiation.setScatteringDepth("test_band", 1);
6203
6204 uint source = radiation.addSphereRadiationSource(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0.5), 0.2f);
6205 std::vector<helios::vec2> test_spectrum = {{400, 1.0f}, {700, 1.0f}};
6206 context.setGlobalData("test_spectrum", test_spectrum);
6207 radiation.setSourceSpectrum(source, "test_spectrum");
6208
6209 CameraProperties camera_props;
6210 camera_props.camera_resolution = helios::make_int2(32, 32);
6211 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
6212 camera_props.lens_diameter = 0.0f;
6213 radiation.addRadiationCamera("sphere_cam", {"test_band"}, helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 2), helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 10);
6214
6215 radiation.updateGeometry();
6216 radiation.runBand("test_band");
6217
6218 auto pixel_data = radiation.getCameraPixelData("sphere_cam", "test_band");
6219 DOCTEST_REQUIRE(!pixel_data.empty());
6220
6221 int center_idx = (camera_props.camera_resolution.y / 2) * camera_props.camera_resolution.x + (camera_props.camera_resolution.x / 2);
6222 DOCTEST_CHECK(pixel_data[center_idx] > 0.0f);
6223}
6224
6225DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Camera Rectangle Source Rendering") {
6226 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6227 helios::Context context;
6228 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
6229 radiation.disableMessages();
6230
6231 uint ground = context.addPatch(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), helios::make_vec2(2.0f, 2.0f));
6232 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
6233 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "reflectivity_test_band", 0.0f);
6234
6235 radiation.addRadiationBand("test_band");
6236 radiation.disableEmission("test_band");
6237 radiation.setDirectRayCount("test_band", 100);
6238 radiation.setDiffuseRayCount("test_band", 0);
6239 radiation.setScatteringDepth("test_band", 1);
6240
6241 uint source = radiation.addRectangleRadiationSource(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0.5), helios::make_vec2(0.4f, 0.4f), helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0));
6242 std::vector<helios::vec2> test_spectrum = {{400, 1.0f}, {700, 1.0f}};
6243 context.setGlobalData("test_spectrum", test_spectrum);
6244 radiation.setSourceSpectrum(source, "test_spectrum");
6245

6248 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
6249 camera_props.lens_diameter = 0.0f;
6250 radiation.addRadiationCamera("rect_cam", {"test_band"}, helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 2), helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 10);

6252 radiation.updateGeometry();
6253 radiation.runBand("test_band");
6254
6255 auto pixel_data = radiation.getCameraPixelData("rect_cam", "test_band");
6256 DOCTEST_REQUIRE(!pixel_data.empty());
6257
6258 int center_idx = (camera_props.camera_resolution.y / 2) * camera_props.camera_resolution.x + (camera_props.camera_resolution.x / 2);
6259 DOCTEST_CHECK(pixel_data[center_idx] > 0.0f);
6260}

6262DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Camera Disk Source Rendering") {

6264 helios::Context context;
6265 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
6266 radiation.disableMessages();

6268 uint ground = context.addPatch(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), helios::make_vec2(2.0f, 2.0f));
6269 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "twosided_flag", uint(0));
6270 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "reflectivity_test_band", 0.0f);
6271
6272 radiation.addRadiationBand("test_band");
6273 radiation.disableEmission("test_band");
6274 radiation.setDirectRayCount("test_band", 100);
6275 radiation.setDiffuseRayCount("test_band", 0);
6276 radiation.setScatteringDepth("test_band", 1);
6277
6278 uint source = radiation.addDiskRadiationSource(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0.5), 0.2f, helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0));
6279 std::vector<helios::vec2> test_spectrum = {{400, 1.0f}, {700, 1.0f}};
6280 context.setGlobalData("test_spectrum", test_spectrum);
6281 radiation.setSourceSpectrum(source, "test_spectrum");
6282
6283 CameraProperties camera_props;

6285 camera_props.HFOV = 45.0f;
6286 camera_props.lens_diameter = 0.0f;
6287 radiation.addRadiationCamera("disk_cam", {"test_band"}, helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 2), helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), camera_props, 10);
6288

6290 radiation.runBand("test_band");
6291
6292 auto pixel_data = radiation.getCameraPixelData("disk_cam", "test_band");
6293 DOCTEST_REQUIRE(!pixel_data.empty());
6294
6295 int center_idx = (camera_props.camera_resolution.y / 2) * camera_props.camera_resolution.x + (camera_props.camera_resolution.x / 2);
6296 DOCTEST_CHECK(pixel_data[center_idx] > 0.0f);
6297}
6298
6299DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Camera Pixel UUID Indexing Validation") {
6300 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6301 // This test validates that camera pixel-to-UUID mapping is spatially correct
6302 // by checking that left pixels see left patches, not right patches (which would happen with horizontal flip bug)
6303
6304 Context context;
6305
6306 // Create 3 vertical patches side-by-side: left, center, right
6307 // Each patch is tagged with a unique ID for validation
6308 uint left_patch = context.addPatch(make_vec3(-1.5, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.8, 2));
6309 uint center_patch = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.8, 2));
6310 uint right_patch = context.addPatch(make_vec3(1.5, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.8, 2));
6311
6312 // Tag each patch with unique primitive data ID
6313 context.setPrimitiveData(left_patch, "patch_id", uint(1));
6314 context.setPrimitiveData(center_patch, "patch_id", uint(2));
6315 context.setPrimitiveData(right_patch, "patch_id", uint(3));
6316
6317 // Set up radiation model with camera looking down from above
6318 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
6319 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
6320
6321 CameraProperties cam_props;
6322 cam_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(64, 64);
6323 cam_props.HFOV = 90; // Wide FOV to see all three patches
6324 cam_props.focal_plane_distance = 10;
6325 cam_props.lens_diameter = 0.0f;
6326
6327 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_cam", {"SW"}, make_vec3(0, 0, 5), // Above scene
6328 make_vec3(0, 0, 0), // Looking down
6329 cam_props, 1);
6330
6331 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("SW");
6332 radiationmodel.setScatteringDepth("SW", 1); // Enable scattering for camera ray tracing
6333
6334 // Add a radiation source - required for camera pixel labeling to run
6335 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
6336 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "SW", 1000.f);
6337
6338 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
6339 radiationmodel.runBand("SW");
6340
6341 // Write label map to temporary file
6342 // Filename format: {cameralabel}_{imagefile_base}_{frame:05d}.txt
6343 std::string test_file = "test_cam_test_camera_indexing_00000.txt";
6344 radiationmodel.writePrimitiveDataLabelMap("test_cam", "patch_id", "test_camera_indexing", "./", 0, 0.0f);
6345
6346 // Read back the label map
6347 std::ifstream label_file(test_file);
6348 DOCTEST_REQUIRE_MESSAGE(label_file.is_open(), "Could not open label map file");
6349
6350 std::vector<float> labels;
6351 float val;
6352 while (label_file >> val) {
6353 labels.push_back(val);
6354 }
6355 label_file.close();
6356
6357 DOCTEST_REQUIRE_EQ(labels.size(), 64 * 64);
6358
6359 // Check spatial correctness
6360 // World positions: patch1 at X=-1.5 (left), patch2 at X=0 (center), patch3 at X=+1.5 (right)
6361 // Sample left region of label map (x=[20,24])
6362 int left_votes = 0, center_votes = 0, right_votes = 0;
6363 for (int j = 26; j < 38; j++) {
6364 for (int i = 20; i < 25; i++) {
6365 float label = labels[j * 64 + i];
6366 if (label == 1.0f)
6367 left_votes++;
6368 else if (label == 2.0f)
6369 center_votes++;
6370 else if (label == 3.0f)
6371 right_votes++;
6372 }
6373 }
6374
6375 // Left region should see world-left patch (ID=1)
6376 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(left_votes > right_votes, "Left region should see world-left patch (ID=1), not world-right (ID=3)");
6377 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(left_votes > center_votes, "Left region should predominantly see left patch");
6378
6379 // Sample right region of label map (x=[39,43])
6380 left_votes = center_votes = right_votes = 0;
6381 for (int j = 26; j < 38; j++) {
6382 for (int i = 39; i < 44; i++) {
6383 float label = labels[j * 64 + i];
6384 if (label == 1.0f)
6385 left_votes++;
6386 else if (label == 2.0f)
6387 center_votes++;
6388 else if (label == 3.0f)
6389 right_votes++;
6390 }
6391 }
6392
6393 // Right region should see world-right patch (ID=3)
6394 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(right_votes > left_votes, "Right region should see world-right patch (ID=3), not world-left (ID=1)");
6395 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(right_votes > center_votes, "Right region should predominantly see right patch");
6396
6397 // Cleanup test file
6398 std::remove(test_file.c_str());
6399}
6400
6401DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Pixel Labeling with Fine Tessellation") {
6402 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6403 // Test that pixel labeling doesn't miss primitives when tessellation ≈ camera resolution
6404 // This validates the epsilon-tolerant boundary test prevents systematic misses
6405
6406 Context context;
6407
6408 // Create ground with tessellation matching camera resolution
6409 int res = 128; // Use 128x128 for fast test (principle same as 1024x1024)
6410 float camera_height = 20.0f;
6411 float HFOV_degrees = 45.0f;
6412
6413 // Calculate tile size to fill camera FOV: ground_size = 2 * height * tan(HFOV/2)
6414 float ground_size = 2.0f * camera_height * tanf(HFOV_degrees * M_PI / 180.0f / 2.0f);
6415
6416 std::vector<uint> ground = context.addTile(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(ground_size, ground_size), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(res, res));
6417
6418 // Tag ground with data
6419 context.setPrimitiveData(ground, "ground_id", uint(42));
6420
6421 // Camera looking straight down
6422 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
6423 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
6424
6425 CameraProperties cam_props;
6426 cam_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(res, res); // Match ground tessellation
6427 cam_props.HFOV = HFOV_degrees;
6428 cam_props.focal_plane_distance = 10;
6429 cam_props.lens_diameter = 0.0f;
6430
6431 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_cam", {"SW"}, make_vec3(0, 0, camera_height), // Above ground
6432 make_vec3(0, 0, 0), // Looking down
6433 cam_props, 1);
6434
6435 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("SW");
6436 radiationmodel.setScatteringDepth("SW", 1); // Enable scattering for camera ray tracing
6437
6438 // Add a radiation source - required for camera pixel labeling to run
6439 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
6440 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "SW", 1000.f);
6441
6442 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
6443 radiationmodel.runBand("SW");
6444
6445 // Write and read label map
6446 // Filename format: {cameralabel}_{imagefile_base}_{frame:05d}.txt
6447 std::string test_file = "test_cam_test_fine_tessellation_00000.txt";
6448 radiationmodel.writePrimitiveDataLabelMap("test_cam", "ground_id", "test_fine_tessellation", "./", 0, 0.0f);
6449
6450 std::ifstream label_file(test_file);
6451 DOCTEST_REQUIRE(label_file.is_open());
6452
6453 std::vector<float> labels;
6454 float val;
6455 while (label_file >> val) {
6456 labels.push_back(val);
6457 }
6458 label_file.close();
6459
6460 // Count valid hits (ground_id = 42) vs misses (NaN)
6461 int valid_count = 0;
6462 int nan_count = 0;
6463 for (float label: labels) {
6464 if (std::isnan(label)) {
6465 nan_count++;
6466 } else if (label == 42.0f) {
6467 valid_count++;
6468 }
6469 }
6470
6471 float valid_percentage = 100.0f * valid_count / labels.size();
6472
6473 // Tile fills entire FOV, so should get >95% valid hits (allowing for edge pixels and numerical precision)
6474 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(valid_percentage > 95.0f, "Pixel labeling with fine tessellation should have >95% valid hits, got " << valid_percentage << "%");
6475
6476 // Cleanup
6477 std::remove(test_file.c_str());
6478}
6479
6480DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - runBand Invalid Band Error Handling") {
6481 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6482
6483 // Test 1: Single invalid band label
6484 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Single invalid band") {
6485 Context context1;
6486 RadiationModel radiation1 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context1);
6487 radiation1.disableMessages();
6488
6489 uint uuid = context1.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
6490 radiation1.addRadiationBand("PAR");
6491 uint source = radiation1.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
6492 radiation1.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
6493 radiation1.updateGeometry();
6494
6495 // Try to run a band that doesn't exist
6496 bool exception_thrown = false;
6497 std::string error_message;
6498 try {
6499 radiation1.runBand("INVALID_BAND");
6500 } catch (const std::runtime_error &e) {
6501 exception_thrown = true;
6502 error_message = e.what();
6503 DOCTEST_CHECK(error_message.find("INVALID_BAND") != std::string::npos);
6504 DOCTEST_CHECK(error_message.find("not a valid band") != std::string::npos);
6505 } catch (const std::out_of_range &e) {
6506 // This is the bug - should throw helios_runtime_error, not out_of_range
6507 DOCTEST_FAIL("Caught std::out_of_range instead of helios_runtime_error. This indicates the bug is present.");
6508 }
6509 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(exception_thrown, "Expected helios_runtime_error for invalid band");
6510 }
6511
6512 // Test 2: Vector with mixed valid and invalid bands
6513 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("Mixed valid and invalid bands") {
6514 Context context2;
6515 RadiationModel radiation2 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context2);
6516 radiation2.disableMessages();
6517
6518 uint uuid = context2.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
6519 radiation2.addRadiationBand("PAR");
6520 radiation2.addRadiationBand("NIR");
6521 uint source = radiation2.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
6522 radiation2.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
6523 radiation2.setSourceFlux(source, "NIR", 500.f);
6524 radiation2.updateGeometry();
6525
6526 // Try to run bands where some exist and some don't
6527 std::vector<std::string> bands = {"PAR", "INVALID_BAND", "NIR"};
6528 bool exception_thrown = false;
6529 std::string error_message;
6530 try {
6531 radiation2.runBand(bands);
6532 } catch (const std::runtime_error &e) {
6533 exception_thrown = true;
6534 error_message = e.what();
6535 DOCTEST_CHECK(error_message.find("INVALID_BAND") != std::string::npos);
6536 DOCTEST_CHECK(error_message.find("not a valid band") != std::string::npos);
6537 } catch (const std::out_of_range &e) {
6538 // This is the bug - should throw helios_runtime_error, not out_of_range
6539 DOCTEST_FAIL("Caught std::out_of_range instead of helios_runtime_error. This indicates the bug is present.");
6540 }
6541 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(exception_thrown, "Expected helios_runtime_error for invalid band in vector");
6542 }
6543
6544 // Test 3: All invalid bands in vector
6545 DOCTEST_SUBCASE("All invalid bands") {
6546 Context context3;
6547 RadiationModel radiation3 = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context3);
6548 radiation3.disableMessages();
6549
6550 uint uuid = context3.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
6551 radiation3.addRadiationBand("PAR");
6552 uint source = radiation3.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
6553 radiation3.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
6554 radiation3.updateGeometry();
6555
6556 // Try to run multiple bands that don't exist
6557 std::vector<std::string> bands = {"INVALID1", "INVALID2"};
6558 bool exception_thrown = false;
6559 std::string error_message;
6560 try {
6561 radiation3.runBand(bands);
6562 } catch (const std::runtime_error &e) {
6563 exception_thrown = true;
6564 error_message = e.what();
6565 // Should catch the first invalid band
6566 bool found_invalid = error_message.find("INVALID1") != std::string::npos || error_message.find("INVALID2") != std::string::npos;
6567 DOCTEST_CHECK(found_invalid);
6568 DOCTEST_CHECK(error_message.find("not a valid band") != std::string::npos);
6569 } catch (const std::out_of_range &e) {
6570 // This is the bug - should throw helios_runtime_error, not out_of_range
6571 DOCTEST_FAIL("Caught std::out_of_range instead of helios_runtime_error. This indicates the bug is present.");
6572 }
6573 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(exception_thrown, "Expected helios_runtime_error for all invalid bands");
6574 }
6575}
6576
6577DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Segmentation Mask to Image Coordinate Alignment") {
6578 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6579 // This test validates that segmentation mask coordinates correctly align with camera images
6580 // by creating patches at known locations and verifying their bbox coordinates match the image
6581
6582 Context context;
6583
6584 // Create 4 patches at known positions forming a cross pattern
6585 uint top_patch = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 1.5), make_vec2(0.5, 0.5));
6586 uint bottom_patch = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, -1.5), make_vec2(0.5, 0.5));
6587 uint left_patch = context.addPatch(make_vec3(-1.5, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.5, 0.5));
6588 uint right_patch = context.addPatch(make_vec3(1.5, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.5, 0.5));
6589
6590 // Tag patches with unique IDs
6591 context.setPrimitiveData(top_patch, "patch_id", uint(1));
6592 context.setPrimitiveData(bottom_patch, "patch_id", uint(2));
6593 context.setPrimitiveData(left_patch, "patch_id", uint(3));
6594 context.setPrimitiveData(right_patch, "patch_id", uint(4));
6595
6596 // Set up radiation model
6597 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
6598 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
6599
6600 CameraProperties cam_props;
6601 cam_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(128, 128);
6602 cam_props.HFOV = 60;
6603 cam_props.focal_plane_distance = 10;
6604 cam_props.lens_diameter = 0.0f;
6605
6606 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_cam", {"SW"}, make_vec3(0, -10, 0), // Camera looking from -Y toward origin
6607 make_vec3(0, 0, 0), cam_props, 1);
6608
6609 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("SW");
6610 radiationmodel.setScatteringDepth("SW", 1);
6611
6612 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 1, 0));
6613 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "SW", 1000.f);
6614
6615 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
6616 radiationmodel.runBand("SW");
6617
6618 // Write camera image and segmentation masks
6619 std::string image_file = radiationmodel.writeCameraImage("test_cam", {"SW"}, "test_alignment", "./");
6620
6621 radiationmodel.writeImageSegmentationMasks("test_cam", "patch_id", 1u, "test_alignment_masks.json", image_file, {}, false);
6622
6623 // Read the JSON file to get bounding boxes
6624 std::ifstream json_file("test_alignment_masks.json");
6625 DOCTEST_REQUIRE(json_file.is_open());
6626
6627 std::stringstream buffer;
6628 buffer << json_file.rdbuf();
6629 json_file.close();
6630
6631 nlohmann::json coco_json = nlohmann::json::parse(buffer.str());
6632
6633 // Read the camera pixel UUID data
6634 std::vector<uint> pixel_UUIDs;
6635 context.getGlobalData("camera_test_cam_pixel_UUID", pixel_UUIDs);
6636
6637 // For each annotation, verify the bbox encloses ALL pixels with that patch's UUID
6638 for (const auto &ann: coco_json["annotations"]) {
6639 int bbox_x = ann["bbox"][0];
6640 int bbox_y = ann["bbox"][1];
6641 int bbox_w = ann["bbox"][2];
6642 int bbox_h = ann["bbox"][3];
6643
6644 // Get the segmentation to find which patch this is
6645 std::vector<int> seg_coords = ann["segmentation"][0];
6646
6647 // Sample a pixel inside this bbox to determine which patch UUID it corresponds to
6648 int sample_x = bbox_x + bbox_w / 2;
6649 int sample_y = bbox_y + bbox_h / 2;
6650 uint sample_UUID = pixel_UUIDs.at(sample_y * 128 + sample_x) - 1;
6651
6652 if (!context.doesPrimitiveExist(sample_UUID)) {
6653 continue;
6654 }
6655
6656 // Find all pixels with this same UUID
6657 int min_x = 128, max_x = 0, min_y = 128, max_y = 0;
6658 bool found_any = false;
6659
6660 for (int j = 0; j < 128; j++) {
6661 for (int i = 0; i < 128; i++) {
6662 uint UUID = pixel_UUIDs.at(j * 128 + i) - 1;
6663 if (UUID == sample_UUID) {
6664 min_x = std::min(min_x, i);
6665 max_x = std::max(max_x, i);
6666 min_y = std::min(min_y, j);
6667 max_y = std::max(max_y, j);
6668 found_any = true;
6669 }
6670 }
6671 }
6672
6673 if (found_any) {
6674 // Verify bbox from JSON matches actual pixel extent (allow 2-pixel tolerance for edge effects)
6675 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(bbox_x <= min_x + 2, "Bbox x-min should match or slightly exceed actual pixels");
6676 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(bbox_x + bbox_w >= max_x - 2, "Bbox x-max should match or slightly exceed actual pixels");
6677 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(bbox_y <= min_y + 2, "Bbox y-min should match or slightly exceed actual pixels");
6678 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(bbox_y + bbox_h >= max_y - 2, "Bbox y-max should match or slightly exceed actual pixels");
6679 }
6680 }
6681
6682 // Cleanup
6683 std::remove("test_alignment_masks.json");
6684 std::remove(image_file.c_str());
6685}
6686
6687DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Mask Spatial Ordering Matches Image") {
6688 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6689 // Verify that left/right/top/bottom spatial relationships are preserved between image and masks
6690
6691 Context context;
6692
6693 // Create 3 patches in a horizontal line: left, center, right
6694 // Camera looks from (0,-10,0) toward origin, so patches should face -Y (rotated 90° about X axis)
6695 SphericalCoord rotation = make_SphericalCoord(M_PI / 2, 0); // 90° pitch to face -Y
6696 uint left_patch = context.addPatch(make_vec3(-2, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.8, 1.5), rotation);
6697 uint center_patch = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.8, 1.5), rotation);
6698 uint right_patch = context.addPatch(make_vec3(2, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.8, 1.5), rotation);
6699
6700 // Tag with IDs
6701 context.setPrimitiveData(left_patch, "patch_id", uint(10));
6702 context.setPrimitiveData(center_patch, "patch_id", uint(20));
6703 context.setPrimitiveData(right_patch, "patch_id", uint(30));
6704
6705 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
6706 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
6707
6708 CameraProperties cam_props;
6709 cam_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(128, 128);
6710 cam_props.HFOV = 70;
6711 cam_props.focal_plane_distance = 10;
6712 cam_props.lens_diameter = 0.0f;
6713
6714 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_cam", {"SW"}, make_vec3(0, -10, 0), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), cam_props, 1);
6715
6716 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("SW");
6717 radiationmodel.setScatteringDepth("SW", 1);
6718
6719 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 1, 0));
6720 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "SW", 1000.f);
6721
6722 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
6723 radiationmodel.runBand("SW");
6724
6725 // Verify patches are visible in pixel data
6726 std::vector<uint> pixel_UUIDs_check;
6727 context.getGlobalData("camera_test_cam_pixel_UUID", pixel_UUIDs_check);
6728 int patch_hits = 0;
6729 for (uint uuid: pixel_UUIDs_check) {
6730 if (uuid > 0 && context.doesPrimitiveExist(uuid - 1)) {
6731 if (context.doesPrimitiveDataExist(uuid - 1, "patch_id")) {
6732 patch_hits++;
6733 }
6734 }
6735 }
6736 DOCTEST_INFO("Pixels hitting patches with patch_id: " << patch_hits);
6737 DOCTEST_REQUIRE_MESSAGE(patch_hits > 0, "Camera should hit at least some patches");
6738
6739 // Write segmentation masks
6740 std::string image_file = radiationmodel.writeCameraImage("test_cam", {"SW"}, "spatial_test", "./");
6741 radiationmodel.writeImageSegmentationMasks("test_cam", "patch_id", 1u, "spatial_test_masks.json", image_file, {}, false);
6742
6743 // Read JSON
6744 std::ifstream json_file("spatial_test_masks.json");
6745 DOCTEST_REQUIRE(json_file.is_open());
6746
6747 std::stringstream buffer;
6748 buffer << json_file.rdbuf();
6749 json_file.close();
6750
6751 nlohmann::json coco_json = nlohmann::json::parse(buffer.str());
6752
6753 // Debug: check if annotations exist
6754 DOCTEST_INFO("Number of annotations: " << coco_json["annotations"].size());
6755
6756 // Find bbox center x-coordinates for each patch ID
6757 std::map<int, int> patch_center_x; // patch_id -> center_x
6758
6759 for (const auto &ann: coco_json["annotations"]) {
6760 int cat_id = ann["category_id"];
6761 int bbox_x = ann["bbox"][0];
6762 int bbox_w = ann["bbox"][2];
6763 int center_x = bbox_x + bbox_w / 2;
6764
6765 // Map category_id back to patch_id (we set them both to 1u in writeImageSegmentationMasks)
6766 // We need to look at the actual labels to find which is which
6767 // Since all have category_id=1, we can't distinguish them this way
6768 // Instead, check the bbox positions
6769 patch_center_x[center_x] = center_x; // Just store for now
6770 }
6771
6772 // We should have 3 annotations
6773 DOCTEST_CHECK_EQ(coco_json["annotations"].size(), 3);
6774
6775 // Extract and sort the center x coordinates
6776 std::vector<int> centers;
6777 for (const auto &ann: coco_json["annotations"]) {
6778 int bbox_x = ann["bbox"][0];
6779 int bbox_w = ann["bbox"][2];
6780 centers.push_back(bbox_x + bbox_w / 2);
6781 }
6782 std::sort(centers.begin(), centers.end());
6783
6784 // Verify spatial ordering: centers should be increasing from left to right
6785 if (centers.size() == 3) {
6786 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(centers[0] < centers[1], "Left patch should be left of center patch");
6787 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(centers[1] < centers[2], "Center patch should be left of right patch");
6788
6789 // Verify they're reasonably spaced (not all clustered)
6790 int spacing1 = centers[1] - centers[0];
6791 int spacing2 = centers[2] - centers[1];
6792 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(spacing1 > 5, "Patches should be visibly separated in x");
6793 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(spacing2 > 5, "Patches should be visibly separated in x");
6794 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(abs(spacing1 - spacing2) < spacing1 * 0.5, "Spacing should be roughly uniform");
6795 }
6796
6797 // Cleanup
6798 std::remove("spatial_test_masks.json");
6799 std::remove(image_file.c_str());
6800}
6801
6802DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Data Label Maps Match Segmentation Mask Coordinates") {
6803 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6804 // Validates that writePrimitiveDataLabelMap and writeObjectDataLabelMap use the same
6805 // coordinate system as segmentation masks by comparing their outputs
6806
6807 Context context;
6808
6809 // Create 3 tiles (returning primitive UUIDs) with distinct primitive and object data values
6810 std::vector<uint> patch1_uuids = context.addTile(make_vec3(-1.5, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.8, 2), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(1, 1));
6811 std::vector<uint> patch2_uuids = context.addTile(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.8, 2), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(1, 1));
6812 std::vector<uint> patch3_uuids = context.addTile(make_vec3(1.5, 0, 0), make_vec2(0.8, 2), make_SphericalCoord(0, 0), make_int2(1, 1));
6813
6814 // Create polymesh objects for object data
6815 uint obj1 = context.addPolymeshObject(patch1_uuids);
6816 uint obj2 = context.addPolymeshObject(patch2_uuids);
6817 uint obj3 = context.addPolymeshObject(patch3_uuids);
6818
6819 // Set primitive data
6820 context.setPrimitiveData(patch1_uuids, "patch_id", uint(10));
6821 context.setPrimitiveData(patch2_uuids, "patch_id", uint(20));
6822 context.setPrimitiveData(patch3_uuids, "patch_id", uint(30));
6823
6824 // Set object data
6825 context.setObjectData(obj1, "obj_id", uint(100));
6826 context.setObjectData(obj2, "obj_id", uint(200));
6827 context.setObjectData(obj3, "obj_id", uint(300));
6828
6829 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
6830 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
6831
6832 CameraProperties cam_props;
6833 cam_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(64, 64);
6834 cam_props.HFOV = 90;
6835 cam_props.focal_plane_distance = 10;
6836 cam_props.lens_diameter = 0.0f;
6837
6838 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_cam", {"SW"}, make_vec3(0, 0, 5), make_vec3(0, 0, 0), cam_props, 1);
6839
6840 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("SW");
6841 radiationmodel.setScatteringDepth("SW", 1);
6842
6843 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
6844 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "SW", 1000.f);
6845
6846 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
6847 radiationmodel.runBand("SW");
6848
6849 // Write all outputs
6850 std::string image_file = radiationmodel.writeCameraImage("test_cam", {"SW"}, "coord_match_test", "./");
6851 radiationmodel.writePrimitiveDataLabelMap("test_cam", "patch_id", "coord_match_primdata", "./", 0, 0.0f);
6852 radiationmodel.writeObjectDataLabelMap("test_cam", "obj_id", "coord_match_objdata", "./", 0, 0.0f);
6853 radiationmodel.writeImageSegmentationMasks_ObjectData("test_cam", "obj_id", 1u, "./coord_match_masks.json", image_file, {}, false);
6854
6855 // Read primitive data label map
6856 std::ifstream prim_file("test_cam_coord_match_primdata_00000.txt");
6857 DOCTEST_REQUIRE(prim_file.is_open());
6858 std::vector<float> prim_labels;
6859 float val;
6860 while (prim_file >> val) {
6861 prim_labels.push_back(val);
6862 }
6863 prim_file.close();
6864 DOCTEST_REQUIRE_EQ(prim_labels.size(), 64 * 64);
6865
6866 // Read object data label map
6867 std::ifstream obj_file("test_cam_coord_match_objdata_00000.txt");
6868 DOCTEST_REQUIRE(obj_file.is_open());
6869 std::vector<float> obj_labels;
6870 while (obj_file >> val) {
6871 obj_labels.push_back(val);
6872 }
6873 obj_file.close();
6874 DOCTEST_REQUIRE_EQ(obj_labels.size(), 64 * 64);
6875
6876 // Read JSON masks
6877 std::ifstream json_file("./coord_match_masks.json");
6878 DOCTEST_REQUIRE(json_file.is_open());
6879 std::stringstream buffer;
6880 buffer << json_file.rdbuf();
6881 json_file.close();
6882 nlohmann::json coco_json = nlohmann::json::parse(buffer.str());
6883
6884 // For each annotation, verify that the bbox region contains consistent data values
6885 // Sample multiple pixels across the bbox region to detect horizontal/vertical flips
6886 int total_annotations = coco_json["annotations"].size();
6887 DOCTEST_REQUIRE_MESSAGE(total_annotations == 3, "Should have 3 annotations, got " << total_annotations);
6888
6889 // Expected values based on world positions:
6890 // Left patch (world X=-1.5): obj_id=100, should appear at low image-x
6891 // Center patch (world X=0): obj_id=200, should appear at middle image-x
6892 // Right patch (world X=+1.5): obj_id=300, should appear at high image-x
6893
6894 // Sort annotations by bbox x-position to get left, center, right
6895 std::vector<std::tuple<int, int, int, int, int>> ann_data; // x, y, w, h, index
6896 for (size_t idx = 0; idx < coco_json["annotations"].size(); idx++) {
6897 const auto &ann = coco_json["annotations"][idx];
6898 ann_data.push_back({ann["bbox"][0].get<int>(), ann["bbox"][1].get<int>(), ann["bbox"][2].get<int>(), ann["bbox"][3].get<int>(), static_cast<int>(idx)});
6899 }
6900 std::sort(ann_data.begin(), ann_data.end()); // Sort by x position
6901
6902 // Expected object IDs from left to right IN MASK/LABEL MAP COORDINATE SPACE
6903 // Dev's backend implementation produces unflipped coordinates (world order matches image order)
6904 std::vector<uint> expected_obj_ids = {100, 200, 300};
6905
6906 for (size_t i = 0; i < ann_data.size(); i++) {
6907 auto [bbox_x, bbox_y, bbox_w, bbox_h, ann_idx] = ann_data[i];
6908 uint expected_obj_value = expected_obj_ids[i];
6909
6910 // Verify label map has the SAME value in this bbox region
6911 int correct_value_count = 0;
6912 int total_pixels = 0;
6913
6914 for (int dy = 0; dy < bbox_h; dy++) {
6915 for (int dx = 0; dx < bbox_w; dx++) {
6916 int px = bbox_x + dx;
6917 int py = bbox_y + dy;
6918
6919 if (px < 0 || px >= 64 || py < 0 || py >= 64)
6920 continue;
6921
6922 float obj_value = obj_labels[py * 64 + px];
6923
6924 // Check if label map has the CORRECT value (not just any non-zero)
6925 if (fabs(obj_value - expected_obj_value) < 1.0f) {
6926 correct_value_count++;
6927 }
6928 total_pixels++;
6929 }
6930 }
6931
6932 float match_percentage = 100.0f * correct_value_count / total_pixels;
6933
6934 // Sample what value we're actually getting at bbox center
6935 int center_x = bbox_x + bbox_w / 2;
6936 int center_y = bbox_y + bbox_h / 2;
6937 float sample_actual_value = obj_labels[center_y * 64 + center_x];
6938
6939 // If coordinates match correctly, bbox region should have the CORRECT value (not wrong patch's value)
6940 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(match_percentage > 80.0f, "At least 80% of bbox pixels should have CORRECT data value in label map. "
6941 "If this fails, label map coordinates are flipped relative to mask. Got "
6942 << match_percentage << "%");
6943 }
6944
6945 // Cleanup
6946 std::remove("test_cam_coord_match_primdata_00000.txt");
6947 std::remove("test_cam_coord_match_objdata_00000.txt");
6948 std::remove("./coord_match_masks.json");
6949 std::remove(image_file.c_str());
6950}
6951
6952DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("Material Backend Migration - Spectrum Interpolation Integration") {
6953 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6954 // Test that spectrum interpolation configs are properly applied in buildMaterialData()
6955
6956 helios::Context context;
6957 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
6958 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
6959
6960 // Create spectral data for different ages
6961 std::vector<helios::vec2> spectrum_young = {{400, 0.1}, {500, 0.15}, {600, 0.2}, {700, 0.25}};
6962 std::vector<helios::vec2> spectrum_old = {{400, 0.5}, {500, 0.55}, {600, 0.6}, {700, 0.65}};
6963
6964 context.setGlobalData("rho_young", spectrum_young);
6965 context.setGlobalData("rho_old", spectrum_old);
6966
6967 // Create test primitive
6968 uint uuid = context.addPatch(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), helios::make_vec2(1, 1));
6969 context.setPrimitiveData(uuid, "leaf_age", 8.0f); // Should select "rho_old" (closer to 10 than 0)
6970
6971 // Set up interpolation config
6972 std::vector<uint> uuids = {uuid};
6973 std::vector<std::string> spectra = {"rho_young", "rho_old"};
6974 std::vector<float> values = {0.0f, 10.0f};
6975 radiationmodel.interpolateSpectrumFromPrimitiveData(uuids, spectra, values, "leaf_age", "reflectivity_spectrum");
6976
6977 // Add band with wavelength bounds for spectral integration
6978 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("PAR", 400.f, 700.f);
6979 radiationmodel.disableEmission("PAR"); // Disable emission to avoid energy conservation errors
6980 radiationmodel.setScatteringDepth("PAR", 1); // Enable scattering so material calculation runs
6981
6982 // Add source with constant flux
6983 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
6984 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "PAR", 1000.f);
6985
6986 // Update geometry and run - this triggers buildMaterialData()
6987 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
6988 radiationmodel.runBand("PAR");
6989
6990 // Verify that interpolation was applied
6991 std::string assigned_spectrum;
6992 DOCTEST_REQUIRE(context.doesPrimitiveDataExist(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum"));
6993 context.getPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", assigned_spectrum);
6994 DOCTEST_CHECK(assigned_spectrum == "rho_old");
6995}
6996
6997DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("Material Backend Migration - Camera Weighted Materials") {
6998 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
6999 // Test that camera-weighted materials are correctly calculated with spectral responses
7000
7001 helios::Context context;
7002 RadiationModel radiationmodel = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
7003 radiationmodel.disableMessages();
7004
7005 // Create object spectrum (reflectivity)
7006 std::vector<helios::vec2> object_spectrum = {{400, 0.1}, {500, 0.3}, {600, 0.5}, {700, 0.7}};
7007 context.setGlobalData("object_rho", object_spectrum);
7008
7009 // Create camera spectral response (Gaussian-like, peaked at 550nm)
7010 std::vector<helios::vec2> camera_response = {{400, 0.2}, {500, 0.8}, {600, 0.8}, {700, 0.2}};
7011 context.setGlobalData("camera_green", camera_response);
7012
7013 // Create source spectrum (sunlight-like)
7014 std::vector<helios::vec2> source_spectrum = {{400, 0.8}, {500, 1.0}, {600, 1.0}, {700, 0.9}};
7015 context.setGlobalData("sunlight", source_spectrum);
7016
7017 // Create test primitive with spectral reflectivity
7018 uint uuid = context.addPatch(helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), helios::make_vec2(1, 1));
7019 context.setPrimitiveData(uuid, "reflectivity_spectrum", std::string("object_rho"));
7020
7021 // Add band with wavelength bounds
7022 radiationmodel.addRadiationBand("VIS", 400.f, 700.f);
7023 radiationmodel.disableEmission("VIS"); // Disable emission to avoid energy conservation errors
7024 radiationmodel.setScatteringDepth("VIS", 1); // Enable scattering for camera rendering
7025
7026 // Add source with spectrum
7027 uint source = radiationmodel.addCollimatedRadiationSource();
7028 radiationmodel.setSourceFlux(source, "VIS", 1000.f);
7029 radiationmodel.setSourceSpectrum(source, "sunlight");
7030
7031 // Add camera with spectral response
7032 CameraProperties cam_props;
7033 cam_props.camera_resolution = helios::make_int2(10, 10);
7034 cam_props.HFOV = 45.f;
7035 cam_props.focal_plane_distance = 2.0f;
7036 cam_props.lens_diameter = 0.0f; // Pinhole
7037
7038 std::vector<std::string> band_labels = {"VIS"};
7039 radiationmodel.addRadiationCamera("test_cam", band_labels, helios::make_vec3(0, -5, 0), helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0), cam_props, 1);
7040 radiationmodel.setCameraSpectralResponse("test_cam", "VIS", "camera_green");
7041
7042 // Update and run
7043 radiationmodel.updateGeometry();
7044 radiationmodel.runBand("VIS");
7045
7046 // Verify camera data was generated
7047 DOCTEST_CHECK(context.doesGlobalDataExist("camera_test_cam_VIS"));
7048
7049 // Get camera data
7050 if (context.doesGlobalDataExist("camera_test_cam_VIS")) {
7051 std::vector<float> camera_data;
7052 context.getGlobalData("camera_test_cam_VIS", camera_data);
7053 DOCTEST_CHECK(camera_data.size() == 100); // 10x10 pixels
7054 }
7055}
7056
7057DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel - Specular Reflection Camera Rendering") {
7058 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
7059 // Test that setting specular_exponent affects camera rendering
7060 // This verifies specular reflection is enabled and working correctly
7061
7062 Context context;
7063 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
7064 radiation.disableMessages();
7065
7066 // Create patch at origin facing +Z
7067 uint UUID = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1));
7068 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "twosided_flag", uint(1));
7069
7070 // Set low diffuse reflectivity to isolate specular contribution
7071 std::vector<helios::vec2> reflectivity;
7072 reflectivity.push_back(make_vec2(400, 0.05f));
7073 reflectivity.push_back(make_vec2(700, 0.05f));
7074 context.setGlobalData("reflectivity", reflectivity);
7075 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "reflectivity_spectrum", "reflectivity");
7076
7077 std::vector<helios::vec2> zero_transmissivity;
7078 zero_transmissivity.push_back(make_vec2(400, 0.0f));
7079 zero_transmissivity.push_back(make_vec2(700, 0.0f));
7080 context.setGlobalData("zero_transmissivity", zero_transmissivity);
7081 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "transmissivity_spectrum", "zero_transmissivity");
7082
7083 // Setup radiation band and source
7084 radiation.addRadiationBand("SUN");
7085 radiation.setScatteringDepth("SUN", 1);
7086
7087 helios::vec3 sun_direction = helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 1); // Sun above (direction points TO sun)
7088 uint source = radiation.addCollimatedRadiationSource(sun_direction);
7089 radiation.setSourceFlux(source, "SUN", 1000.0f);
7090 radiation.setDirectRayCount("SUN", 10000);
7091 radiation.setDiffuseRayCount("SUN", 0);
7092 radiation.disableEmission("SUN");
7093
7094 // Camera looking straight down at patch
7095 helios::vec3 camera_pos = helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 2.0f);
7096 helios::vec3 camera_lookat = helios::make_vec3(0, 0, 0);
7097 CameraProperties cam_props;
7098 cam_props.camera_resolution = make_int2(32, 32);
7099 cam_props.lens_diameter = 0.0f;
7100 cam_props.focal_plane_distance = 2.0f;
7101 cam_props.HFOV = 30.0f;
7102 radiation.addRadiationCamera("test_cam", {"SUN"}, camera_pos, camera_lookat, cam_props, 1);
7103
7104 // Set camera spectral response
7105 std::vector<helios::vec2> camera_response;
7106 camera_response.push_back(make_vec2(400, 1.0f));
7107 camera_response.push_back(make_vec2(700, 1.0f));
7108 context.setGlobalData("camera_response", camera_response);
7109 radiation.setCameraSpectralResponse("test_cam", "SUN", "camera_response");
7110
7111 // TEST 1: specular_exponent = -1 (disabled)
7112 std::string output1;
7113 {
7114 capture_cout capture;
7115 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "specular_exponent", -1.0f);
7116 radiation.updateGeometry();
7117 radiation.runBand("SUN");
7118 output1 = capture.get_captured_output();
7119 }
7120
7121 std::vector<float> pixels_no_specular;
7122 context.getGlobalData("camera_test_cam_SUN", pixels_no_specular);
7123
7124 float sum_no_specular = 0.0f;
7125 for (float p: pixels_no_specular) {
7126 sum_no_specular += p;
7127 }
7128 float avg_no_specular = sum_no_specular / pixels_no_specular.size();
7129
7130 // TEST 2: specular_exponent = 50 (strong specular highlight)
7131 std::string output2;
7132 {
7133 capture_cout capture;
7134 context.setPrimitiveData(UUID, "specular_exponent", 50.0f);
7135 radiation.updateGeometry();
7136 radiation.runBand("SUN");
7137 output2 = capture.get_captured_output();
7138 }
7139
7140 std::vector<float> pixels_with_specular;
7141 context.getGlobalData("camera_test_cam_SUN", pixels_with_specular);
7142
7143 float sum_with_specular = 0.0f;
7144 for (float p: pixels_with_specular) {
7145 sum_with_specular += p;
7146 }
7147 float avg_with_specular = sum_with_specular / pixels_with_specular.size();
7148
7149 float difference = avg_with_specular - avg_no_specular;
7150
7151 // Verify specular exponent changes camera intensity
7152 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(std::abs(difference) > 1.0f, "Specular exponent should affect camera intensity. "
7153 "No specular: "
7154 << avg_no_specular << ", With specular: " << avg_with_specular << ", Difference: " << difference);
7155}
7156
7157DOCTEST_TEST_CASE("RadiationModel More Than 4 Simultaneous Radiation Bands") {
7158 SKIP_IF_NO_GPU();
7159 // Verify the Vulkan backend has no hard-coded 4-band limit.
7160 // Run 6 bands simultaneously and check that each receives the correct flux
7161 // from an overhead collimated source hitting an opaque patch.
7162
7163 const int Nbands = 6;
7164 const float error_threshold = 0.005f;
7165 const uint Ndirect = 10000;
7166
7167 Context context;
7168 RadiationModel radiation = RadiationModelTestHelper::createWithSharedDevice(&context);
7169 radiation.disableMessages();
7170
7171 // One opaque patch at origin facing up
7172 uint UUID = context.addPatch(make_vec3(0, 0, 0), make_vec2(1, 1), nullrotation);
7173
7174 // Collimated source straight overhead
7175 uint src = radiation.addCollimatedRadiationSource(make_vec3(0, 0, 1));
7176
7177 std::vector<std::string> band_names;
7178 std::vector<float> expected_flux;
7179
7180 for (int b = 0; b < Nbands; b++) {
7181 std::string name = "band_" + std::to_string(b);
7182 band_names.push_back(name);
7183 float flux = float(b + 1) * 100.f; // 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600
7184 expected_flux.push_back(flux);
7185
7186 radiation.addRadiationBand(name);
7187 radiation.disableEmission(name);
7188 radiation.setSourceFlux(src, name, flux);
7189 radiation.setDirectRayCount(name, Ndirect);
7190 }
7191
7192 radiation.updateGeometry();
7193 radiation.runBand(band_names);
7194
7195 for (int b = 0; b < Nbands; b++) {
7196 float measured;
7197 context.getPrimitiveData(UUID, ("radiation_flux_" + band_names[b]).c_str(), measured);
7198 float rel_error = std::abs(measured - expected_flux[b]) / expected_flux[b];
7199 DOCTEST_CHECK_MESSAGE(rel_error <= error_threshold, "Band " << band_names[b] << ": expected " << expected_flux[b] << ", got " << measured << " (error " << rel_error << ")");
7200 }
7201}
